answers.title: 手表
answers.content:
The most expensive item I’ve ever bought is a high-end watch that I purchased during a trip to Switzerland a few years ago. I had always admired Swiss watches for their craftsmanship and precision, so when I visited Geneva, I decided to buy one as a special treat for myself. The watch was quite pricey, but I felt it was a worthy investment given its quality and the fact that I had saved up for it.

I used the watch for various occasions, including work and special events. It became a cherished accessory, not only for its functionality but also for its aesthetic appeal. The watch was beautifully designed, with a sleek stainless steel case and a classic leather strap. Every time I wore it, I felt a sense of pride and sophistication.

Unfortunately, while traveling, I accidentally lost the watch. It happened during a busy day exploring the city. I realized it was missing when I went to check the time and couldn’t find it on my wrist. Despite retracing my steps and checking with lost and found services, I was unable to recover it.

Losing the watch was incredibly disappointing. It was not just the financial loss that upset me, but also the sentimental value attached to it. The watch had been a symbol of a memorable trip and a personal achievement. I felt a mix of frustration and sadness, and it served as a reminder of the importance of being careful with valuable items.

answers.title: 安娜
answers.content:
I'd like to describe my childhood friend, Anna, who I recently reconnected with after losing touch for many years. We first met in elementary school, where we quickly became close friends because of our shared love for books. We used to spend hours together at the school library, discussing our favorite stories and exchanging books. However, as we grew older, we went to different high schools and eventually lost contact. Life got busy with studies, new friends, and other activities, and we gradually drifted apart.

A few months ago, I participated in a local Reading Corner program, which is a community event where people come together to read and discuss books. To my surprise, I saw Anna there, deeply engrossed in a novel. We instantly recognized each other and started catching up on everything that had happened over the years. It was amazing to see that she still had a passion for reading.

Anna loves reading all kinds of books, from fiction and history to science and self-development. I think she enjoys reading so much because it allows her to explore new worlds, gain knowledge, and understand different perspectives. She finds comfort and excitement in reading, and it seems to be a vital part of her daily life.

Getting back in touch with Anna was a wonderful experience. It felt like no time had passed at all, and we were able to reconnect over our shared love for books. It made me feel nostalgic and happy to have rekindled our old friendship through something we both enjoy.
answers.summary: 我想描述一下我儿时的朋友安娜，在失去联系多年后，我参加了一个当地的阅读角项目。这是一个社区活动，人们聚在一起阅读和讨论书籍。令我吃惊的是，我看到安娜也参加了。

answers.title: 故宫博物院
answers.content:
I'd like to describe a cultural place I visited, which is the Forbidden City Museum in Beijing. Located in the heart of Beijing, the Forbidden City is one of China’s most famous landmarks and a symbol of its imperial history. I first learned about this place in school, and I’ve always been fascinated by its historical significance and grandeur.

The Forbidden City is a massive complex with beautiful palaces, gardens, and courtyards, all surrounded by high walls. The architecture is stunning, with its red walls, golden roofs, and intricate carvings that reflect traditional Chinese culture. Once the home of Chinese emperors for nearly 500 years, it is now a museum displaying artifacts, artworks, and treasures from the Ming and Qing dynasties. This museum is deeply related to Chinese culture because it offers a rich insight into the country’s ancient traditions, art, and history.

I visited the Forbidden City during the National Day holiday with my family. We decided to go because we wanted to explore this iconic cultural site and learn more about China’s history. However, since it was a holiday, the place was extremely crowded. There were tourists everywhere, making it difficult to move around freely. At times, the crowds felt overwhelming, and it was hard to fully appreciate the surroundings due to the noise and congestion.

Despite the crowded environment, I still felt excited to be there. I admired the incredible architecture and felt a deep connection to Chinese history and culture. The experience taught me to appreciate the importance of cultural heritage, even if it means sharing it with many others.
answers.summary: 我想描述一下我参观过的一个文化场所，那就是北京的故宫博物馆。国庆节期间，我和家人一起参观了故宫。然而，由于是假日，这个地方非常拥挤。

answers.title: 乡村小屋
answers.content:
I'd like to describe an ideal place where I would love to live, which would be a cozy cottage in the countryside. I imagine this cottage surrounded by nature, perhaps near a small lake or in a forested area. The cottage would have a rustic design with a wooden exterior, large windows to let in plenty of natural light, and a small porch with a few chairs to relax and enjoy the view. Inside, it would be warm and inviting, with wooden floors, a fireplace in the living room, and soft, comfortable furniture.

Recently, I watched an online video that helped me learn how to furnish this ideal cottage. I watched it a few weeks ago on YouTube while I was searching for home decor ideas. The video was a tutorial by an interior designer who explained different ways to create a cozy and functional space in a small home. I watched it because I was curious about how to make a small place feel comfortable and stylish without overcrowding it.

From the video, I learned a lot about selecting the right furniture and color schemes. For example, the designer suggested using light colors to make the space look larger and incorporating multi-functional furniture to save space. I also learned the importance of adding personal touches, like handmade crafts or vintage items, to give the place character. This knowledge would help me furnish my dream cottage, making it not just a beautiful place but also a true reflection of my personality and style.
answers.summary:
我理想中的居所是乡间一栋温馨的小木屋，周围环绕自然景色。最近通过YouTube家居教程视频，我学会了如何用浅色调和多功能家具打造舒适空间，并加入手工艺品等个人元素。

answers.title: 祖母
answers.content:
I want to talk about my grandmother, who is a very strong-minded person, especially when it comes to family traditions and food. I've known her since I was a kid. We've always been close. I used to spend my school holidays at her house, which gave me many opportunities to see how passionate and committed she was to her faith.

One of the best examples of her strong opinions was when we made dumplings together during the Spring Festival. Dumplings are my favorite food this holiday, and they are an important part of our family traditions. My grandmother had very strict rules about how to make them. She insists the dough must be just the right thickness and the fillings, which include ground pork, shrimp, mushrooms and spices, must be fresh. She believes that folding techniques are also essential to making perfect dumplings, and she won't hesitate to correct anyone who differs from her approach.

I find her strong views admirable and sometimes difficult to accept. On the one hand, I appreciate her dedication and how she stays true to her beliefs, especially when it comes to upholding our family traditions. On the other hand, at family gatherings, her insistence can be a bit excessive, since everyone has to follow her way. However, I deeply respect her and the dumplings we make together are always delicious and filled with love and care that makes them even more special.

In short, my grandmother is a person who takes food, holidays and family seriously, and I respect and love my grandmother.
answers.summary: 我想谈谈我的祖母，她是一个非常有主见的人，尤其是在家庭传统和食物方面。具体来说，她对在春节一起包饺子十分重视。

answers.title: 征文比赛
answers.content:
One thing that made me feel confident was winning a successful essay contest. It was a national competition that required participants to write about a current social issue and propose possible solutions. The topic that year was climate change, and as an environmental enthusiast, I was passionate about the subject.

I spent weeks researching and gathering information, ensuring that my essay was well-informed and supported by evidence. I dedicated hours to crafting a compelling argument and expressing my ideas in a clear and concise manner. To my delight, my efforts paid off when I was informed that I had won the first prize.

Receiving this prize made me feel incredibly confident because it validated my ability to articulate my thoughts effectively and convince others through writing. It was a testament to my dedication and hard work. Knowing that my ideas were recognized on a national level boosted my self-esteem and renewed my belief in my capabilities.

Furthermore, winning the essay contest also provided me with a sense of accomplishment. It affirmed that my perspective and ideas had value and that I had the potential to make a positive impact in society. This recognition motivated me to continue pursuing my passion for environmental issues and to use my voice to advocate for change.

In conclusion, winning a successful essay contest about climate change was a significant confidence booster for me. It validated my skills in researching, writing, and conveying my ideas effectively. This achievement reminded me of my potential to influence others and make a difference in the world.
answers.summary: 有一件事让我感到自信，那就是赢得了一次成功的征文比赛。这是一项全国性的竞赛，要求参赛者写一篇关于当前社会问题的文章，并提出可能的解决方案。那一年的主题是气候变化，作为一个环保爱好者，我对这个主题充满了热情。

answers.title: 汉服晚会
answers.content:
I had the pleasure of attending a traditional Hanfu party, which provided me with a deeper understanding of China's Tang and Song dynasties. The party took place on a balmy summer evening, last August. It was held in the courtyard of a beautiful historical building, which added to the authenticity and charm of the event.

The party was organized to celebrate and showcase the rich culture and fashion of the Tang and Song dynasties. Everyone in attendance was dressed in elaborate and colorful Hanfu costumes, which accurately represented the fashion trends of that era. The venue was intricately decorated with traditional motifs and symbols, transporting us back in time.

What made this party truly enjoyable was the attention to detail and the immersive experience it provided. As soon as I entered the party, I felt as if I had entered a different era. The vibrant costumes, the melodious traditional music playing in the background, and the aroma of incense in the air all contributed to the party's authenticity. It was fascinating to see the different styles and designs of the Hanfu costumes, each reflecting the unique characteristics of the Tang and Song dynasties.

Moreover, the organizers arranged various cultural activities and performances to further enhance our understanding and appreciation of the historical period. There were traditional dances, calligraphy demonstrations, and even a tea ceremony. I had the opportunity to learn about the intricate rituals and customs of that time, which I found incredibly captivating.

What I enjoyed most about this party was the opportunity to engage with like-minded individuals who shared a passion for history and culture. I had the chance to interact with fellow attendees, exchange knowledge, and learn from their experiences. It was truly a valuable and enriching experience that left me with a desire to explore more about the Tang and Song dynasties.

In conclusion, attending the Hanfu party allowed me to immerse myself in the culture and fashion of the Tang and Song dynasties. It provided a fascinating glimpse into a historical period that I was previously unfamiliar with. The intricate details, immersive experience, and the opportunity to interact with others passionate about history made this party incredibly enjoyable and educational. I am now inspired to further explore and learn more about this intriguing era of Chinese history.
answers.summary: 我有幸参加了一个传统的汉服晚会，这让我对中国的唐宋有了更深的了解。这次聚会是在去年8月一个宜人的夏夜举行的。它在一座美丽的历史建筑的庭院里举行，这增加了活动的真实性和魅力。

answers.title: 游泳
answers.content:
In my community, swimming is a highly popular physical exercise. The local swimming pool is always bustling with people of all ages enjoying this activity. People usually go swimming early in the morning or in the late afternoon when the temperatures are cooler. The pool, located in the center of our community park, provides a perfect setting for this refreshing and invigorating exercise. The popularity of swimming here can be attributed to its numerous health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular fitness, building endurance, and offering a low-impact workout suitable for everyone.(游泳之所以在这里如此受欢迎，是因为它对健康有诸多益处，比如可以改善心血管健康、增强耐力，而且是一种适合所有人的低强度锻炼方式。).

I decided to learn swimming about a year ago. It took me around three months of regular practice to become proficient in it. I was motivated to learn swimming because of its immense health benefits and the sheer enjoyment it offers. Additionally, I wanted to participate in the community's annual swimming competition, which is a much-anticipated event. The competition not only promotes physical fitness but also fosters a strong sense of community spirit and camaraderie among participants.

In this year's competition, I participated with great enthusiasm, but it was my friend Alex who truly shone. Alex is an excellent swimmer and has been practicing for years. His dedication and hard work paid off as he won the top prize in the competition. He demonstrated exceptional skill and stamina, completing the laps with remarkable speed and precision. Alex’s victory was a moment of pride for all of us who know him. After the competition, Alex shared his training regimen and tips with me, which was incredibly inspiring and helpful for my own swimming practice.(比赛结束后，亚历克斯与我分享了他的训练方法和技巧，这对我自己的游泳练习非常有启发和帮助。).

Learning to swim has been a fantastic experience for me. It has not only enhanced my physical fitness but also provided a wonderful way to relax and unwind. I plan to continue swimming for many years to come, incorporating the tips and techniques Alex shared with me. Swimming has become an integral part of my routine, offering both health benefits and a sense of accomplishment. (游泳已经成为我日常生活中不可或缺的一部分，既有益健康，又有成就感。) The experience of participating in the competition and seeing Alex win has further fueled my passion for this sport.
answers.summary: 在我所在的社区，游泳是一项非常受欢迎的体育锻炼。当地的游泳池总是熙熙攘攘，各个年龄段的人都喜欢这项活动。人们通常在清晨或傍晚气温较低时去游泳。游泳池位于我们社区公园的中心，为这项令人神清气爽的运动提供了完美的环境。

answers.title: 福州
answers.content:
Fuzhou, located in southeastern China, is a city I consider ideal for a short-term stay due to its livable environment and pleasant subtropical monsoon climate. I first became acquainted with Fuzhou through travel recommendations and research about cities with favorable climates.

Known as the "City of Banyans," Fuzhou is adorned with numerous banyan trees, which thrive in its mild and humid climate. These trees not only contribute to the city's greenery but also hold cultural significance, symbolizing longevity and resilience.(这些树木不仅为城市的绿化做出了贡献，而且还具有文化意义，象征着长寿和坚韧。).

The subtropical monsoon climate of Fuzhou is characterized by mild winters, warm summers, and abundant rainfall throughout the year. Summers are typically warm and humid, with temperatures ranging from 25 to 35 degrees Celsius, while winters are mild, with temperatures seldom dropping below 10 degrees Celsius.

What attracts me to Fuzhou's climate is its moderate temperatures and ample rainfall, which create lush vegetation and scenic landscapes. I appreciate the mild winters that allow outdoor activities comfortably and the refreshing summer showers that provide relief from the heat.( 我喜欢温和的冬天，因为它能让户外活动变得舒适，也喜欢凉爽的夏天淋浴，让人从炎热中解脱出来。).

Because of its pleasant climate and fascinating culture, I would like to spend a week or two in Fuzhou to explore its natural beauty, historical sites and food. To actually feel the tall banyan trees and the cool experience and cultural treasures they bring. I might go to Fuzhou with friends or family, eager to immerse myself in the local culture, sample the local cuisine and discover the city's hidden gems.( 沉浸在当地文化中，品尝当地美食，发现这座城市隐藏的瑰宝。).

While I find Fuzhou's climate and cultural offerings appealing, I would opt for a short-term stay to experience its highlights without committing to long-term residency. Such a visit would allow me to enjoy the best of what Fuzhou has to offer while satisfying my curiosity about this vibrant city.
answers.summary: 我认为福州是我想要想要短暂居住的宜居城市，因为我喜欢当地的亚热带季风气候。福州又称“榕城”，因为当地种植了很多榕树。这种植物适合当地的气候，为当地提供了绿化与文化价值。

answers.title: 安娜
answers.content:
Anna is someone I aspire to work with because of her intelligence and diligence. We first met during a painting competition where each team had to create artworks themed around historical buildings. For this competition, we visited Lingyin Temple in Hangzhou to gather inspiration and discuss our creative approach.

Lingyin Temple is a renowned historical building located amidst lush greenery and serene surroundings. Its architecture reflects traditional Chinese Buddhist design, with intricate carvings, colorful decorations, and towering pagodas. (它的建筑反映了中国传统的佛教设计，有复杂的雕刻，丰富多彩的装饰和高耸的宝塔。) As we explored the temple grounds, we were fascinated by its rich history and cultural significance.

During our visit, Anna and I spent hours brainstorming ideas and refining our painting concept. We faced challenges in translating the grandeur of Lingyin Temple onto canvas while staying true to its essence. Despite the difficulties, we collaborated closely, sharing ideas and supporting each other's artistic vision.(尽管困难重重，我们还是紧密合作，分享想法，支持彼此的艺术愿景。).

After numerous revisions and adjustments, we finally completed our painting, capturing the timeless beauty and spiritual aura of Lingyin Temple. Our hard work and dedication paid off when our artwork received recognition and won an award in the competition.

Reflecting on this experience fills me with pride. Not only did we create a meaningful piece of art together, but we also formed a strong bond based on mutual respect and creative synergy. (我们不仅一起创造了一件有意义的艺术品，而且还在相互尊重和创造性协同的基础上形成了牢固的纽带。) Working with Anna taught me the importance of teamwork, perseverance, and collaboration in achieving shared goals. It was a proud moment to see our efforts acknowledged and rewarded, reaffirming my belief in the power of collaboration and dedication.
answers.summary: 安娜是我想要一起学习的人，因为她聪明又勤奋。我们曾经一起参加过一个比赛，在这个比赛中每个队伍要历史建筑为主题创作绘画作品。为此，我们参观了杭州的灵隐寺，并讨论的创作方案。经过多次修改，我们打磨出了满意的作品，并获得了奖项，我对此感到骄傲。

answers.title: 马拉松
answers.content:
One website that my friends and I frequently visit is a sports event platform. We discovered it while searching for reliable sources to stay updated on various sports competitions. This website provides comprehensive coverage of sports events, including live match updates, match schedules, and highlights.

I visit this website regularly, almost daily, to check the latest scores, watch match highlights, and read articles about my favorite teams and players. (我定期访问这个网站，几乎每天都访问，查看最新的比分，观看比赛集锦，阅读关于我最喜欢的球队和球员的文章。) It has become a go-to destination for me whenever I want to catch up on sports news or watch exciting game highlights.

Recently, my friend came across a volunteering opportunity for the city marathon on this website and decided to sign up. It was an excellent decision as volunteering for such events not only allows one to contribute to the community but also provides a unique experience of being part of a large-scale sporting event.(这是一个非常好的决定，因为志愿参加这样的活动不仅可以为社区做出贡献，而且还提供了参与大型体育赛事的独特体验。).

Inspired by my friend's decision, I also decided to join as a volunteer for the marathon. We both participated in various tasks during the event, such as guiding participants, distributing refreshments, and cheering for the runners. It was a fulfilling experience to witness the determination and spirit of the marathon participants as they crossed the finish line. Although I have never participated in a marathon before, the atmosphere at the race captivated me. I was impressed by the glamour of the marathon at the race site and it made me want to try this sport in the future.

Although I have watched marathon events before, being directly involved in the organization and execution of such an event was a new and exciting experience for me. It gave me a deeper appreciation for the effort and coordination required to host a successful public event. Overall, volunteering for the city marathon through the sports event website was a rewarding experience that I thoroughly enjoyed.
answers.summary: 我和朋友经常用的网站是一个体育赛事网站。在这个网站，我可以浏览赛事信息与观看比赛视频。有一次，我的朋友在这个网站上看到了城市马拉松比赛的志愿者招募信息，并决定报名参加。我觉得这是一个好决定，也一起报名了。后来，我们一起维护了比赛现场，并观看了马拉松比赛，不过我从未参加过马拉松比赛。

answers.title: 农家乐
answers.content:
My friend and I once ventured to an intriguing place—a rustic countryside farmstay that few people visit. Nestled amidst the mountains, this farmstay offered not only breathtaking natural scenery but also unique experiences such as fruit and vegetable picking, and purchasing farm-fresh produce.

Accompanied by my adventurous friend, we embarked on this journey to explore the charms of rural life. We visited the farm on a sunny weekend, eager to immerse ourselves in nature and try something different. Upon arrival, we were greeted by rolling hills, lush greenery, and the soothing sounds of nature.( 到达后，迎接我们的是连绵起伏的丘陵、郁郁葱葱的绿色植物和大自然舒缓的声音。).

While at the farm, my friend decided to purchase a chicken to cook for our lunch. Inspired by Southeast Asian flavors, he prepared a delicious lemongrass roasted chicken using fresh herbs and spices sourced from the farm itself.(受到东南亚风味的启发，他用农场出产的新鲜香草和香料制作了美味的香茅烤鸡。) It was a delightful meal, bursting with aromatic flavors and tender textures, unlike anything we had tasted before.

What made this experience even more memorable was the opportunity to interact with the local farmers and learn about their way of life. We gained insight into the challenges and joys of rural living, fostering a deeper appreciation for the simplicity and authenticity of countryside living.

I found this countryside farmstay fascinating for its tranquility, natural beauty, and the chance to engage in hands-on activities. It was a refreshing escape from the hustle and bustle of city life, offering a glimpse into a slower-paced, more sustainable way of living. (这是一种逃离喧嚣的城市生活的清新方式，让人瞥见了一种节奏较慢、更可持续的生活方式。) Our culinary adventure, coupled with the scenic surroundings and warm hospitality, made it a truly memorable and enriching experience.
answers.summary: 有次，我和朋友去了一个有趣的地方，那是一个很少人去乡下农家乐。农家乐坐落于山间，不仅有自然的景色，还可以提供采集蔬果、购买农产品的服务。我的朋友购买了一只鸡，并在那里做了一道东南亚风味的香茅烤鸡。这是美味又不寻常的一餐。

answers.title: 西装
answers.content:
On a previous birthday, I received a gift that I had long desired: a high-quality, tailored suit from my mother. This occasion marked the first time I wore the suit, and it happened to be at a birthday party held at an upscale hotel.

The suit was impeccably crafted, with a sleek design and a perfect fit.(这套衣服做工无懈可击，设计时尚，合身。) It consisted of a tailored jacket, crisp dress shirt, matching trousers, and a complementary tie. (它包括一件剪裁合身的夹克、整洁的正装衬衫、配套的裤子和一条配套的领带。) The fabric was luxurious, and the attention to detail was evident in every stitch. Wearing it made me feel confident and polished, ready to make a statement at the birthday celebration.

The birthday party was hosted at a prestigious hotel known for its elegance and sophistication. As it was a formal event, I wanted to dress appropriately and make a good impression. My mother's thoughtful gift provided me with the perfect attire for the occasion, allowing me to blend in seamlessly with the upscale atmosphere of the venue.

Wearing the suit not only fulfilled a personal desire but also symbolized a sense of maturity and refinement. It represented a milestone in my journey towards adulthood, signaling my readiness to embrace new opportunities and challenges.(这是我走向成年的一个里程碑，标志着我准备好迎接新的机遇和挑战。) Additionally, it was a tangible expression of my mother's love and support, reminding me of her thoughtfulness and generosity.

In conclusion, wearing the suit at the birthday party was a memorable experience that allowed me to showcase my style and confidence. It was a special occasion made even more meaningful by the cherished gift from my mother, emphasizing the importance of celebrating milestones and cherished relationships in life.
answers.summary: 我以前一直想要一套正式的西装。有一年生日的时候，妈妈送了我一套十分合身的昂贵西装。我身穿这套西装参加了一个在高档酒店举办的生日宴会。

answers.title: 给表弟补习
answers.content:
During one summer vacation, I spent some time tutoring my younger cousin in mathematics. My aunt, who is my cousin's mother, was impressed with my teaching skills and decided to show her appreciation by giving me money.

My cousin is a bright and curious child, but he was struggling with some concepts in math, particularly algebra(代数). I saw this as an opportunity to help him improve his understanding and confidence in the subject. We met regularly throughout the summer, usually a few times a week, to go over his math homework and practice problem-solving together.

Teaching my cousin was a rewarding experience for me. It was fulfilling to see him gradually grasp the concepts and gain more confidence in his abilities. Witnessing his progress and knowing that I played a part in helping him succeed brought me a sense of satisfaction and pride.(目睹他的进步，知道我在帮助他成功的过程中发挥了作用，这让我感到满足和自豪。).

My aunt's gesture of giving me money was unexpected but appreciated. She acknowledged the effort and time I put into tutoring my cousin and wanted to express her gratitude in a tangible way.(她对我为辅导表弟所付出的努力和时间表示感谢，并想用实际的方式表达她的感激之情。) I used the money wisely, putting it towards my savings for future expenses.

Overall, the experience of teaching my cousin and receiving money as a token of appreciation was both fulfilling and heartwarming. It reinforced the importance of sharing knowledge and supporting each other within the family. Additionally, it served as a reminder of the value of hard work and dedication in helping others achieve their goals.
answers.summary: 有一年，我在暑假帮我的表弟补习了数学。姨妈觉得我教得很不错，并给我发了钱。

answers.title: 亚历克斯
answers.content:
I have recently received some good news which makes me very happy. My brother, whom I know well, successfully passed the entrance exam and was accepted to graduate school. I heard about this exciting achievement at a family dinner and it was a moment of pride and happiness for all of us.

At the party to celebrate my brother's graduation, I met my brother's friend Alex. We bonded over our shared interest in motorhomes, and our conversation flowed effortlessly throughout the evening. (我们因为对房车的共同兴趣而联系在一起，整个晚上我们的谈话毫不费力地进行着。) Alex was charming and had a great sense of humor, which made our interactions very enjoyable. We discussed our favorite camping destinations, shared travel tips, and even traded some funny RV accident stories.(我们讨论了我们最喜欢的露营目的地，分享了旅行小贴士，甚至交换了一些有趣的房车事故故事。) It's refreshing to be associated with someone who loves outdoor adventure as much as I do.

Meeting Alex at the party was a pleasant surprise and I was grateful for the opportunity to meet a new friend. Our conversation added an extra dimension to the event and I left the party feeling uplifted and happy. Our conversation added an extra dimension to the event and I left the party feeling uplifted and happy.

My brother told me that Alex is kind and compassionate, always willing to listen or offer support when needed. He has a positive outlook on life and is able to inspire the best in people. Alex also helped my brother a lot as he worked towards his graduate degree. As a result, we all feel very happy to know Alex.

All in all, the good news of my brother's academic success and the pleasant encounter with Alex at the party brought joy and positivity to my life.
10.

answers.title: 工厂污染
answers.content:
I live near a factory that used to emit excessive noise and air pollution, which greatly affected the surrounding area. Fed up with the situation, I decided to lodge a complaint with the local government. The authorities responded by implementing the "Factory Pollution Management Law," (《工厂污染管理法》) which aimed to regulate and control the pollution emitted by factories.

This law required factories to adhere to strict emissions standards and implement measures to mitigate their environmental impact.(这项法律要求工厂遵守严格的排放标准，并采取措施减轻对环境的影响。) It also mandated regular inspections and imposed penalties for non-compliance. The implementation of this law brought about significant improvements in air quality and noise levels in my neighborhood.

I felt satisfied with the result of my complaint because it addressed the problem effectively and brought tangible improvements to the quality of life in the area. The once polluted air became cleaner, and the incessant noise from the factory diminished significantly. The new law not only improved the environment but also ensured the health and well-being of the community.(新法律不仅改善了环境，而且确保了社区的健康和福祉。).

The satisfaction I felt stemmed from the realization that my complaint had made a positive difference. It demonstrated the power of citizen action and government intervention in addressing environmental issues. Knowing that my efforts had contributed to creating a healthier and more pleasant living environment for myself and my neighbors was immensely gratifying.

In conclusion, the introduction of the "Factory Pollution Management Law" was a positive outcome of my complaint. It effectively addressed the pollution problem caused by the nearby factory and brought about significant improvements in air quality and noise levels. This experience has reinforced my belief in the importance of advocating for environmental protection and holding polluters accountable for their actions.
answers.summary: 我家附近的工厂经常产生噪音与空气污染，我向政府投诉这个问题。后来颁布了《工厂污染管理法》，工厂的污染问题得到了控制。我对于这个结果很满意。

answers.title: 音乐爱好者
answers.content:
I have a friend who is a true music enthusiast. He loves to buy discounted CDs, headphones, and other music-related products. We often visit a small store together that specializes in selling these items. This store used to be located in an older part of the city, but with the recent urban development, a new shopping mall was built, and the store relocated there. The new location is much more convenient and has allowed the store to expand its range of products.

My friend and I usually go to this store on weekends. The store is now situated on the second floor of the shopping mall, which is only a short bus ride from where we live. The shop is cozy and well-organized, with a wide variety of music products displayed neatly on the shelves. The staff are friendly and knowledgeable, often recommending new releases or the best deals available.(工作人员很友好，知识渊博，经常推荐新发行的电影或最好的优惠。).

My friend particularly enjoys finding good bargains. He has a keen eye for discounts and always manages to find great deals on high-quality music products. (他对折扣有敏锐的眼光，总是能在高质量的音乐产品上找到很好的交易。) He believes that music is an essential part of life and enjoys exploring different genres and artists. His passion for music and his ability to find affordable products have made our shopping trips both fun and rewarding.

The new shopping mall has significantly improved our local area. It took about a year to complete, and its opening has brought more convenience and variety to our shopping experiences. The mall is modern and spacious, with numerous stores, restaurants, and entertainment options. This development has made our neighborhood more vibrant and lively.

Overall, I feel very positive about these changes. The relocation of our favorite music store to the new shopping mall has been a great improvement. We still enjoy our visits, and the expanded range of products means we always find something new and exciting. The development has not only enhanced our shopping experiences but also contributed to a more dynamic and enjoyable community.
answers.summary: 我有一个音乐爱好者朋友，他喜欢买打折的便宜碟片、耳机和其他音乐产品。我们经常一起去一家售卖这些产品的小店购物。随着城市发展，城市增加了一个购物商场，那家小店也搬到了商场里，并丰富了商品的种类，我们仍旧时不时会去消费。

answers.title: 自然公园
answers.content:
When I was young, one of my favorite activities during my free time was visiting a natural park with my friends. This park is located on the outskirts of our city, and we used to take the bus to get there. The journey itself was quite enjoyable, as it gave us a chance to chat, laugh, and anticipate the fun we were about to have.

The natural park is a beautiful place, rich with diverse vegetation and fresh, clean air. It has vast green fields, tall trees, and several trails that we loved to explore. The serene environment was perfect for feeling connected to nature and escaping the hustle and bustle of city life. (宁静的环境非常适合让人感受到与自然的联系，逃离城市生活的喧嚣。) We would spend hours there, playing games, having picnics, and simply enjoying the natural beauty around us.

One of the most memorable aspects of our visits was taking photos. We loved capturing the moments we shared, and the park provided a stunning backdrop for our pictures. Among the many photos we took, there is one that stands out as my favorite. It is a group photo of me and my friends, all smiling and carefree(大家都笑着，无忧无虑。). This picture was taken near a small pond in the park, with trees and flowers in the background. It perfectly captures the essence of our childhood and the joy we felt during those visits.

I particularly cherish this photograph because it is filled with happy memories of my childhood friends and our adventures. The photo represents a time of innocence and freedom, and every time I look at it, I am reminded of those wonderful days.

The natural park remains a special place for me, not only because of its beauty but also because of the memories and experiences it holds. Revisiting those moments through photos brings a sense of nostalgia and happiness, making the park a cherished part of my past.
answers.summary: 我小时候有空的时候喜欢和朋友一起坐公交去自然公园玩。那里植被丰富，空气清新，适合感受自然。在那里我们曾经拍过很多照片，其中有一张是我的最喜欢的，那是我和朋友们的合照，充满了童年回忆。

answers.title: 爷爷
answers.content:
One person who greatly encouraged and helped me to achieve a significant goal is my grandfather. He is an interesting old man who used to be a Chinese language teacher. I have always admired his wisdom and experience. I met him every weekend when I visited my grandparents' house. We would spend hours talking about various topics, and he often shared fascinating stories from his teaching days.

When I decided to participate in a citywide speech competition, my grandfather played a crucial role in my preparation. He encouraged me to take part in the competition and assured me that with hard work and dedication, I could excel. To help me, he designed a detailed study plan that balanced my regular schoolwork and my speech preparation. He also taught me numerous recitation techniques, such as how to use intonation, maintain eye contact, and effectively convey emotions.(他还教了我很多背诵技巧，比如如何使用语调，如何保持眼神交流，如何有效地传达情感。).

Every day after school, we would practice together. He would listen to my speeches, provide constructive feedback, and help me refine my performance. His guidance was invaluable, and his belief in my abilities boosted my confidence. (他的指导是无价的，他对我能力的信任增强了我的信心。) Despite the challenges of managing my schoolwork and preparing for the competition, his support made it possible for me to persevere.

The day of the competition was nerve-wracking, but I remembered all the tips and techniques my grandfather had taught me. When I was announced as the champion of the citywide speech competition, I felt a tremendous sense of accomplishment. This achievement was particularly important to me because it demonstrated that I could excel in public speaking without compromising my academic responsibilities.(这一成就对我来说尤其重要，因为它证明了我可以在不牺牲学术责任的情况下，在公开演讲方面表现出色。).

My grandfather’s encouragement and assistance were pivotal in my success. His unwavering support not only helped me win the competition but also taught me valuable lessons about discipline, hard work, and the importance of having a mentor. This experience has had a lasting impact on me, and I am deeply grateful for his guidance.
answers.summary: 爷爷是一个有趣的老人，他年轻时是一名语文老师。他帮助我安排学习计划，还教了我很多朗诵的技巧。最终，我在不耽误学习的同时成功获得了市区的演讲比赛的冠军。

answers.title: 丹尼尔·雷德克里夫
answers.content:
One person I know who is exceptionally talented is Daniel Radcliffe. I first got to know him through the Harry Potter film series, where he played the lead role of Harry Potter. Daniel showed his acting talent from a very young age, captivating audiences worldwide with his portrayal of the iconic character. His ability to bring the complex character of Harry Potter to life, with all its emotional depth and growth, is truly impressive.(他把哈利·波特这个复杂的角色演绎得栩栩如生，情感的深度和成长都让人印象深刻。).

What makes Daniel Radcliffe particularly inspiring is not just his successful acting career but also his dedication to philanthropy and social causes. He has used his fame to support numerous charitable organizations and has spoken out on important social issues. This combination of professional success and a strong sense of social responsibility makes him a fantastic role model for young people.(职业上的成功和强烈的社会责任感使他成为年轻人的楷模。).

One of the most memorable moments that highlighted his talent for me was watching the first Harry Potter film when it was released. Daniel’s performance was captivating, and it was evident that he had a natural gift for acting. Over the years, as the series progressed, his acting skills only improved, and he took on increasingly challenging roles, showcasing his versatility.

Inspired by Daniel Radcliffe’s journey, I have developed a keen interest in the film industry, particularly in screenwriting and directing(编剧和导演). I would like to study these subjects in the future, perhaps at a renowned film school. Learning about screenwriting and directing would allow me to explore my creativity and storytelling abilities. While it may be challenging to learn these skills, I believe that with dedication and passion, it is certainly achievable.

In conclusion, Daniel Radcliffe’s talent and contributions both on and off the screen have inspired me. His story motivates me to pursue my interests in the film industry and strive to make a positive impact through my work, just as he has done.
answers.summary: 丹尼尔·雷德克里夫从小就表现出了表演的天赋，并饰演了《哈利·波特》系列电影的主角。他事业有成，并在热心于公益事业，是少年的榜样。因为他的故事，我想也想在未来学习影视相关的学科，比如编剧与导演。

answers.title: 卧室
answers.content:
My favorite place in my house, where I can truly relax and focus on my studies, is my bedroom. It is located on the second floor, away from the hustle and bustle of the rest of the house. My bedroom is a cozy and quiet sanctuary, decorated with soft colors and comfortable furniture. (我的卧室是一个舒适而安静的庇护所，装饰着柔和的色彩和舒适的家具。) There’s a large window that lets in plenty of natural light during the day, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere.

I spend a significant amount of time in my bedroom, both relaxing and studying. When it comes to studying, I have a well-organized desk where I review and prepare for my classes. This space is perfect for focusing on my studies because it is free from distractions, and the quiet environment helps me concentrate better. I usually study in the afternoons or evenings, depending on my schedule. The subjects I study here range from school assignments to additional readings and preparations for exams.

Apart from studying, my bedroom is also the place where I unwind. I enjoy listening to music, which helps me relax and recharge. Sometimes, I take short naps to refresh my mind and body. The tranquility of my bedroom makes it an ideal place for these activities.

My daily routine includes spending a few hours in my bedroom each day, either studying or relaxing. This routine is relatively easy to follow because I have everything I need within reach, and the environment is conducive to both productivity and relaxation.(这个例行程序相对容易遵循，因为我有我需要的一切触手可及，而且环境有利于生产力和放松。) I particularly enjoy this routine because it allows me to balance my academic responsibilities with moments of rest and leisure.

In summary, my bedroom is my favorite place in the house. It serves as a perfect retreat for both relaxation and study, making it an essential part of my daily routine.
answers.summary: 我的卧室十分安静，适合日常放松与学习。我日常喜欢在卧室学习，复习与预习学习所学的知识，或者听歌、小憩，来放松身心。

answers.title: 急救
answers.content:
I clearly remember the first day of high school, which was a particularly memorable and eventful day for me. This happened a few years ago, at the beginning of September, when I was about 16 years old. My high school is located in the heart of the city, about a 20-minute walk from my home.

On that day, I was filled with a mixture of excitement and nervousness as I walked to school, eager to start this new chapter in my life. (那天，我怀着既兴奋又紧张的心情走向学校，渴望开启人生的新篇章。) However, on my way, I encountered an elderly man who had suddenly collapsed on the sidewalk. It was evident that he was in need of immediate medical assistance. Faced with this urgent situation, I had to make a quick decision. Despite knowing that it was the first day of school and that being late would not leave a good impression, I decided to stay and help.

I called an ambulance and stayed with the man until it arrived. This whole incident took about 20 minutes, and as a result, I missed the beginning of the opening ceremony. When I finally arrived at school, I explained the situation to my teacher, fully expecting a reprimand for my tardiness. To my surprise, the teacher and my classmates were very understanding and praised my actions. The teacher even mentioned my act of kindness during the assembly, which made me feel proud and relieved.(老师甚至在集会上提到了我的善举，这让我感到骄傲和宽慰。).

Reflecting on this experience, I realized that sometimes taking a risk and doing what you believe is right can lead to unexpectedly positive outcomes. Helping the man in need not only ensured his safety but also taught me an invaluable lesson about compassion and responsibility.(帮助有需要的人不仅确保了他的安全，也教会了我关于同情和责任的宝贵一课。) It’s an experience I still remember vividly because it marked the beginning of my high school journey with an important life lesson.
answers.summary: 高中开学第一天，我在路上看到了突发疾病的路人。冒着被老师批评的风险，我选择帮助路人叫救护车。虽然开学典礼我迟到了，但是路人获救了，我也获得了老师的理解与表扬。

answers.title: 蓝牙音箱
answers.content:
I remember seeing an advertisement for a Bluetooth speaker about a year ago. It was a flashy, engaging ad that I first saw on a social media platform, probably around late evening while I was scrolling through my feed. The advertisement portrayed the speaker as incredibly easy to use, with excellent sound quality and seamless connectivity, making it seem like the perfect addition to my home audio setup.(广告将这款音箱描述为非常容易使用，音质出色，连接无缝，使它看起来像是我家庭音频设置的完美补充。) It was a video ad that showed people effortlessly connecting their devices and enjoying music in high definition.

I decided to purchase the speaker shortly after seeing the ad. I bought it online and eagerly awaited its arrival, hoping it would live up to the promises made in the advertisement. The main reason I got it was to enhance my music-listening experience and to have a portable option for outdoor gatherings with friends.(我买它的主要原因是为了增强我的音乐聆听体验，并为与朋友在户外聚会提供一个便携的选择。).

However, once I received the speaker and started using it, I quickly realized that it wasn't as user-friendly as the advertisement had suggested. The Bluetooth connectivity was often unreliable, and it would frequently disconnect from my devices. Additionally, the sound quality was not as impressive as it had been portrayed. I found myself struggling to get it to work properly, which was frustrating given the high expectations set by the ad.

Despite these issues, I did use the speaker quite often, trying to make the best out of my purchase. I also showed it to my friends during a small get-together at my place. I demonstrated how to connect it and played some music, but it was clear that they also found it a bit cumbersome to use. Their feedback mirrored my own frustrations.

Because of these ongoing difficulties, I’ve grown to dislike the product and the misleading advertisement that convinced me to buy it. I’m now considering replacing the speaker with a more reliable and user-friendly option. The experience taught me to be more cautious and critical of advertisements in the future, ensuring that I thoroughly research products before making a purchase.(这段经历教会了我以后对广告要更加谨慎和批判，确保在购买之前对产品进行彻底的研究。).
answers.summary: 因为一个广告，我购买了蓝牙音箱，并向朋友们展示了这个音箱。然而音箱的一些功能使用困难，并不像广告演示的一样方便。因此，我不喜欢这个广告，也想换掉这个产品

answers.title: 快餐店
answers.content:
There is a popular chain of fast food restaurants in my neighborhood, which is especially busy during mealtimes. Frequent patronage there has given me an initial understanding of the demanding food service industry(经常光顾那里让我对要求苛刻的餐饮服务业有了初步了解). A recent experience at this restaurant in particular highlighted the challenges faced by waiters and influenced my view of the profession.

A few weeks ago, amidst the typical dinner rush(正值晚餐高峰期), the restaurant was understaffed, leading to slower service. Amid this chaos(在这种混乱的情况下), a situation unfolded that captured my attention. A customer, evidently under time pressure from his work schedule, voiced his frustration over the delayed service. This incident was a clear example of the challenges waiters frequently encounter. The waiter's response was both professional and empathetic(既专业又富有同情心). He not only apologized profusely but also expedited the preparation of the customer's meal. Furthermore, he offered a discount for the customer's next visit, a gesture that exemplified excellent customer service(他不仅深表歉意，还加快了为顾客准备餐点的速度。此外，他还为顾客的下次光临提供了折扣，这一举动体现了出色的客户服务).

This encounter made me reflect on the role of a restaurant waiter. It is a job that requires a unique blend of skills – the ability to multitask, manage time efficiently, and handle customer complaints with composure and diplomacy(能够一心多用、高效管理时间、沉着冷静地处理顾客投诉). The waiter's role goes beyond merely taking orders and serving food; it involves managing customer expectations and maintaining a high level of service quality, even under stressful conditions like peak meal times.

Witnessing the pressures and challenges inherent in this role, I realized that a career as a restaurant waiter might not align with my personal aspirations. While it is undoubtedly a rewarding job, offering the chance to interact with a diverse range of people and play a key role in their dining experience, it also demands resilience, patience, and exceptional problem-solving skills(要坚韧不拔的精神、耐心和出色的解决问题的能力). This experience has led me to appreciate the hard work and dedication of those in the service industry, while also understanding that it may not be the right fit for everyone.
answers.summary: 在家附近有一家连锁快餐馆，在餐点经常会有人来用餐。因为店内人手并不是很多，在用餐高峰期的出餐速度不是很快。我在前几周去餐厅吃饭的时候就看到了一位急性子的客人就会选择投诉店家，因为他无法在工作休息的时间完成用餐，他感到十分着急。服务员表示十分抱歉，帮他催促了菜品的制作，并保证在下次来吃饭的时候给他一定的优惠。这让我感到餐厅服务员虽然是一份很有意义的工作，但并不一份简单的工作，得面临顾客投诉以及餐点高峰期的压力，这让我在未来不想当一名餐厅服务员。

answers.title: 笔记本电脑
answers.content:
In the digital age we live in, technology plays an indispensable role in our lives, and for me, this is epitomized by my laptop(笔记本电脑就是一个缩影). This device is not just a piece of technology; it's a vital tool that significantly enhances my daily life, making it almost unimaginable to function without it.

My reliance on the laptop stems from its multifaceted capabilities. It serves as a portal to the world, connecting me to a vast ocean of information available on the internet(它是通向世界的门户，将我与互联网上浩瀚的信息海洋连接起来). This access is crucial for both my academic pursuits and personal interests. Additionally, it acts as a bridge to my social circle, enabling me to stay in touch with friends through various digital platforms. Beyond these practical uses, it also provides a source of entertainment, allowing me to unwind(放松) with games after a long day.

However, the most significant aspect of my laptop is its powerful software applications. Particularly noteworthy is the mind map software that has become an integral part of my daily routine. Every evening, after returning to my dormitory, I use this software to create mind maps of the day's learnings. This visual organization of information(视觉化的信息组织方式) has proven to be a highly effective method for reviewing and retaining knowledge. It helps me make connections between different concepts, thereby enhancing my understanding and memory.

I've found this approach so beneficial that I'm keen to share it with my peers. I believe that this method of using technology to assist in study and work can be a game-changer for many students. It's a perfect example of how digital tools can be harnessed for educational purposes, transforming the traditional methods of learning and organizing information. In a world where information overload is a common challenge, such tools can provide a much-needed structure(这种工具可以提供急需的结构), aiding in effective learning and productivity.
answers.summary: 笔记本电脑是我家中最重要的物品之一，我觉得如果没有笔记本电脑我无法像平日一样正常生活。我每天都需要使用电脑，因为笔记本有很多功能，能帮我和朋友们取得联系，能让我上网查阅资料，也能让我玩游戏放松。当然最重要的是电脑上还有很好用的软件，比如有一个软件可以制作思维导图，可以帮助整理每天所学的知识。我平常在每天回到宿舍之后都会制作当天所学知识的思维导图，帮助我在未来更好地进行复习。我觉得使用在电脑上制作的思维导图来帮助学习和工作都是很实用的，并想把这个方法分享给我的同学们。

answers.title: 三亚
answers.content:
Last summer marked a significant development in my city: the completion of a major upgrade at our local airport. This wasn't just a routine enhancement of facilities; it was a transformation that expanded our horizons, literally. The airport's upgrade included the addition of several new routes(新的航线), the most exciting of which, for me, was the direct flight to Sanya, Hainan.

Sanya had always been a dream destination for me(我梦寐以求的旅游胜地), a place synonymous(代名词) with relaxation and natural beauty. Its reputation for sun-drenched beaches, azure seas(蔚蓝的海洋), and a laid-back lifestyle(悠闲的生活方式) had captivated my imagination for years. The announcement of this direct route filled me with anticipation. I envisaged myself basking in the sunshine, strolling along the sandy shores, indulging in the local cuisine, and exploring the lush tropical rainforests(我憧憬着自己沐浴在阳光下，在沙滩上漫步，品尝当地美食，探索郁郁葱葱的热带雨林).

However, life often has other plans. Just as the new route commenced, a typhoon swept through, derailed my plans to visit Sanya(一场台风席卷而来，使我的三亚之行计划落空). The cancellation of the flight due to this natural event was a significant disappointment. To add to my woes(雪上加霜的是), I had a competition lined up immediately afterward, which further delayed my travel plans.

Reflecting on this experience, I realized that while we can plan, we can't control everything. Last year's setback(挫折) was a lesson in patience and adaptability. As I look forward to this year's vacation, my desire to visit Sanya remains strong. This time, I am approaching my travel plans with a sense of cautious optimism, hoping that better planning and a stroke of good luck will finally allow me to experience the charm and beauty of Sanya. This anticipation of exploring a new place, experiencing its culture, and enjoying its natural beauty is a reminder of the joys and unpredictability(不可预见性) of travel.
answers.summary: 去年的暑假我所在城市的机场完成了升级，不仅升级了的硬件设施，还新增了许多的航线，比如我很期待的直达海南三亚的航班。因为那里一直都是我想去放松的地方，那里有着阳光、沙滩和美丽的大海。我希望在航线开通后就去到三亚，在那里的沙滩上欣赏自然风光，品尝当地的美食，探索热带雨林。可惜航班开通后遇到了台风，我无法搭乘那趟航班去到三亚，更糟的是之后我得参加一个竞赛。因此，我在去年的三亚之行被延期了，我希望我在今年能有更好的行程规划和有更好的运气，能够顺利去到三亚度假。

answers.title: 夏令营
answers.content:
Reflecting on my childhood, one summer vacation stands out distinctly in my memory. When I was ten, I had the unique opportunity to attend a summer camp, an experience that turned out to be far from ordinary and incredibly enriching.

Before the camp began, my mother prepared me by purchasing the official camp uniform. At first glance(乍一看), the outfit – an orange T-shirt paired with black shorts – didn't strike me as particularly stylish(并不特别时髦). However, it was light, breathable, and, importantly, each shirt bore our names and the camp's logo. This simple uniform played a crucial role(发挥重要作用) in the camp's daily life. It aided the teachers in managing us, a group of energetic kids, and made it easier for us to identify each other during our various activities.

The camp was nestled in a picturesque mountainous region(风景如画的山区), providing the perfect backdrop for a plethora of outdoor activities. Our days were filled with hiking, fishing, kite flying, and more. Among these, hiking was my favorite. Walking along the trails with friends, engaging in lively conversations, and soaking in the breathtaking scenery(我和朋友们漫步在山间小路上，热烈地交谈着，欣赏着壮丽的景色), I discovered the joy in physical activity. It was during these hikes that I realized exercise could be a delightful and fulfilling pursuit.

This two-week camp not only offered a break from the usual routine but also left me with a treasure trove of memories(不仅让我打破了常规，还为我留下了丰富的回忆). The experiences I had and the friendships I formed there have had a lasting impact on me. It taught me valuable lessons about independence, teamwork, and the joy of exploring the great outdoors. This summer camp was more than just a holiday; it was a pivotal chapter in my childhood that shaped my appreciation for nature and adventure.
answers.summary: 我十岁时的暑假假期是一个不寻常的假期，因为我参加了一个夏令营。妈妈帮我买了夏令营的制服，分别是橙色的T恤和黑色的短裤，十分的轻便透气，上面还有着每个人的名字和夏令营的标志。虽然当时我觉得这件衣服并不好看，但是事实上这件衣服在让我们找到大部队很有用，极大方便了老师的管理。这个夏令营的营地在一个风景秀美的山区，我们有进行了各种各样的户外活动，比如登山、钓鱼和放风筝。我喜欢和朋友们一起爬山，一边聊天一边欣赏美景，这让我感觉运动是一件快乐的事情。虽然这个夏令营的时光仅仅只有两个星期，但带给我很多美好的回忆。

answers.title: 复习资料
answers.content:
The end of my sophomore semester(大二学期末) was marked by an intense period of academic pressure, where my daily routine was a whirlwind of exams, reports, and paper submissions. Striving for high grades, I found myself completely immersed in my studies, with each day bringing its own set of challenges and tasks.

One evening, after a long day of hard work in the library, I was making my way back to the dormitory, eager for some much-needed rest. It was then that I stumbled upon something unexpected – revision materials(复习材料) that had been accidentally left behind by one of my classmates. These weren't just any materials; they were crucial for an exam scheduled for the following day.

Realizing the urgency of the situation, I felt a strong sense of responsibility to return these materials to their rightful owner. The thought of my classmate being frantic over the loss of these important notes (因为丢失这些重要的笔记而焦急万分) spurred me into action. With a sense of purpose, I reached out to our teacher to contact the owner of the materials. Fortunately, my efforts were successful, and I was able to promptly reunite my classmate with their lost notes.

The relief and gratitude expressed by my classmate were immensely rewarding(同学的欣慰和感激让我受益匪浅). This experience, albeit small in the grand scheme of things, was a significant moment for me. It highlighted the importance of empathy and taking action (换位思考和采取行动) to help others, even during times when we are preoccupied with our own challenges. The sense of accomplishment I felt was profound, reinforcing the idea that acts of kindness, no matter how small, can have a big impact. This incident was a valuable lesson in compassion and community spirit, traits that are essential in any collaborative and supportive academic environment.
answers.summary: 我的大二学期期末是非常繁忙的时期，因为要参加很多的考试，提交很多的报告和论文。为了能取得好成绩，我的每一天都很忙碌。就在有天晚上，我在图书馆完成了当天的任务，想要回到宿舍休息。在路上我发现了角落里有同学遗失的复习资料。我发现物品的主人应该和我是同一个学院的，并且里面还有明天考试所需的材料。我想同学一定很着急，就迅速通过老师和失主取得了联系。同学对我的帮助感到十分的感激，我感到自己做了一件好事，很有成就感。

answers.title: 龙猫
answers.content:
Looking back on my elementary school days at a boarding school(寄宿学校), one of the most cherished memories(最珍贵的回忆) is our special event, "Movie Night," held during festival nights. These evenings were not just about watching films; they were a celebration of camaraderie(庆祝友情) and shared experiences with my classmates, making each movie night unforgettable.

One film that particularly resonated(特别有共鸣) with me was Hayao Miyazaki's "Totoro." (宫崎骏的《龙猫》) This enchanting movie, with its story of two young sisters exploring the countryside and encountering magical creatures, left a lasting impression on me. The heartwarming narrative and refreshing animation style(感人至深的叙事和令人耳目一新的动画风格), coupled with the vividly depicted and adorable mystical beings(加上生动描绘的可爱神秘生物), captivated my imagination. "Totoro" wasn't just a film; it was a window into a world of wonder and creativity.

This movie sparked in me a long-term aspiration: to create my own animated movie. Inspired by Miyazaki's masterpiece, I began to nurture this dream with dedication and enthusiasm(奉献和热情). To bring my vision to life, I engaged in various activities. I spent countless hours brainstorming story ideas, delving into the realms of writing and directing. I immersed myself in books and resources about filmmaking and animation(电影和动画制作), absorbing as much knowledge as possible. Additionally, I experimented with producing small animated sequences, understanding that every great journey begins with small steps.

This goal has become a significant part of my life. It represents more than just a career ambition; it symbolizes the power of inspiration and the importance of pursuing one's passions. The journey toward achieving this dream is a testament to the impact a single movie can have on an individual's life. It highlights the transformative power of art and storytelling, and how they can shape one's aspirations and goals(愿望和目标).
answers.summary: 我的小学是一所寄宿制小学，我们在一些节日的晚上会举行特别的活动“电影之夜”。我很喜欢这个活动，因为电影很有趣，能和同学一起看电影班讨论剧情更是难忘。其中有一部电影给我留下了深刻的印象，那是宫崎骏的《龙猫》，讲述了一对小姐妹回到乡下生活，见到了很多神奇生物的故事。这部电影既温馨又清新，登场的人物可爱又生动，我十分喜欢。自从看了那部电影之后，我就有了我的长期目标，那就是制作自己的动画电影。为了达成这个目标，我经常构思故事剧情，了解如何成为一个编剧或者导演，为此阅读很多相关的书籍，并尝试进行制作。

answers.title: 泉州
answers.content:
About a year ago, I embarked on a journey to Quanzhou, an experience that led to an unexpected yet enlightening discovery. My adventure in Quanzhou was marked by a particular day that stands out vividly(历历在目) in my memory. I found myself in a bustling market, a place teeming with life and activity. The air was filled with the sounds of happy chatter from tourists and the persistent hum of merchants using loudspeakers to attract customers(空气中弥漫着游客们快乐的交谈声和商人们用扩音器吸引顾客的持续嗡嗡声). The market was a tapestry of vibrant sounds and colors, a true representation of the lively local culture(生动的声音和色彩交织在一起，真实地再现了生机勃勃的当地文化).

Despite the festive atmosphere, I felt somewhat overwhelmed by the noise(人声鼎沸), which I perceived more as a cacophony than a cheerful symphony(更像嘈杂的声音，而不是欢快的交响乐). My true intention was to seek a quieter, more serene experience. I had set my heart on visiting a quaint little store tucked away in a deep alleyway, a gem(宝石) known for its exquisite handicrafts created by local artists. This store, which I had stumbled upon online, promised a unique and intimate glimpse into(窥探) the artistic soul of Quanzhou.

However, my journey to this hidden treasure was not straightforward. The inaccuracy of my phone's map led me through a maze of streets, heightening my sense of being lost amidst the noise and commotion. It was during this search that serendipity guided me to a different store, one that sold hand-drawn maps. The map I purchased there was not only aesthetically beautiful but also incredibly accurate(不仅美观大方，而且精确无比), leading me precisely to my desired destination.

This experience taught me an invaluable lesson about the unique charm and utility of traditional paper maps. In a world increasingly reliant on digital technology, there is still a distinct place for the tactile and reliable nature of paper maps. They hold a certain romantic and practical appeal(既浪漫又实用), providing not just directions but also a tangible connection to the places they represent(与所代表的地方产生切实的联系). This realization was a key takeaway from my travels, reminding me that sometimes, traditional methods have their own irreplaceable value in our modern world.
answers.summary: 一年前，我在泉州旅游的时候走到了热闹的街市，许多游客开心地聊着天，商家用喇叭放着广告词吸引游客，大家很开心，但我只感觉噪音很吵。我其实想去一个在巷子深处的里的漂亮小店，里面有许多艺术家制作的手工艺品。我自从在网上看到这家店之后就很想造访，但是因为手机地图不过准确找不到。我只好一边忍受噪音一边找路，恰好路过了一个有卖当地地图的店铺。我在店里买了一份漂亮的手绘地图，这张地图不但美观还标记出了我想要去到的地方。我感叹这真是一次难忘的经历，并意识到了纸质地图也有独特的价值。

answers.title: 急救
answers.content:
During my secondary school days, when I was 14, a memorable and transformative experience unfolded(难忘且具有转变性的经历就此展开). Our school, emphasizing the practical aspects of education(强调教育的实用性), organized a comprehensive first aid training program(综合急救培训计划). This initiative was not merely a theoretical exercise(理论练习); it was a hands-on learning experience that proved its worth in an unforeseen situation(始料未及的情况下).

Initially, the program commenced with an instructional video(教学视频). This video served as an introductory tool, outlining the basics of first aid. Following this, Red Cross volunteers(红十字会志愿者), who were experts in their field, conducted an interactive session. Their guidance was invaluable; under their watchful eyes, we learned crucial life-saving techniques. These included calming patients, performing bandages, and the critical skill of CPR(安抚病人、进行包扎以及心肺复苏这一关键技能).

The practical nature of this training culminated in a first aid competition(在急救比赛中达到了高潮), which was both challenging and enlightening. In this competition, I teamed up with my good friend Wang. Wang's proficiency in first aid techniques, coupled with his exceptional teamwork skills, made him an ideal partner. Together, we navigated the challenges of the competition, applying our newly acquired skills in a simulated environment.

However, the true test of our learning came unexpectedly. Shortly after the completion of the course, Wang and I encountered a real-life emergency. An elderly man fainted on(晕倒) our way home from school. Drawing upon our training, we sprang into action, employing the first aid techniques we had learned. We stayed with the gentleman, offering assistance and comfort until the arrival of an ambulance.

This experience was a defining moment for me. It underscored the practicality and importance of first aid knowledge. The ability to help others in a critical moment was not only a duty but also a source of deep personal accomplishment(对他人的生活产生深远的影响). It instilled in me a sense of responsibility and a realization that the skills we learn can have a profound impact on the lives of others. This incident, thus, was not just a learning experience but a life lesson in empathy, quick thinking, and the significance of being prepared for emergencies.
answers.summary: 我在14岁时学校开展了关于急救技术的教学活动。我们先是观看了播放的教学视频，然后在红十字会志愿者的教学下，我和同学一起学习了如何给人进行急救，比如说如何安抚患者情绪，进行包扎和心肺复苏。在学习之后开展了急救技术比赛，我和好友小王是队友，他不但技术操作到位，而且很会进行团队合作，是一位很好的队友。恰好在不久之后我和小王在放学途中看到一位老人晕倒了。我们使用了我们学到的急救知识进行了帮助，在救护车到来后我们才离开。这次经历让我意识到急救是很实用的技术，我为能帮助他人而感到颇有成就感。

answers.title: 祖母
answers.content:
My grandmother was a very talkative and hospitable(健谈又好客) person who had a unique charm(独特魅力) that made anyone who visited her home feel that talking to her was not only interesting, but a pleasant experience. Thinking back on it, I have a vivid memory of one particular visit.

She was not only my grandmother, but a symbol of warmth and friendliness in our home. Her age never dimmed her spirit; on the contrary, it seemed to enrich her ability to connect with people(她的年龄从未削弱她的精神，相反，这似乎丰富了她与人沟通的能力). We last spoke in her cozy living room, a place that always feels more like a sanctuary of memories and warmth. The walls are covered with family photos and the scent of her cooking fills the air, creating an atmosphere that is both cozy and intimate.

During this particular visit, I sought her advice on using witty and humorous(风趣幽默) language to make guests feel welcome, much like she always did. She began by encouraging me to recall how she entertained relatives and friends, emphasizing the importance of personal touches like serving their favorite dishes or engaging in topics that sparked their interest.

She also delved into(探讨) stories of her own upbringing, a topic she was particularly fond of. Her tales were not just stories; they were lessons in life, hospitality, and the art of conversation. Listening to her, I realized how her experiences shaped her approach to making others feel at home.

As the conversation flowed, I felt a profound connection with her. Her words were not just advice; they were a legacy she was passing on. I left with a deep appreciation of her wisdom and a renewed desire to emulate her hospitality(离开时，我对她的智慧深表赞赏，并再次渴望效仿她的热情好客). The experience was enlightening(启发), leaving me with valuable insights into the art of making others feel welcome and the importance of preserving family traditions.
answers.summary: 祖母是一个健谈且热情好客的人，和她的谈话总是很有趣，每位造访她家的人都会感到很愉快。在一次我去她家拜访她的时候，向她请教了如何使用风趣幽默的语言让来来到家里的人感到宾至如归。她先让我我回忆了以前她是如何招待其他的亲戚朋友的，比如提供他们喜欢吃的食物或者聊他们感兴趣的话题。又跟我分享了她的成长经历，这是她总喜欢提到的事情。我从小就很喜欢听祖母说话，在多次聊天后感觉我们的关系更加亲近了，并也想成为热情好客的人。

answers.title: 美食派对
answers.content:
I’d like to talk about an interesting themed party (主题派对), where my classmate Jane and I cooked for all the other participants. It was in last year when I was just enrolled into (入学) university and found Jane and I shared the same hobby, which was cooking. Jane told me there would be a themed party held in the school café. The party featured local delicacies (当地美食) and encouraged participants to bring their own food and promoted the culture of their hometowns.

Since both of us come from Guangdong province, Jane and I hit it off (合得来) very soon. Therefore, she suggested that we take part in the party and cook Cantonese cuisine (美食) for others. I thought this was a wonderful opportunity to spread our food culture and make more friends, so I agreed.

At the party, we brought ingredients, borrowed cooking vessels and cooked steamed shrimp dumplings for other participants. Basically, I served as (担任) Jane's assistant because she excelled at cooking way more than I did. Jane really had a passion for cooking for others because she thought cooking demonstrates a person's love for life.

At last, our dumplings made a hit (大受欢迎) and we also had the chance to eat so many other local foods. Everyone highly appreciated our dumplings and said Jane’s cooking skills could be compared to a master chef’s. I felt so proud of ourselves that we took courage and showed our competencies. As a result, we made more friends.
answers.summary: 我想说的是一个有趣的美食party/同学Jane，她在party上和我一起现场展示厨艺。那是在去年，我刚刚进入大学，参加了一场为新生举办的party。我和Jane既是同学又是老乡，所以一起报名参加。那是一场美食主题的party，参与者被要求带上自己家乡的美食，现场还有机会自己做菜。Jane非常热爱烹饪，她认为烹饪能激发人们对生活的激情。在她的邀请下，我和Jane一起在现场为参与者们烹饪了我们家乡广东的特产蒸虾饺。大家都很爱吃，我也为我们的勇气感到自豪。

And explain why you admire him/her

answers.title: 向游泳教练Carl学习
answers.content:
I would like to talk about Carl, who guided me to learn swimming and led me to participate in a contest. (I would like to talk about my experience swimming and participating in a contest under the guidance of my coach Carl.) It was my freshman year (大一的那年) when I selected the swimming class held by Carl. Carl used to be a reputational swimmer in my hometown, and he was awarded a national award at the peak of his career (在事业的巅峰).

Carl became our sports teacher after his retirement from sports and the beginning of his educational career. He was very kind to me and encouraged me when I talked with him about my dream to participate in a swimming contest. He inspired me to pursue my dream no matter how many challenges were there in the future.

The practice was extremely difficult and consuming, but under Carl’s instruction and encouragement, I pulled myself together (振作起来) and actively prepared for a city-level swimming competition. Eventually, thanks to Carl's guidance and my persistence, I finally made it (做到了) and won the third award in the contest.

Although the prize was not so great compared with Carl’s achievement, I was still thrilled and proud of myself that I conquered the difficulties (克服困难) and pursued my dream. I appreciated Carl’s help and admired him a lot, for he nurtured great ambition in me and told me to never give up.
answers.summary: 我想分享我向游泳教练Carl学习，最终代表学校参加市级比赛的经历。那是在我大一的时候，我选了Carl的游泳选修课。他曾是一名我们当地有名的游泳运动员，还获得过国家级奖项。在Carl的感染下我决定努力锻炼游泳，但对我来说很难，因为要每天都训练至少两小时。但Carl对我很和蔼，用他自己的经历鼓励我坚持锻炼，最终在他的引导下，我夺得了市级三等奖的成绩。虽然奖项不大，但他带领我挑战自我，完成了一项困难的任务，让我对自己充满信心，因此我敬佩Carl。

answers.title: 化学邻域
answers.content:
I would like to learn about chemistry because my chemistry teacher Thomas is a very interesting person. Chemistry has been one of my favorite courses at school since I was enrolled in high school because Thomas can always come up with (想出) brilliant ideas to attract students to focus on class contents and be inspired by the magic of Chemistry.

Thomas cherished the principle of teaching through lively activities (寓教于乐). He used to take us into the lab and instruct us to conduct experiments by ourselves. In his spare time, he would also gather a bunch of (大量) science popularization (科普) videos to show us during classes. I like his way of educating students, because we can acquire more practical skills and build up our theoretical framework as well.

Influenced by him, I initiated a search for information on chemistry in my extracurricular time(课余时间). Through many investigations and explorations, I sincerely felt the wonder of chemical reactions and was inspired by the many uses of chemistry in our lives. I also actively involved myself in more science-related activities to absorb more knowledge of chemistry.

I think my decision to study chemistry was largely affected by Thomas. I thought his opinions were interesting because he encouraged his students to explore the world and define their fields of interest by themselves. His opinions broadened my horizon (打开我的视角) and made me more open-minded and able to pursue my own dreams.
answers.summary: 我想说的是化学领域，因为我的化学老师Thomas是个非常有趣的人。化学是我最喜欢的课程之一，因为Thomas总是能想出很多奇妙的点子，经常带我们进实验室，让我们亲手做实验，体会化学的乐趣。他也会在业余时间搜集一些有趣的化学科普视频给我们看，寓教于乐，让我们既学了知识又享受乐趣。受他影响，我在课后也会主动搜寻化学相关知识。Thomas的引导让我理解了化学反应的奇妙以及化学在我们生活中的诸多用途，我认为这些想法很有趣所以我想继续探索化学领域。

answers.title: 拍小孩子吃蛋糕
answers.content:
I would like to talk about a photo of a child eating cakes, which is used in my neighbor Jane’s advertisement. I’m interested in photography (摄影) and enjoy taking photos for my friends or relatives for fun. My neighbor Jane runs a family baking business inside her house. She would make custom cakes (定制蛋糕) for housewives and sold her cakes online.

Last month, Jane visited me to ask if I have any advice for her online shop’s advertisement. She couldn’t come up with (想出) any good idea. It came up to me (我想到) that Jane has a cute boy named Thomas, who can star in (出演) her advertisement. After Jane’s permission, I took photos of Thomas eating cakes with his hands at her house. It was so adorable that I watched this photo every day.

Luckily, after putting this photo on her online store, many housewives thought this picture was cute, and therefore booked custom cakes at Jane’s store. Jane gradually gained a reputation (收获名声) and boosted her revenue (收入上涨). Now she’s preparing to open a small bakery in our town.

I feel happy about Jane's success and wish her the best. I believe Jane’s success is not a coincidence. She keeps true to her dream and never gives up. She constantly seeks for more ways to improve the publicity of her online store. I’m glad that my picture makes her advertisement successful.
answers.summary: 我想说的是我拍的一张小孩子吃蛋糕的照片，这张照片还被用做我邻居Jane的宣传广告。我是个摄影爱好者，而我的邻居Jane在家里做烘焙蛋糕的生意，为家庭主妇们定制蛋糕。上个月，Jane邀请我为她的生意拍张照片作为她网店的广告，但是她没有想法。我觉得Jane六岁的儿子Thomas非常可爱，拍他吃蛋糕的照片应该会吸引很多顾客，Jane答应了。幸运的是，这条广告吸引了很多家庭主妇来订蛋糕，Jane的名声越来越大，已经在准备开自己的蛋糕店了。我为Jane开心，因为她坚持从各方面提升网店的名气，广告照片也要精挑细选。

answers.title: 大学同学的画
answers.content:
I would like to talk about Jane, who drew a painting about our college's campus. I have never met Jane, but I hope to see her and chat with (和某人聊天) her, because I believe we have a lot in common (有许多相似之处) and can become intimate friends (亲密的朋友).

I first saw Jane's painting when I enrolled in college and paid a visit with my classmates to the art gallery (美术馆) on campus. To our surprise, we found that there was one painting which was drawn by a graduate of our school, and that’s Jane. It was an oil painting that portrayed the beautiful autumn scenery of the campus. Her artwork had a dreamlike, tranquil quality.

At that time, I was mesmerized (被迷住) by her painting and was deeply impressed by her unique perspective to observe the campus. I could sense her affection for our school when I looked at her painting. Being a painting enthusiast myself, I believe Jane was able to find beauty in everything and embrace the wonderful moments.

From the introduction of the painting, we know that it was exhibited because it won the first prize in a national painting competition. I was interested in painting as well, so I wanted to talk to her and ask her some questions. I believe we can share our experiences with each other and become friends.
answers.summary: 我想说的是我们大学美术馆里的一幅画，它的作者是我的校友，名字叫Jane，但我从未见过。刚入学的时候，我和同学去美术馆里参观，惊讶地发现里面居然有一张学姐画的画。那是一幅风景油画，描绘了校园里秋天的美景，非常静谧优美。当时我就觉得很佩服她，并且因为她对母校的爱而对她印象深刻。我自己也是绘画爱好者，我认为Jane敏锐地发现了独特的观察校园的角度，她一定是个热爱生活热爱画画的人，我们会很聊得来，所以我很想认识她。

answers.title: 北京的奥林匹克公园
answers.content:
I would like to talk about my hometown Beijing. Among all the iconic constructions in Beijing, the Olympic Forest Park is the most impressive one. It’s located in the Chaoyang District in northern Beijing and covers a large area. Growing up in Beijing, one of my favorite leisure activities (休闲活动) is to go jogging at this park by myself, about once a week.

I love the diversity and sophistication of the Olympic Forest Park. It organically combines the tradition with the modern factors. In this park, you can find modern gyms and large digital screens showing the park's information. At the same time, there are also bunches of wide flowers, trees and exquisite pavilions (精致的亭台).

For me, the Olympic Forest Park represents Beijing very well, because they share the same feature, which is a combination of tradition and modernity. As the capital of China, Beijing has a profound history, great natural resources, and many modern buildings. You can see both natural parks like the Olympic Forest Park and skyscrapers (高楼大厦) in Beijing, which is one of the reasons why it is reputational around the country.

I love my hometown Beijing and the Olympic Forest Park, because of their diversified characteristics and because they serve as the landmarks of my country China. Besides, these places left me with so many childhood memories, so they will always hold a special place (占据特殊位置) in my heart.
answers.summary: 我想说的是我的家乡北京，其中令我最有意思的就是奥林匹克森林公园。我从小在北京读书，最喜欢的休闲活动就是一个人去奥森慢跑，大概每周就会去一次。奥森里既有现代感十足的运动馆和休息室，也有成群的树木和野花，非常漂亮。我认为北京也是这样的城市，既有丰富的自然资源又包含现代元素，有很多奥森这样的自然公园也有高楼大厦，这也是它全国知名的原因之一。这种多元化的特色让奥森和北京都具有独特的魅力。

answers.title: 家乡美食派对
answers.content:
I would like to talk about a special dinner party where I met with Jane. This party was held this April, and the participants included both Chinese students and international students in our college. Everyone was asked to bring cuisines (美食) with their hometowns’ features. Among all the participants, Jane left me with the deepest impression (印象深刻).

Jane is from Thailand and she studied in China as an international exchange student (交换生). However, she excelled at (擅长) Mandarin Chinese and spoke Chinese so well that even a native speaker (母语者) can’t tell unless see Jane in person. She brought her best work to all members, the traditional Thailand dessert called Luk Chup made by herself and taught me her special recipe to make curry.

I asked Jane how she spoke fluent Chinese. She told me that after coming to China, she became best friends with her landlord and learned many cooking recipes from her. Her landlord would also practice Chinese and help her improve her cooking as well. As a result, both her oral Chinese and cooking skills were greatly strengthened in China.

Jane said cooking made her glad because she could bring happiness to people around her. She would like to discover the joyfulness around her and spread it through delicacies. For me, this party was fantastic, because I got the chance to try so many different foods and also made a good friend like Jane.
answers.summary: 我想说的是我在大学时参加过的一个家乡美食派对。这个派对是在今年四月举行的，参加者有中国学生也有国际交换生，大家都带来了自己家乡的特色美食。所有参加者中，Jane给我留下了深刻的印象。她来自泰国，但是讲了一口流利的中文，达到几乎和母语者一致的程度。Jane说她向自己的房东阿姨学了很多烹饪方法，还和她练习中文，所以中文非常流利。她喜欢烹饪，因为和其他人分享让人感到快乐。总的来说，这场派对非常开心，因为我尝到了美食也交了个新朋友。

answers.title: 送电脑去维修
answers.content:
I would like to share with you my bad experience to repair my broken laptop (笔记本电脑). Last summer vacation, when I was finishing my essay at home and dashing to meet the deadline (赶上最后期限), suddenly, the screen went black. My laptop can’t power up (开机) anymore. I was very panicky because all my summer vacation homework and other essays were stored on my laptop. Without them, the result would be devastating (毁灭性的).

I almost jumped up and took my laptop to the nearest computer shop for repair. Though it was the nearest, it still took me about half an hour to get there. When I stood in the shop, short of breath (气喘吁吁), and asked for help, the technical man there checked my laptop in a careless way (漫不经心地), telling me that it needed one week to be repaired. If I wanted emergency services, I had to pay additional money.

At that time, I had no other choice but to listen to him. I paid extra money, but when I called him back several days later, I was told that all my data could not be restored and they would only return half of my money for their mistake. I was so furious that I argued with him for a long time on the phone and made my complaint (投诉) to his manager.

Eventually, I changed a store to repair my laptop and finally made it work. However, the whole activity was so tiring and wasted a lot of my money. I felt terrible and fooled.
answers.summary: 我想说的是我的电脑坏掉送去修的经历。去年暑假，我在家里用电脑写论文的时候，电脑突然黑屏并且再也启动不了了。我非常惊慌，因为我所有的作业和论文都存在电脑里。所以，我赶忙把电脑拿到店里去修，但店员和我说需要等一周才修好，如果紧急的话还要加钱。我没办法，只能多付了钱，并叮嘱他尽快修好给我。但是，几天后我忍不住打电话给店员，却被通知电脑数据都不能恢复，还只退一半的钱。我感到很失望很累，因为服务质量差，而且浪费我写论文的宝贵时间。最后我只好换另一家店去修。
