answers.title: 考法语证
answers.content:
I want to tell you about my experience that my friend Thomas and I passed a French language test after one year. (I would like to tell you the recommendation I gave to my friend Thomas to pass a French language test). It was last year’s summer vacation. After hard work and persistence (坚持不懈), we finally made it (做到了) this year's July in our hometown after a long wait.

The reason why we prepared for the test was our common appreciation of France and French cultures. Thomas and I were determined to (下决心) travel to France in 2023, and an idea came up to me (想到一个主意). Why didn’t we get a language certificate (证书)? Therefore, I suggested Thomas to join me and learn French together.

The process of learning French was daunting and hard, because the grammar and pronunciation of French were fairly complicated. However, we didn't give up on our love for the French culture and we finally passed the A2 test this July. Thomas thanked me for recommending him to take this test and he said this was the best experience he ever had, because this success greatly boosted his confidence.

The French certificate brought many good changes in my life as well. Now I can talk to some of the French students in our college and I can understand French dramas better. I feel very satisfied with myself because I proved my outstanding learning capacity to learn a foreign language from scratch, and I led my friend to improve himself.
answers.summary: 我想说的是准备一年拿到法语证书的经历/建议朋友Thomas考法语证的经历。在我的建议下，我们从去年暑假开始一起准备证书，终于在今年七月成功通过。我和朋友Thomas很喜欢法国，想有机会去法国旅游。当时我冒出一个想法，既然决定要去，为什么不练习一下法语呢？于是我建议Thomas和我一起开始业余时间学习法语。学习过程是艰辛又漫长的，因为法语的语法和发音都很复杂，需要反复练习。但是我们凭借自己对法国文化的热爱坚持了下来，终于在今年七月拿到了A2的证书。

answers.title: jane教我学习
answers.content:
I would like to talk about my classmate Jane, who told me that practice makes perfect. Jane is a high school classmate of mine, and we are also intimate friends (亲密好友). Jane excels at (擅长) studying and always ranks among the top in our school.

When preparing for the College Entrance Examination (高考), I asked Jane if there were some rules or principles I could follow to improve my studies. She told me that the only way to succeed was to practice a lot. She told me that she would do extra practice tests every day besides homework. She also told me that you cannot master a skill if you don't accumulate a certain amount of practice.

Inspired by her, I invited her to come to my home after class to do homework and bought the same workbook to improve my studies. As a result, my score gradually increased as I kept doing extra practice after finishing my homework as Jane did. I used to think only dense (愚钝的) students would increase their grades by doing a lot of practice tests. However, after that, I knew I was wrong. Practice is important.

Now, Jane and I have graduated from college and she started her own business successfully. I appreciate her hard work and the rules she told me. It’s wise of her to realize there is no shortcut in our lives, so I’m very thankful for her advice.
answers.summary: 我想说的是我的同学Jane，她教会我实践才能成功。我和Jane是高中同学，她非常优秀，总在年级名列前茅。我向她请教学习好的秘诀，她告诉我唯一的办法就是多练。她和我说自己每晚回家都会额外做几道练习题，巩固自己的知识。如果不练的话，哪怕智商再高都没办法充分掌握学习方法。我向她学习，邀请她放学来我家写作业，和她买了一样的练习册，最终我的成绩也提高了。我认为Jane的经验很有用，以前我总觉得自己掌握了做法，但题目变化后就不会做了，向Jane学习后，我的成绩也提高了。现在我非常感谢她。

answers.title: 博物馆的讲解员
answers.content:
Being a museum docent (讲解员) is a fascinating job that would allow me to make a meaningful impact on people's lives.

Last year, I visited a museum in another city and was amazed by the diverse exhibits as soon as I walked through the doors. A docent approached me and voluntarily shared insights about the artifacts, instantly enlightening me about their significance. He explained that, as a docent, he takes pride in promoting local art and culture while continuously learning. Effective communication and social skills are crucial for this role. Since that encounter, I have nurtured a strong desire to become a museum docent, as I too want to be an advocate for my own culture.

Being a docent means more than just relaying information to visitors. It entails (包含) fostering a deeper understanding and appreciation for art, history and cultural heritage. Through engaging conversations and interactive presentations, I can help individuals connect with the exhibits on a personal level. Guiding them through the museum's halls, I can spark curiosity and ignite a passion (点燃热情) for learning.

Furthermore, the role of a docent provides a platform to contribute to society by preserving and showcasing our shared human experiences. By instilling a sense of pride in local arts and culture, I can actively promote cultural diversity and foster a sense of unity among people from various backgrounds.

Becoming a museum docent requires continuous learning and dedication. I am eager to enhance my knowledge, refine my communication skills, and immerse myself in the captivating world of art and history. Being able to inspire others and contribute to the preservation and dissemination (传播) of cultural heritage would bring me immense fulfillment and joy.
answers.summary:
我觉得做博物馆的讲解员是一个非常有趣的工作，因为这份工作可以帮到许多人。
去年我去另一个城市的博物馆，我一进门就被各种展品给惊讶到了。这时候一位讲解员走了过来，主动向我介绍一些展品，我一下子就明白了很多展品的含义。并且他告诉我，作为讲解员，他觉得能够帮助宣传当地艺术文化是件非常自豪的事情，也可以学到很多东西，但需要拥有很好的沟通能力和社交能力。从此之后我就一直想做博物馆讲解员，因为我也想做自己文化的宣传者。

answers.title: 买房
answers.content:
If I have accumulated (积攒) a substantial amount (大量的) of savings, I would love to purchase the perfect house for my parents as a gift to improve their living standards.

Ideally, I envision (想象) a beachfront property for my mom and dad, as they have always cherished the serenity (宁静) of the sea. I picture a house with three bedrooms, including two cozy sleeping quarters and a dedicated study area, perfect for my mom's love for books. Additionally, an open-plan (开放式的) kitchen would be ideal, catering to my dad's passion for culinary arts (烹饪艺术). Providing them with a tranquil and comfortable living space would be an ideal gift, allowing them to enjoy life to the fullest.

However, I am well aware that buying a house requires a considerable financial commitment. Realistically, I estimate that it may take me over a decade of unwavering dedication and hard work to amass the necessary funds.

Nevertheless, I am determined to strive for success, devoting myself wholeheartedly to my career and diligently saving money. The prospect of witnessing the joy on my parents' faces, and knowing that I have positively influenced their lives, motivates me to persevere through any challenges that may arise. Though it may be a long and arduous journey, the fulfillment of being able to provide my parents with a secure and comfortable home would make every sacrifice worthwhile.
answers.summary:
如果我存了很多钱，我希望给我爸爸妈妈买一个房子做礼物，因为我想改善他们的生活状况。
我希望在海边给我的爸爸妈妈买房子，因为他们很喜欢海景。理想的话，这个房子应该是有3个房间，两个卧室，一个书房，因为我妈妈非常喜欢看书。我还想要一个开放式厨房，因为我爸爸喜欢做饭。我觉得如果可以让我爸爸妈妈享受生活，这个房子就是最理想的。
但我知道买房子需要花很多钱，所以我估计我要努力工作十几年才能达成愿望。

answers.title: 冲浪
answers.content:
I've always been fascinated by watching surfing performances, and it's a sport I aspire to try in the future.

Surfing is an incredibly exhilarating activity that requires a high level of physical fitness and skill. The first time I witnessed a surfing performance on TV was when my mom introduced it to me, and I was immediately drawn to its captivating (吸引人的) nature. The surfers' display of courage and determination resonated (产生共鸣) deeply with me. Inspired by their fearless approach, I have made up my mind to embark on a surfing journey this upcoming summer.

Although I am not particularly active in my day-to-day life, I am determined to challenge myself and step out of my comfort zone. I plan to seek out a skilled coach at a nearby beach and begin my surfing lessons. I understand that learning to surf will not be an easy feat, especially for a beginner like me. It will require consistent effort, perseverance, and the willingness to face and overcome any fears or setbacks that may arise.

Taking up surfing is not only about learning a new sport but also about embracing personal growth and testing my limits. I anticipate that it will be a thrilling adventure filled with excitement and perhaps a few wipeouts (彻底失败). Nevertheless, I am excited to immerse myself in the world of surfing, connect with the ocean, and experience the unique sense of freedom and joy that it brings.

By venturing into (敢于去) this new sport, I hope to challenge myself physically, mentally and emotionally while also gaining a deeper appreciation for the beauty and power of the ocean. Surfing represents an opportunity for self-discovery, personal transformation (个人转变), and the pursuit of my passions. I can't wait to ride those waves and embrace the thrill of surfing firsthand.
answers.summary:
我一直很喜欢看冲浪表演，这也是我将来想要尝试的运动。
冲浪表演是非常刺激的一项运动，对体能要求很高。我第一次看的时候是我妈妈介绍给我的，我一看就被吸引住了。我觉得其中运动员体现出来的勇气很打动人。我打算今年夏天去海边找一位教练尝试一下。我觉得这将是一个很大的挑战，因为我平时不运动。但我非常想挑战自己。

answers.title: 春节穿新衣服
answers.content:
During the Spring Festival in our hometown, we all wear new red clothes and gather in the town square on New Year's Eve to watch fireworks. Last year, I had a tailor make a custom red velvet coat for the occasion. It was exquisite, and though I knew I might only wear it once, I was thrilled. At midnight, my family and I gathered on the square, exchanging greetings and well wishes. Then, we watched a spectacular (非常惊艳的) firework show.

The vibrant bursts (活力四射) of color against the night sky filled the air with joy and excitement. Laughter and cheers echoed as the fireworks soared higher, creating intricate (精美的) patterns and cascading (层层下落的) sparks. We stood together, united in celebration, marveling at the beauty unfolding before us.

After the show, we returned home, carrying the joy and blessings of the New Year. The red clothes symbolized good luck, and the fireworks marked a joyful start to the Spring Festival. It was a time of reunion, reflection and hope.

The Spring Festival is a time to honor our cultural heritage and strengthen family bonds. Each year, we come together, embracing traditions that have been passed down through generations. The memories of that Spring Festival, with its vibrant red colors, dazzling fireworks, and the warmth of family, hold a special place in my heart. It is a time when our community unites, celebrating our shared customs and creating lasting memories.
answers.summary:
在春节的时候，我们老家会要求大家穿上红色的新衣服，然后在除夕夜一起聚集在广场上看烟花表演。
每年我们都会做同样的事情，但我一直非常喜欢。去年我在老家当地的裁缝店量身定做了一套非常精致的红色外套，是红丝绒的质地，剪裁很时尚。虽然我知道也许今年只会穿这一次，但我还是很激动。在晚上快要12点的时候，我和家里所有人都聚集在广场上，互相问好，祝愿对方新年快乐，然后看了一场非常精彩的烟花秀。

answers.title: 申请打工度假签证
answers.content:
A few months ago, I made a significant decision to apply for a working holiday visa and fly to Australia to experience Western culture. Hopefully, next year I can go to Melbourne, find a job, and immerse myself in (沉浸于) the lives of the locals. I believe I will thoroughly enjoy the feeling of independence.

The reason behind my decision was my continuous English language studies, which had sparked my interest (点燃我的兴趣) in English-speaking countries. However, for over twenty years, I had never had the opportunity to truly experience such a life. I decided to challenge myself to venture into (敢于去) an unfamiliar place to see how I will survive. I believe this experience will allow me to embrace different cultures and broaden my horizons.

I have not got the visa yet but I guess it will happen soon. Thinking of the city of Melbourne, I am already filled with a mix of excitement and nervousness (又兴奋又紧张). Everything will be new and unfamiliar, from the streets to the people. I also understand that communication will be key to navigating a foreign environment. I wish that as I interact with locals, I will practice my English skills and gradually gain confidence in expressing myself.

Undoubtedly, finding a job will be both challenging and rewarding. It will require persistence and adaptability (适应性), as I will have to adjust to a different work culture and learn new skills. However, I believe I can overcome the challenge, and if I get a job there, I will feel a great sense of accomplishment in being able to support myself in a foreign country.

I think living in Melbourne will expose me to a vibrant and multicultural city. I am planning to try different cuisines, attend cultural events, and make friends from various backgrounds. I strongly believe that it will be an enriching experience that has the power to shape my perspective and help me foster personal growth (个人成长).
answers.summary:
在几个月前，我做了一个非常重要的决定，那就是申请打工度假签证，飞到澳大利亚体验一段时间。我希望可以一个人去墨尔本，在当地找一份工作，然后体验当地人的生活。
我之所以做这个决定是因为我一直学习英文，所以对英语国家很感兴趣，但我过去二十多年一直没有机会去真正体验这样的生活。我决定给自己一个挑战，到一个陌生的地方看自己如何生存下来。我觉得这段体验可以让我感受不同文化，开拓我的视野。

answers.title: 日本手工艺品店
answers.content:
A few weeks ago, a Japanese family moved into our neighborhood, and because I had been to Japan before, we quickly became friends. They told us that they had moved here because they were interested in Chinese culture. Later, they opened a small shop in their home, selling handmade Japanese crafts.

Their home had a unique charm (独特吸引力), combining elements of Japanese and Chinese styles. As soon as you entered, you could smell the fragrance of cherry blossoms. Their belongings were neatly arranged, creating a pleasant atmosphere. It attracted many young people to visit frequently. One time, I came across a particularly special cup, and they told me that the pattern on it held great significance (有特殊意义) in Japan. Their presence in our neighborhood allowed me to learn about the diversity of world cultures. I was grateful for the different cultural experiences they brought to us.

Through conversations and spending time together, I had the opportunity to share my experiences in Japan and learn more about their traditions, customs and values. We would often exchange stories and compare the similarities and differences between Chinese and Japanese cultures. It was a beautiful exchange of knowledge and appreciation.

Moreover, their small shop became increasingly popular among both local residents and visitors, fostering (营造) a sense of community and cultural exchange. They organized events where people could learn about Japanese arts, crafts and even experience traditional Japanese tea ceremonies. It was a wonderful opportunity for everyone to immerse themselves in (沉浸于) a different cultural environment.

The friendship and cultural exchange with our new Japanese neighbors enriched my life and broadened my perspective. It reminded me of the beauty of diversity and the importance of embracing different cultures. I am grateful for the connections formed and the shared experiences that continue to inspire me to explore and appreciate the world's cultural richness.
answers.summary:
几周前我们家附近搬来了一家日本人，因为他们对中国文化很感兴趣，他们就在家里开了一个小店，售卖小的日本手工艺品。
他家非常有特色，是日本和中国风的结合。一进门还可以闻到樱花的香味。他们的东西摆放非常整齐，让人很舒服。经常会有很多年轻人去那里。我觉得他们来到我们家附近，让我了解了世界文化的多样性。我非常感激他们给我们带来不同的文化体验。

answers.title: 带侄子看电影
answers.content:
I would like to talk about a time when I took my nephew to watch a film, which turned out to be slightly disappointing.

One time, my uncle needed to go to work and he couldn’t leave his child unattended (无人照看), so I decided to take him to the movies. Little did I know (没想到) that the movie would be a huge disappointment.

As soon as my nephew arrived at my house, he excitedly informed me about a recent children's movie he wanted to see. When I saw that it was a science fiction film, which I personally find interesting, I bought the tickets immediately. However, as we watched the movie, I found it incredibly boring due to its clichéd storyline (老套的情节). Despite my disappointment, my nephew thoroughly enjoyed it, and seeing him happy brought me joy as well.

The movie failed to captivate (使……着迷) us with its predictable plot and uninspiring characters. The visual effects and action sequences that initially intrigued us turned out to be lackluster (无趣的). It was disheartening to realize that the film did not meet our expectations, especially since I had hoped it would be an enjoyable experience for both of us.

Nevertheless, witnessing the sheer delight on my nephew's face reminded me of the magic of childhood innocence. His enthusiasm and genuine enjoyment of the movie reminded me that sometimes it's not about the quality of the film itself, but rather the joy and wonder it can bring to a young mind. Despite my personal disappointment, I chose to focus on the happiness my nephew derived from the experience.

In the end, it was a valuable lesson in putting others' happiness before our own preferences. Sometimes, our expectations may not align with reality, but finding joy in the happiness of those we care about can outweigh (比……更重要) any personal disappointment we might feel. It served as a reminder that the true value of an experience lies in the connections we forge and the moments we share with our loved ones.
answers.summary:
有一次我叔叔把他的孩子送到我家拜托我照顾，于是我决定带他去看电影，没想到电影非常让人失望。
我侄子一到我家就告诉我最近有一部给小朋友的电影他想看，我看到是一部科幻题材电影，我自己本身也很感兴趣，于是就决定跟他一起去看。没想到我们看着看着就觉得非常无聊，因为情节非常老套。但我侄子非常喜欢，所以我虽然很失望，但看到他开心我也很高兴。

answers.title: 过家家
answers.content:
When I was a child, I used to play "house", which was a game that had a significant impact on me.

Playing "house" involved a group of children pretending to be a family, assuming different roles (扮演不同角色) within the household. I would usually play with the kid next door after school, and we would take turns hosting the game at her house and mine. I found this game incredibly enjoyable because my playmate and I would often imagine dramatic scenarios and then act out how our parents would react. Looking back, I realize that this game was meaningful because it taught me to consider other perspectives and helped develop my language skills.

In the game, we would take on various roles, such as parents, siblings, or even family pets. We would mimic (模仿) daily activities, such as cooking meals, doing household chores, and even going on imaginary vacations. Through this pretend play, I learned to empathize with different family members and understand their responsibilities and emotions.

The game also provided a platform for imaginative storytelling. We would create elaborate (详细的) narratives and engage in dialogue, enhancing our language abilities as we communicated and expressed ourselves within the context of the game. We learned to articulate our thoughts, negotiate roles, and collaborate with each other.

Playing "house" fostered creativity, social skills, and problem-solving abilities. It encouraged us to work together, resolve conflicts, and develop a sense of responsibility. It was a safe space where we could explore the dynamics of a family and learn about relationships and interpersonal interactions.

Looking back, I appreciate how playing "house" shaped my childhood. It was a game that allowed me to step into different shoes, encouraged my imagination, and provided a foundation for communication and understanding. The skills I developed through this game continue to influence my interactions and perspectives to this day.
answers.summary:
我小时候经常玩过家家，这是对我来说影响很大的一个游戏。
过家家就是几个小朋友假装是一家人，扮演家庭里的不同角色。我一般是和我邻居的小孩一起玩，我们通常会在她家或者我家玩。我觉得这个游戏非常有趣，因为我和我的伙伴经常假装发生了一些很戏剧性的事情，然后我们会模仿我们的家长如何反应。现在想来我觉得这是个很有意义的游戏，因为它教会了我换位思考，以及锻炼了我的语言能力。

answers.title: apple watch
answers.content:
Last year, I purchased an Apple Watch, and after using it for a year, I found it to be incredibly practical. In fact, during a presentation organized by my class/company on "Technology and Life" I recommended it to my classmates/colleagues.

Unlike traditional watches, the Apple Watch not only tells the time but also motivates me to exercise and tracks my fitness activities. It is user-friendly (使用方便), with clear and simple instructions. Every time I exercise, I can monitor my heart rate, ensuring that I do not overexert (过度运动) myself. And when I become a bit lazy, my watch reminds me to get moving. All of these features have been immensely helpful in maintaining a healthy lifestyle.

I wanted those around me to embrace a healthy lifestyle as well, so when I was asked to give a speech in front of everyone, I decided to talk about my Apple Watch and recommended it to everyone. To my surprise, many people actually went out and bought one, which made me quite pleased. Now, almost everyone I know has one.

My Apple Watch has seamlessly integrated into (无缝融入) my daily routine, assisting me in staying active and focused on my fitness goals. Its ability to track my exercise progress and provide timely reminders has been a game-changer in terms of maintaining a healthy lifestyle. Moreover, it offers various other features like notifications, music streaming and even the ability to answer calls, making it a versatile (多功能) and indispensable (不可或缺) device.

Overall, the Apple Watch has proven to be an excellent invention for me, enhancing my overall well-being. Its impact on those around me has been equally positive, as many have followed suit and adopted this remarkable technology. I am delighted to have made such a positive impact on their lives and to witness the positive changes it has brought about.
answers.summary:
我去年买了一块apple watch，在使用了一年之后我觉得它非常实用，甚至在一次关于“科技”的演讲中，我把它推荐给了我的同学/同事。
与传统手表不同的是，apple watch可以督促我运动，并且记录我的运动状态。塔使用起来很容易，指示很简单清晰。我每次运动都可以看到我的心跳，所以可以保证我没有过度运动。在我比较懒的时候，我的手表会提醒我做运动。这一切都对我健康生活非常有帮助。我很想我身边的人也拥有健康生活，于是在一次演讲中推荐给了大家。令我惊讶的是，很多人真的去买了，我觉得很高兴。

answers.title: 莎士比亚
answers.content:
Well, I guess the person/book I would like to talk about is Shakespeare/a book about Shakespeare.

On my birthday five years ago, a friend gave me a very thorough biography of Shakespeare, which turned out to be a fascinating read (很棒的读物). I had known about Shakespeare long before in my English class, and after receiving the gift, I delved into (深入) its content repeatedly. From that point on, my interest in Shakespeare grew exponentially (越来越快地).

The book primarily focused on Shakespeare's personal experiences and his literary works. It revealed that even before gaining fame, he had a profound love (深厚地热爱) for writing and possessed an innovative spirit (创新精神). Prior to reading this book, I had only known him as a renowned figure, but it opened my eyes to his accomplishments in linguistics and philosophy as well. This newfound knowledge left me deeply impressed.

Since learning about Shakespeare, I developed a strong fascination with British literature, prompting me (鼓励我) to dive into reading exclusively in English. It was as if a whole new world had opened up to me, rich with intricate tales and masterful storytelling.

The biography not only broadened my understanding of Shakespeare's life but also inspired me to explore the depths of English literature. Through his works, I discovered the power of language to capture the complexities of human emotions and the profound philosophical insights that can be conveyed through storytelling.

To this day, that birthday gift remains a cherished possession, serving as a constant reminder of the transformative power of literature. It ignited a passion within me that continues to shape my reading choices and expand my horizons.
answers.summary:
在我5年前生日的时候朋友送了我一本莎士比亚的传记，里面的内容非常有趣，我反复读了很多遍，从此变得对他很感兴趣。
书中主要讲莎士比亚的个人经历以及其文学作品。书中说他在出名前就非常喜欢写作，并且很有创新精神。之前我只知道他非常有名，但这本书让我了解到他在语言学和哲学上也有很多的成就，这让我觉得非常佩服。自从了解他之后，我也对英国文学产生了很浓厚的兴趣，并且开始了全英文阅读。

answers.title: 去乡下
answers.content:
I would like to share with you a trip I had to the countryside.

One fine day, my friend and I embarked on (开始) a countryside road trip by car, eager to explore the hidden gems that awaited us. Little did we know that our journey would take an unexpected turn as we found ourselves lost due to the inaccurate information we had found online.

Enthralled by tales of the charming and unique villages, we yearned to experience their allure firsthand. Prior to our departure, we diligently researched a renowned local attraction, aiming to make it the highlight of our trip.

Yet, as the miles rolled on and the scenery unfolded (随着我们渐行渐远) before us, our excitement gradually transformed into increasing confusion. Despite our tireless efforts, the elusive destination remained beyond our grasp (无法触及).

Eventually, we turned to the wisdom of the local residents. To our astonishment, they told us that the landscape had undergone a transformation – new roads had emerged and the old routes were now blocked.

Embracing the hospitality (热情好客) and warmth of the locals, we continued our exploration under their guidance. After around 40 minutes, we finally reached the destination that had eluded us for so long. The time and effort expended seemed trivial in light of the meaningful connections we forged (创造) and the unforeseen adventures we encountered.

In the end, our misadventure served as a testament (证明) to the unpredictable nature of exploration and the invaluable role of human interaction. It reminded us that while technology offers guidance, true discovery often lies in the hands of those who call a place home. And though we may have lost our way, we discovered something far greater – a deeper connection with the land, its people, and the joy of venturing into the unknown.
answers.summary:
有一次我和我的朋友决定自驾游去乡下玩，没想到在旅途中迷了路，因为网上提供的信息不够准确。
我和我的朋友听说这里的村子很有特色，于是想自己开车过去玩。在出发之前我们在网上查询了一个非常著名的景点，结果我们按着网友建议的路线一路寻找，一直没找到。后来我们问了当地居民，才知道这边新修了一条路，原来的路已经被封了。最后我们在居民的帮助下，终于找到了那个地方。虽然花了很多时间，但我们还是觉得很有趣。

answers.title: 邻居好朋友病愈
answers.content:
I have known my neighbor Mike for many years, and we always invite each other to our houses as a guest. The more I contact him, the more I know him. He is now over 70 years old, and despite the huge generation gap(代沟), he is one of my best friends. After graduating from university, Mike started his career in a multinational company(跨国公司). After working as a financial specialist(财政专员) for decades, he decided to set up his own company, and finally retired several years ago.

Due to his rich experience of studying and working, he is always my go-to person. I usually visit his house for help when I come across bottlenecks(瓶颈). Currently, I am confused about my major selection and future path, and he always give me the right direction based on his rich experience. It is also worth noting that he is patient and gentle no matter what happens, he will always be my loyal company.

However, it was devastating(惊人的) that he got cancer several years ago. However, compared with my worries, he was optimistic about it, and he told me confidently that he would overcome this illness. Recently, I went to the hospital with him for diagnosis, but the result was surprising and cheering; Mike finally beat cancer! I was amazed by Mike’s spirit and optimism(乐观) towards illness and difficulties. That’s why he is one of the most admirable people to me.
answers.summary: Mike是我的邻居，他现在已经70多岁了，虽然我们又巨大的年龄差，但他是我最好的朋友，他常常会在我遇到困难的时候给予帮助。但是他几年前被诊断出了癌症，我当时十分为他担心，但他却一直保持的乐观，最近我陪他去医院诊断，但结果出人意料，他竟然战胜了病魔，他的精神和对待困难的态度也是我欣赏崇拜他的原因。

answers.title: 第一天上小学迟到
answers.content:
The first day at my primary school left the deepest impression on me. My primary school was not near our apartment, and usually it would take about 30 minutes to get there. However, on the first day, I was late since we got stuck in some heavy traffic, and I was criticized by my teacher, which was quite a bad experience(糟糕的经历).

If my memory is correct, my dad and I got up and left home early, but we mistakenly chose to take a taxi over using the subway, since we thought it would be the fastest way to get there. However, soon after entering the taxi, we found ourselves in a bumper-to-bumper jam(堵车) and the traffic moved at a snail’s pace(如乌龟一般爬行). We were very frustrated, since it was impossible for us to do anything about it, and the only thing we could do was to wait in the taxi. Eventually we arrived at school, but I was late for my first day and I even missed the whole welcome meeting held by the headmaster. The moment I got into the classroom, all my classmates were staring at me, which was really embarrassing. What’s more, my teacher also warned me not to be late next time.

From the experience, I learned a lesson, which is to use the underground metro to avoid inner city traffic congestion.
answers.summary:
小学第一天因选择打车而遭遇严重堵车，导致迟到并错过校长的新生欢迎会。当全班同学盯着迟到的我时，场面十分尴尬，老师还警告下次不许迟到。这次经历让我明白：在市区出行应优先选择地铁，才能避免交通拥堵。

answers.title: 明朝
answers.content:
I love reading history books, which gives me a chance to throw my mind back to ancient times. I take great interest in the history of the Ming dynasty in China, which dates from 1368AD to 1633 AD. During the over two hundred years of rule, there were many cultural treasures(文化珍宝) that spread across the world. I especially love the horse face skirt that first went viral(流行) during the Ming dynasty in China. At that time, people in different classes were required to wear those skirts in different fabrics(面料) accordingly. For example, noblewomen(贵族) could wear skirts made of silk while poor women could not, or, more specifically, they couldn’t afford them. From my perspective, clothes show the climate, fashion trends, and people’s aesthetic(审美) during a certain time, so I would like to know more about horse face skirts.

Recently, this kind of skirt has become fashionable again, many young ladies wear them to either show their good body shape or show pride e in Chinese traditional culture. Many brands and stores began to sell such skirts. Last month I received a pop advertisement(弹窗广告) where a beautiful girl wore a horse face skirt with a unique pattern. I was attracted by the picture so I bought one from that online store. However, I felt upset upon receiving the package. The skirt was nothing like the picture in the advertisement. Both the fabric and artwork were terrible. Having been annoyed, I complained about the terrible product with the customer service on Taobao, the largest online shopping mall in China. To my satisfaction, the service dealt with my complaint very soon, they not only returned the money to me but also gave a warning to that store. I was relieved because that meant other consumers might not face the same problem as me. To be honest, I don’t like such unreal(不真实的) advertisements, because they mislead people to spend money on things that they might not need..
answers.summary: 我对中国明朝的历史有浓厚的兴趣，明朝从公元1368年到1633年，长达200多年的统治，诞生了很多文化瑰宝。马面裙就是从明朝开始流行开来的，从去年开始马面裙再次流行了起来，这样的服装风格也代表了很多明朝当时的生活，所以我想对此了解更多。但是也正因为马面裙再度爆火，上个月淘宝给我推送了一个广告，点开链接就是马面裙，这个广告里图片拍摄地很精美，但当我买回来以后才发现实物和图片严重不符。所以我向淘宝客服投诉了这家商店，淘宝第一时间帮我处理了，并且及时退货退款，也对商家作出了警示。这个投诉处理让我很满意，

answers.title: 想和朋友一起学开车
answers.content:
I am determined to(下定决心做…) get my driving license by the end of the year because driving has become a basic skill for almost everyone in recent years. In the past, I spent almost every holiday traveling and hanging around, so I still couldn’t drive after my graduation from college, which brought me a lot of inconveniences(不便之处). Therefore, my friend Eva and I are planning to take the driving license test at the driving training center.

However, it is not easy to pass the test because it includes four courses. We have to schedule an appointment(预约) ten days in advance for each course. Only after learning the theory and getting to know the main parts of the car, could we take the exam. We will be required to stay at the training center for at least three hours a day to make sure we have enough credits(学时).

Eva and I have known each other since kindergarten, and we have been intimate(亲密的) friends for about twenty years. We have done many things together such as traveling, learning English, and so forth. Eva is a self-disciplined(自律的) person while I am lazy sometimes. So, I would like to learn to drive with her, too. We run in the gym every night, and Eva has kept me company for two years. This good habit helps me get into good sleeping habits and improves my sleep quality. However, the gym is far from where we live, so it takes us a long time to wait for the bus. Hopefully, we can pass the driving test very soon, and then the distance will not be a problem anymore.
answers.summary: 今年年底之前我一定要学会的一项技能就是开车，这次我打算约上最好的朋友Eva一起报名驾校，在驾校里学车可不是一件轻松的事情，因为要打卡坚持练习并且通过四科考试才能顺利拿到驾驶证。我和Eva从幼儿园时期就在一个班，我们已经认识快二十年了，我们一起做了很多事情，她是个非常自律的人，而我有时候会偷懒，所以有她的监督我才能坚持到驾校去学车。我和Eva现在每天都要到体育馆去跑步，这个习惯已经坚持快两年了，每次夜跑结束我们都感觉非常放松，睡眠质量也提高了。

answers.title: 在生日收到麦克风
answers.content: On my birthday this year, I got a gift from one of my best friends, Anna. It is a wireless Bluetooth machine for karaoke singing and allows me to play pre-recorded(录制好的) music I can sing along to. I have wanted it so much because singing karaoke is a physical activity I've enjoyed since I was a child. Notably, karaoke’s image had shifted from that of a schlocky(低俗) activity laced with(充满) irony to a heartfelt event that permeated(随处可见) city nightlife in China. While watching a film or the TV with family and friends is good entertainment, karaoke is better because I can sing my heart out(随心歌唱), perform duets, and maybe even add dance moves. For me, it has become a place where I can put my own spin on my favorite songs to become a part of the art I love. Yet, admittedly, I am not a good singer. That's why I'm too scared to sing in front of others. Luckily, having a karaoke machine at home with easy access(随时使用) for whenever I want to get it out means I can practice singing regularly. After months of practice, I overcame my singing shyness and feel proud of myself. The laughter and singing that takes place with the help of the karaoke machine have led to lasting memories of having a good time with my loved ones. Karaoke is also an excellent platform for making new friends and creating relationships on a mutual love of singing as, it has been found by researchers that singing is good at bonding(变亲密) people who don’t know each other very well.
answers.summary: 我在今年过生日的时候收到了朋友的礼物，是一个家用麦克风。我很早之前就想要一个麦克风，因为从小就很喜欢唱歌，但因为唱歌容易跑调、且缺乏练习，很少有在人前表演的机会。有了家用麦克风后，我利用闲暇时间坚持练习，唱歌渐入佳境，我对自己的进步感到很骄傲。平时还可以请朋友来家唱歌，别提多有趣了。

answers.title: 在朋友生日会上遇到摄影师
answers.content:
I have been obsessed with(痴迷于) photography for several years and I just bought a new Single-lens-reflex(单反) last year. My friend invited me to go to his brother's birthday party in a hotel last summer because his brother was also a photographer. To my great delight , I could now know another excellent photographer who had been working for over 10 years. We had dinner together that night where I learned some important skills on how to shoot from various angles. After a short introduction, he showed me how to adjust the parameters(调节参数) to adapt to different distances. Listening to his words was better than 10 years of self-teaching. So that party and dinner were extremely unusual for me.

I felt even more excited after learning that he used to participate in the shooting for a TV program that my favorite actress Liu Yifei presented(出席) too. She is one of the most famous young actresses in China now. She has been given the moniker(外号) ‘Fairy Sister’ due to her ethereal(神圣的) and purified(纯净的) appearance. She is also pale and slim, which makes her look just like her English name ‘Crystal’. She starred in the movie named Hua Mulan which gained her good fame and popularity in both China and America. Hua Mulan was also the character that I liked most because she was brave enough to battle in the war. I like her not only because of her good performance in movies but also because of her attitude towards life. Although she is so charming in appearance, she still keeps learning new skills and takes every shoot seriously.
answers.summary: 摄影是我的一项业余爱好，去年夏天，我和好朋友一起参加他哥哥的生日聚会，有幸认识了一位非常棒的摄影师，聚会上我们坐在一起吃饭，简单介绍自己后我向他请教了几个摄影方面的问题，他给我提供了非常有价值的技术参考，还告诉我如何调节相机的参数，但当得知他曾经参与过一档节目的拍摄时，我更是万分激动，因为我最喜欢的演员刘亦菲也参加过那个节目，刘亦菲是出了名的好看，她皮肤白皙，身材高挑，五官精致，出演过很多电视剧和电影我非常喜欢她。

answers.title: 小米商城买的扫地机器人
answers.content:
The evolution(演化、发展) of smart homes has brought many technology products into our life. Last month, one of my friends recommended that I should have a look at Xiaomi's online store website. I logged in and found many practical things among which was a robot cleaner I was interested in. Comparing the price and properties(性能) with other stores, I decided to buy one to help me clean the floor on this website. Now I look through the website almost every week to check if there is something useful.

To be frank, I found it hard to operate the robot cleaner when I first used it. I got it last month and I read the instructions carefully but it still didn't work. After asking the customer service for help, I knew there was a spare part(零件) missing. I managed to fix it according to the instructions. It worked smoothly(顺利的、平滑地) and I found it facilitated many matters(省了很多事). Now I use it almost every day.

So, I bought another one for my granny last week. She showed great interest in it, so I taught her how to use it step by step. Then I recorded a short video to show the operation in case she might forget. Yesterday I heard from my mom that my granny could use the robot cleaner very well. I felt relieved(欣慰的) about that because it helped her with housework.
answers.summary: 智能化的家居真的可以给生活增添很多幸福，我朋友推荐我到小米商城的网站去看看，我上个月买了一个扫地机器人用来打扫卫生，但说实话，我第一次使用扫地机器人的时候却遇到了麻烦，我按照说明书操作了但是它就是不动，跟客服沟通后发现是由于一个零件没有组装好，我按照说明安装好以后发现它真的很实用。上周我又给奶奶家买了一个，收到货检查无误后我边手把手教奶奶去用，还告诉她如果卡主了该怎么处理，奶奶学的非常认真，昨天打电话告诉我她已经可以熟练地使用了，我觉得很开心，这也算我给奶奶分担了一些力所能及的事情。

answers.title: 家附近的公园
answers.content:
In the past two years, great changes have taken place in my city. Last year I noticed in spring that there were many plants and grass along the streets. Especially in those deserted(废弃的) parks and spaces which have been covered with green grass and flowers of various kinds, many citizens are attracted to take pictures and exercise there. It's said that it took half a year for the government to make this new development which was called linear parks(带状公园). Being different from common parks, linear parks are scattered(散布) along the streets so people can appreciate the green view while driving or waiting for the bus. So, I like this new development very much. It makes sense in improving people's health and happiness.

Besides, these linear parks have greatly improved the air quality in the city. In the past, due to the factories located in the downtown area, the air was polluted so heavily that we often suffered from air pollution. I went there last year, to find that the grassland around the factories was also damaged by polluted water and other waste, which has been a big concern to many citizens. However, it has been improved a lot with large areas of green. Factories that produced polluted waste have been forced to move to remote places.

Personally speaking, this kind of new development benefited me quite a lot because I could see one of the linear parks along the road from my balcony(阳台). The balcony is the best place in my house to relax because it is just next to my bedroom, there is a comfortable sofa and an all-white table. I enjoy sitting on the sofa on the balcony over a cup of coffee, without doing anything. The green view makes me comfortable and relaxed.
answers.summary: 我所居住的城市近年来新建了很多带状公园，我去年春天就发现绿化明显好多了，街道两侧以及很多原来的裸露空地上都被绿植覆盖，还有不同形状的花卉展摆。据说建设这些带状公园用了半年时间，我非常喜欢这项新的发展，因为带状公园由于遍布在道路两侧和城市中间，所以随处都可以欣赏到，等车的时候都觉得风景好多了。这个新的发展也让城市变得更加绿色宜居，，我的卧室有个小阳台，从阳台上正好能看到马路两侧的公园和绿植，非常养眼和舒服，我空闲时候喜欢冲一杯咖啡坐在阳台上对着那些绿植发呆，真的很放松。

answers.title: 和闺蜜去曼谷旅行
answers.content:
Speaking of another city where I’d like to stay for a short time, it must be Bangkok. It is the capital city of Thailand that combines noisy places with modern elements(结合了喧闹和现代元素). I would like to travel there for a few days because of the convenient flight, beautiful beaches, delicious snacks， and attractive prices. With the lifting (取消) of epidemic restrictions, my friend and I have decided to travel there a second time this summer. We have made a very detailed plan including visiting famous places like the Grand Palace and the Jade Buddha Temple, going to the Pattaya Floating Market， and riding an elephant in the forest. But because of our limited time, we will only stay there for about five days.
Bangkok is noisy because it attracts many tourists every year. My friend and I went there in the summer of 2018 when there was no pandemic(疫情). We stayed there for five days. The trip was unforgettable because we hadn’t made concrete(具体的) travel plans, we just went around and stopped at what we found interesting. We also made friends with some local people, they told us interesting stories and local customs which were very fascinating. Besides, we visited the most famous scenic spots and watched the well-known Ladyman Show. As girls, we could not miss going to duty-free stores for shopping. I enjoyed traveling with my friend because we could not only share the beautiful scenery and pleasure but also could share the expense(花费), which was quite money-saving, to be honest.
answers.summary: 如果提到喧嚣却又吸引人的城市，我想曼谷必须榜上有名。曼谷是泰国的首都，也是泰国最大的城市。那里是度假者的天堂，去泰国航线多，物价低，还可以享受美食比如去网红杜拉拉水上市场打卡等，也正因此，曼谷是一座很喧嚣的城市。但是由于假期时间有限，我们只能在签证时间内短期自由行。我上一次去曼谷自由行是2018年夏天，我和好闺蜜一起在那儿待了5天，我们参观了曼谷最有名的几处建筑，看了人妖表演，买了很多美妆用品。相比一个人出行，两个人的深度自由行更加舒适，因为我们不仅可以分享美景和快乐，还能分摊旅途的费用。

answers.title: 被朋友激励去做志愿者得到认可
answers.content:
I have a friend who’s very keen on getting involved in public services. Over the years, he has organized and been engaged in hundreds of public events. In his words, the meaning of life lies in serving others, rather than taking from others (人生的意义不在于索取，而在于奉献。). Watching him actively volunteer in different sorts of charity activities has also inspired me to take on more social responsibilities.
So, last summer I signed up to go to the west region of China to help relieve the shortage of teachers there (去年夏天，我报名参加了西部支教活动). I worked there for two months. Actually, it was quite an interesting experience in a nice little village. People were very friendly and down to earth. Most importantly, the children were modest and had a strong yearning for knowledge and learning about the outside world(孩子们很质朴，并且对知识和了解外界有强烈的渴望). This yearning drove me to give my best to this job. Whenever possible, I would sit down with the children and share with them interesting stories from the city. You know, these children had never stepped out of their local area. Their hometown doesn’t even have proper roads for cars to travel on. I felt deep sympathy for people living there. In fact, I also got along very well with the villagers and I taught some of them how to read.
After a couple of months, it was time to leave. Everyone in the village came to say goodbye. They gave me big warm hugs to show their gratitude. The school even wrote a post to praise me for my good work! I was totally overwhelmed! (我受宠若惊) What a wonderful experience!
answers.summary: 我朋友是一个热衷于志愿服务的人，哪怕再忙也要抽出时间去参加各种各样的志愿者活动，他告诉我人生的意义不在于索取，而在于奉献。在他的影响下，我报名了学校的下乡支教活动，和孩子们相处了两个月，虽然条件很艰苦，但是我很快乐。最后离开时，我们受到了当地乡亲们的高度赞扬，同时我也被孩子们对知识的渴望所感动，有机会我一定还会再去。

answers.title: 我拍下喜欢种花的奶奶后得到金钱奖励
answers.content:
My grandma is a person who grows a lot of plants and flowers. She lives on the ground floor, so she has a big yard to grow things. My grandma has planted a variety of beautiful flowers in the yard, such as roses, gardenia(栀子花), begonia(海棠花) and so on. Every year in spring, her garden is always very beautiful. In addition to having a beautiful garden, another reason why she likes to grow flowers is that she likes to arrange them(插花). For this reason, she attends a flower arrangement class. As the oldest student in the class, she always gets a lot of praise(收获到很多掌声).

I like photography very much. I often take my SLR camera(单反相机) to all corners of the city to find inspiration(寻找灵感). About six months ago, I went to the flower arrangement class with my grandma. In the class, I took a picture of her arranging flowers. This photo is very artistic(艺术性), and coupled with(再加上) the bright flowers in the background, it is a very beautiful photo. She encouraged me to submit it to the local newspaper, so I did so, without expecting much. However, the photo was on the front page 3 months later! I am very proud of myself, and my grandma is always boasting(夸赞) about how talented I am.

There was another surprise about two weeks ago when my grandma gave me some money to help me buy the latest photography equipment, so I bought a new lens(镜头) with the money last week. I plan to join her again at the flower arrangement class next week so I can take more beautiful pictures.
answers.summary: 奶奶喜欢种植物，做插花；我拍下她做插花的照片，很有艺术性，投稿到摄影报刊上被登在头版，我非常自豪；奶奶很高兴，夸我有天赋，赏给我一笔钱，支持我买最新的摄影设备。

answers.title: 没去面试引发的争论
answers.content:
I started looking for a job as soon as I graduated from college last year. I had no work experience and I didn't know enough about myself, so I sent my resume to almost every company I had heard of. After sending them all out, I was invited for an interview by COMPANY A, who offered me a job.

Unfortunately, because I had sent out so many resumes, I also received an interview invitation(面试邀请) from COMPANY B after receiving the offer from COMPANY A. I had a decision to make, but I thought to myself “Why not? It might lead to another opportunity” . I therefore agreed to the invitation. What I didn't expect was COMPANY A urging me(催促我) to start work as soon as possible, otherwise they would retract(默认) their offer. I was only young and inexperienced, so I thought that the best thing to do was to start work at company A.

However, the day I started work was also the day of the interview at COMPANY B, so I had to inform COMPANY B that I could not attend. It was not an easy decision to make, and my boyfriend said that since I had agreed to the interview, I should have attended it, or at least informed them earlier that I could not go. He also said that I should have gone to the interview in case it was a better opportunity, but I was satisfied that I had received a satisfactory offer from COMPANY A and that there was no need to go to company B. For this reason, my boyfriend and I quarreled. However, I did not regret my decision, because I am very satisfied with my job at COMPANY A, and I also informed company B well in advance(提前). My boyfriend might disagree, buy I don’t think I did anything wrong.
answers.summary:
我已经收到了心仪offer，因为之前是海投，所以又收到了新面试邀请，我却没去。对象责怪我不守约定、不再看看机会，我认为已经收到了满意offer就没必要去，因此引发了争论。
Resume – 简历
Interview – 面试
Opportunity – 机会
Urge – 催促
Retract – 撤回
Inexperienced – 缺乏经验的
Satisfactory – 令人满意的
Quarrel – 争吵
Advance – 提前

answers.title: 通过搜索信息写报告学英语
answers.content:
I remember in high school when a new foreign teacher from America, called Sam, came to our school. This was my first time taking a foreign teacher's class, and I felt both excited and energized(充满了新鲜感). Sam's teaching method was very different from traditional Chinese teaching. Traditional Chinese teaching is mainly based on books(以书本为主) and learning grammar and vocabulary, because teachers expect students to get a good score in exams. But Sam wanted us to do research projects, write reports and give presentations in front of the class.

I remember in one of his classes when he asked us to research the cultural differences between China and the United States on the Internet, and prepare a presentation for the whole class a week later. So, at Sam's request(在Sam的要求下), we divided into small groups and everyone looked up information on different topics. I had a computer at home so I did my research at home on the weekend.

I think his teaching methods were very innovative and effective. Not only did I develop the ability to retrieve information(检索信息), which will undoubtedly be very helpful for me when I study abroad and write dissertations in the future, but I also discovered many cultural differences. At the same time, giving speeches allowed me to overcome my shyness(克服了自己的羞怯) and gave me the courage to speak English in front of people. I thoroughly enjoyed his classes.
answers.summary: 我记得刚上高中的时候，我们学校来了一个外教。他的教学方法和传统的中式教学很不一样，他喜欢让我们自己查询信息，写报告然后做演讲。我记得第一节课的时候，他让我们在网上查中美两国的文化差异，并在一周后做演讲给全班听。于是我们分成了几个小组，按不同的方向每个人都需要查信息。我家里有电脑，所以周末的时候就在家里完成了。这个授课方式我觉得很新颖，同时我认为效果非常好。我不但学习到了检索信息的能力，还通过这个方式学到了文化差异，做演讲也让我有勇气大声讲英语。我非常享受那次课程。

answers.title: 买到错的电脑但我决意等待
answers.content:
About six months ago, I wanted to buy a computer to prepare for my graduation thesis(毕业论文) that was coming up. There are so many brands and models of computer on the market, and my budget was not very high, so I asked some friends for their opinions and referred to many online guides(参考了很多网上的指南). After a long time considering all the options, I finally decided to buy the latest brand XX computer.

After making the decision, I immediately placed my order(下单) online and started to wait excitedly and anxiously. Unexpectedly, before the computer arrived, the seller contacted me. It turned out that(原来是) the he had sent me the wrong model. As an apology and compensation(补偿) for the inconvenience, the seller offered me a discount on the incorrect order. He also said that if I was not happy with that, I could return the wrong computer when it arrived and he would then ship my correct order. It was frustrating, but I had no choice but to wait for the incorrect order to arrive.

After it was delivered, I found that it actually performed very well, and the discount that the merchant agreed to give me was very generous. Plus, I didn't want to wait another 2 weeks for my original order, so I decided to keep this one. I've been using it for six months now, and I'm very satisfied with my decision. I was also satisfied with the seller’s customer service.
answers.summary:
大概半年前我想买一台电脑，为明年要写的毕业论文做准备。选了很久后，我终于决定买某个品牌的最新款电脑。在网上下了订单后我开始兴奋又焦急地等待。没想到电脑还没到，商家就联系了我，因为迟到的订单表达了歉意。

answers.title: 傲慢与偏见
answers.content:
One of the interesting stories that captivated me was the novel "Pride and Prejudice" by Jane Austen. I first read it a few years ago and was drawn to the captivating tale of Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy set in the Regency era. The novel navigates themes of class, marriage, and societal expectations through the engaging interactions of its characters. Jane Austen's wit and social commentary are brilliantly showcased in this timeless classic. The vivid descriptions and the intricate character developments kept me entranced throughout the book.

Recently, I had the pleasure of watching the movie adaptation of "Pride and Prejudice". This romantic drama set in the same era as the novel beautifully brought to life the complex relationships and societal norms portrayed in Austen's work. I watched it on the popular Chinese video platform Bilibili, where I often find excellent quality films. The film's cinematography, costume design, and talented cast made the viewing experience truly enjoyable. The subtlety of emotions and the chemistry between the lead characters left a lasting impression on me.

Watching this adaptation was a delightful experience that brought both laughter and joy. The elaborate ballroom scenes and the humorous exchanges between Elizabeth and Mr. Darcy provided moments of comedic relief. I watched it with my close friends, and our shared laughter and enjoyment added to the overall experience. The wit and charm of the characters, coupled with the clever dialogue, made the film a perfect blend of humor and romance. It truly captured the essence of Austen's story while adding a modern touch that resonated with the audience.

I would love to watch this movie again because of its timeless appeal and heartwarming storyline. The humor, romance, and intricate plot make it a film that I could rewatch multiple times and still find it engaging. The themes of love, self-discovery, and societal expectations are portrayed with such depth and authenticity that each viewing offers a new perspective. The film's ability to evoke a range of emotions, from laughter to romance, makes it a cinematic treasure that I would eagerly revisit on any given day.
answers.summary:
简·奥斯汀的这部经典小说通过伊丽莎白与达西的爱情故事，幽默讽刺地展现了19世纪英国社会的阶级观念与婚姻观。机智有趣的对话、生动的人物和深刻的社会洞察力使其成为永恒佳作，改编影视作品也广受喜爱。

answers.title: 分享节目《隐姓亿万富翁》
answers.content:
I especially like watching the show "Undercover Billionaire". This show premiered(首播) in 2019 and tells the story of American billionaire Glenn Stearns who accepted the challenge of the producers to show the audience how to go from nothing to the CEO of a million-dollar company.

Glenn withheld(隐去) his surname on the show and started with just a small truck and $100 in cash, but by the end, he became the president of a million-dollar company. The whole show is really inspiring. For example, Glenn tells us the difference between how the poor and the rich think, the difference between the way they do things, and the art of speaking(说话艺术).

My friend Lily was at a low point in her life(处于人生的低谷) at the end of 2019. She broke up with her boyfriend who she had dated for five years, she couldn't go home because of the pandemic(疫情), and she also lost her job. At that time, she stayed in her rented house all day, and not only did she not find a new job, she even started to alienate(疏远) me. So, I thought I would tell her about this show in the hope that through its inspirational story, she would be able to get through the dark time in her life(度过人生中黑暗的时刻).

After watching the reality show, Lily was really inspired. She perked up and was ready to learn Glenn Stearns' inspirational lessons. We often watch this show together because, in addition to it being very inspirational, it also gives me a lot of encouragement.
answers.summary: 我特别喜欢看“隐姓亿万富翁”这个节目. 这主要讲述的就是美国亿万富翁 Glenn Stearns 接受挑战，真实再现如何从贫穷汉到价值百万公司的总裁。Glenn 在节目中隐去自己的姓氏，用仅有的 100 美元和一辆卡车开始，在 90 天的时间完成任务，真的非常励志。我朋友那个时候正好处于人生的低谷，于是我跟我朋友分享了这个节目。看了这个真人秀后，她也振作起来准备学习Glenn Stearns的励志。我们经常一起看。我很喜欢这个秀，除了非常励志外，我觉得也能给我很多启发和鼓励。

answers.title: 激励我种植花草的奶奶
answers.content:
My grandma really likes to grow all kinds of flowers and vegetables. I think it might have something to do with her experience when she was younger. She lived in the countryside for a while when she was young, and at that time she grew vegetables and fruits. Although she lives in the city now, she still misses the time when she was young. Fortunately, her home on the ground floor has a large yard so she can continue her planting passion. My grandma always plants beautiful flowers and fresh vegetables and fruits in the yard, such as roses, orange trees and so on.

In fact, the orange tree was planted by both of us a year ago. However, the tree is still very small, and it is estimated that(估计) it will take several years to really grow and bear fruit (结果). The vegetables that she has grown in her yard this year, such as green peppers, tomatoes and mint, were also planted by the two of us. It was super interesting and demanding, my grandma give me a praise for my hard work, which I thought was the best reward.

My grandma always inspires me to grow plants with her. She said that, first of all, it is difficult to buy natural vegetables and fruits without pesticides(农药) in the city. If you grow your own, you can eat natural and organic food(有机食物), which is good for your health. Second, she enjoys the process of growing plants from seedlings(植物从小苗长大的过程), and in her words, it is like she has watched me grow from a baby to an adult. She hopes that by growing plants together, I will be able to appreciate the difficulty and reward of taking care of life.
answers.summary:
奶奶热爱园艺，因年轻时在乡村务农。如今在城里院子种花种菜，如玫瑰、橘树等，教我体验种植乐趣，强调有机健康，感悟生命成长。

answers.title: 熟人家里有很多塑料废品制作成的工艺品
answers.content:
My good friend's father is an artist who is very famous in our local area and has gradually become famous in China. What he does best is turn waste into wonderful works of art(变废为宝). In other words, there is always a lot of plastic waste in his house, such as bottles, bags and packaging, because he goes to the recycling plant(垃圾回收厂) to collect clean plastic and bring it home with him. But this garbage is not garbage to him, it is his art form, and he has always been able to turn plastic waste into art through his magical hands and mind.

My favorite creation of his is an eagle made of plastic bottles and bags, which is very lifelike(栩栩如生), just like a real model of an eagle, and very beautiful. He said that the eagle was influenced by National Geographic(受到了国家地理杂志的影响), and that he wants to convey through this work the idea(传达…的思想) that humans should live in harmony with nature (人类应该和大自然和谐相处). I heard from my friend that his father's most expensive work of art was sold for hundreds of thousands of yuan, which really surprised me.

I go to my friend's house about once a month, sometimes to play with him, but more often to see if his father has created any new works of art. I like his house a lot, even though it looks messy, just like a small recycling plant. Every time I go there, I want to help him clean up all the plastic, but then I am reminded of all the ways his father can turn it into treasure and the meaning it has for people.
answers.summary:
我的好朋友的父亲是一个艺术家，他最擅长的就是变废为宝。他家里总是有很多的塑料垃圾，比如瓶子什么的，但是他总是能把这些塑料垃圾变成艺术品。我大概每个月都会去朋友家，去看看他的父亲有没有新的作品，我很喜欢他家，虽然他家看起来很乱，每次我都想帮他把这些塑料垃圾收拾干净，但是一想到他父亲能把这些垃圾变废为宝，就觉得很神奇。

Treasure – 珍宝

answers.title: 爬黄山
answers.content:
I went to Huangshan Mountain with my boyfriend last month. Located in Huangshan City, Anhui Province, Huangshan Mountain is the most famous mountain in China. It was announced by the State Council(国务院) as a key national-level scenic spot(首批国家级重点风景名胜区), and was also included in the "World Cultural and Natural Heritage List"(世界文化与自然遗产名录) as well as the World Geo-park(世界地质公园) list by UNESCO(联合国教科文组织). My boyfriend had been very busy with his work, but he finally had a vacation last month, so he invited me to climb the mountain.

To be honest, I'm not really into exercise. I think the most exercise I do every day is walking from home to the subway station. So, before I was even halfway up the mountain(半山腰), I couldn't climb anymore, and I wanted to give up. My boyfriend kept encouraging me and told me that if I persevered, I could see the spectacular scenery when I reached the top of the mountain, so I continued. On the way up, my boyfriend asked me if I needed any help, but I declined his offer. The reason I did so was because I wanted to use my own strength to reach the top.

I climbed for a while and rested for a while until I finally reached the top a few hours later. When I got there, the beauty of the mountain immediately eased my exhaustion(山上的美景治愈了我身体的疲惫) and I was so happy that I had made it all the way. This experience was also very educational for me, as I learned the rewards of perseverance(持之以恒的魅力) and the power of persistence(坚持的力量). This will be helpful for the rest of my life.
answers.summary: 上个月我和我的男朋友一起去黄山，这是中国最著名的一座高山。我男朋友工作一直特别忙，上个月好不容易有假期，就邀请我一起去爬山。但我平时是一个不锻炼的人，所以还没爬到半山腰我就爬不动，开始打退堂鼓了。这时，我的男朋友一直鼓励我，并告诉我只有到了山顶才能看到真正的风景。于是我咬牙继续坚持，并没有向男朋友寻求帮助。我爬一会儿休息一会儿，终于在几个小时后到了山顶。山上的美景治愈了身体的疲惫，当我成功登顶的时候我感到非常高兴。通过这件事我学到了持之以恒，坚持的力量。

answers.title: 水立方
answers.content:
One place I've been to, and that I also recommend to travelers, is the Water Cube(水立方) at the National Aquatics Center(国家游泳中心). This is an iconic(标志性的) building in Beijing, located in the Beijing Olympic Park, and was the venue for the swimming events at the 2008 Olympic Games. During the games, 25 world records(打破25项世界纪录) were broken inside the Water Cube. After the Olympic Games, half of the interior of the Water Cube was transformed into(被改造成) a leisure park.

I went to the Water Cube in 2008 because I was very fortunate to have had a ticket to one of the swimming events. Nowadays, the Water Cube is not just a place for swimming competitions, but it's also open to the public, which means anyone can visit it and exercise inside. The entrance fee is relatively cheap. I remember that it only costs 30 RMB per visit and 50 RMB for swimming. If you live around the Water Cube, you can also get a season pass or an annual pass(季票和年票). For such an Olympic-standard national-level arena(奥运标准的国家级赛场), the price is very cheap.

I really like it there and fully support the idea to open it to the public. First of all, the Water Cube is one of the most famous and iconic buildings in China, and anyone who travels to Beijing should visit and experience this huge stand-alone building(单体建筑). Tourists can get a sense of the history that was made at the 2008 Beijing Olympic Games and exercise at the same time, so I highly recommend tourists visiting here.
answers.summary:
我去过的，同时也推荐所有旅游者都去的一个地方是水立方。这是北京的一个标志性建筑，同时也是2008年北京奥运会的运动场馆。我是2008年奥运会去的，非常有幸去里面观看了一场游泳比赛。现在水立方对所有人都开放了，所以任何人都可以进去参观和锻炼。

answers.title: 时尚的法国发小
answers.content:
I'd like to talk about my childhood friend Gabriel, who has one of the most fascinating cultural backgrounds I know. (我想聊聊我儿时的朋友Gabriel，他有着我所知道的最迷人的文化背景).

Gabriel was born in France (出生在法国), but moved to China when he was just 3 years old because of his parents' work. We met in kindergarten (我们在幼儿园相识) and became inseparable throughout elementary school. What's interesting is that while he's technically French, he's practically bilingual (双语者) and understands Chinese culture as deeply as any local.

What I admire most about Gabriel is his incredible fashion sense (时尚品味). His style is a perfect blend of Parisian chic (巴黎式的优雅) and Chinese streetwear (中国街头风格), with influences from various subcultures like punk and skateboarding (受到朋克、滑板等亚文化影响). While most kids at school wore regular jeans and T-shirts, Gabriel would show up in vintage leather jackets (复古皮夹克) paired with traditional Chinese cloth shoes - and somehow made it look cool!

Beyond fashion, Gabriel has taught me so much about cultural fusion (文化融合). He'd bring French pastries (法式甜点) to share during Chinese festivals, and explain how certain Western art movements influenced modern Asian design. Our conversations always open my eyes to new perspectives.

I really hope we can work together in the fashion industry someday. With his multicultural background (多元文化背景) and bold creativity, I know we could create something truly unique that bridges East and West. (我知道我们可以创造出真正连接东西方的独特作品).
answers.summary:
我有一个从小就认识的朋友，叫Gabriel, 他来自法国，小的时候因为父母工作的原因在中国上了幼儿园，我非常喜欢他穿衣服的风格，很独特，受到各种亚文化的审美影响。我希望以后能和他一起在这个领域工作

answers.title: 讨论互送礼物
answers.content:
Jessica is a good friend I have known since elementary school. We were not only in the same class in elementary school, but also in the same school for junior high school and high school, so it can be said that the two of us have been good friends from childhood to adulthood(从小玩到大).

This year is the fifteenth year we've known each other, and I wanted to give her a commemorative gift(纪念礼物), and to my surprise, Jessica wanted the same. So, last weekend, we got together to discuss each other's favorite gifts. Jessica wanted a small gift because she was moving soon and didn't want something too big or heavy to carry to her new apartment. I wanted a decorative item so I could put it on my desk to remind me of her. While it's fun to discuss each other's gifts like this, it's also a bit strange, because not everyone wants to know their gift ahead of time(提前), as it doesn't count as a surprise. But we all think that the best gift is the gift the other person wants and likes(最好的礼物就是对方喜欢的). If we give a gift that the other person does not like, it is not only a waste of money, but also a waste of energy to choose the gift.

In the end I decided to get her a custom eye mask (定制眼罩) with our initials on it, because Jessica doesn't sleep well and she is very sensitive to(对…敏感) light. Every morning when the sun shines into her bedroom, she always wakes up, and then she has no energy for the rest of the day. With this eye patch, I am sure she will get a good night's sleep in her new apartment and she will love it. Jessica gave me a doll with a picture of the two of us so I can think of her every time I see it, and I really like the idea.
answers.summary: Jessica是我小学时候就认识的好朋友，今年是我们认识的第十五年，我想要给她送一个纪念礼物，她也正有此意。我们聚在一起讨论了彼此心仪的礼物，她想要一个轻便的礼物，因为她最近正在准备搬家。而我想要一个装饰性的物品，这样我可以放在书桌上，常常想念她。虽然这样讨论彼此的礼物很有趣但也有点奇怪，但是我们都觉得礼物就是要对方喜欢才是最好的。最终我决定给她定制一个有我们俩名字缩写的眼罩，她一定会喜欢的。

answers.title: 学习python来提升工作效率
answers.content:
I'm an accountant for a large web company, so there's always a lot of data to deal with at work. Although Excel software and other accounting-specific software are very professional and convenient, I always feel that editing a large amount of data is a waste of time. So, I've always wanted to learn a programming language myself to deal with the massive amounts of data that are repeated at work(处理工作中重复的大量数据).

After researching various programming languages ​​on the Internet, I came across(得知) a language called python. Python is a high-level, interpreted, general-purpose programming language(高级的，解释性的，通用的编程语言). I found that although python is not the simplest or most basic programming language, it is the most suitable for my needs(对我的需求来说却是最贴合的). So, I decided to teach myself python programming in the evenings after work. It happens that(碰巧) my brother is an expert in this field. His major in college is computer programming, so he can help me answer any questions I encounter.

To be honest, this process of learning python was not easy, especially for a computer language novice(新手) like me. I studied late every night , but after a month of study, I mastered the initial data analysis skills(我掌握了初步的数据分析技能) and applied these skills to my work. Now I find that this skill has greatly improved my productivity and saved me a lot of time, and I am very fortunate that I have adopted this method.
answers.summary: 我在工作中总是有大量的数据需要处理，因此我决定在下班后自学python编程，正巧我弟弟是这方面的专家，遇到的问题他都能帮我解答。虽然这个过程并不轻松，我每天都学到很晚，但通过一个月的学习，我掌握了初步的数据分析技能，这项技能大大帮我提高了工作效率，帮助我节约了很多时间。

answers.title: 耳机让我集中注意力
answers.content:
In my opinion, headphones are a world-changing invention(改变世界的发明) and one of the tools I use the most to help me focus. Not only does it block out noise(隔绝噪音), but it also allows people to immerse themselves in(沉浸在…里) music to soothe themself and calm down(舒缓平静).

I've had this habit since I was in high school. Whenever I'm busy, I always wear headphones and listen to soothing music to help calm me down and allow me to focus on my studies or work. What I especially like is all kinds of piano music, not the rock music or pop music that most young people like. I think piano music can elicit soothing emotions and let me find a little peace in the complicated study and work(让我在繁杂的学习和工作中找到一丝平静). I think that in modern society, young people especially are becoming increasingly dependent on headphones. Everywhere on the street, you can see many people with a pair of headphones or wireless earphones plugged into their ears(塞进耳朵里). Even if some people don't play music in their headphones, they wear them to avoid unnecessary contact with strangers. Not only young people like to do this, I see many middle-aged people also carry headphones with them. I don't see many older people with headphones because I think they still prefer old-fashioned radios. I think headphones have become one of the necessary tools for modern people to enjoy life and to concentrate on work or study.
answers.summary: 耳机是一项改变世界的发明，它不仅能隔绝噪音，同时能让人们沉浸在音乐中。因此在我忙碌的时候，我总是习惯戴上耳机，听一听舒缓的音乐来帮助我平静下来，使我能够将注意力集中在工作上。现代社会中特别是年轻人变得逐渐依赖耳机，已经成为了现代人享受生活的必要工具之一。

answers.title: 帮侄女做手工作业很忙
answers.content:
The last time I was very busy was when I helped my niece with her homework. You know, I am a college student and have not done manual work for many years, so it was indeed a big challenge for me.

Last week my niece was doing a manuscript and she asked me to help her. My niece is only in the second grade of primary school, and she can't even write a lot of Chinese characters(汉字), so it is indeed a big challenge for her to complete the manuscript. After listening to her request, although I hadn't done a handwritten newspaper for a long time, I still agreed to help her. So, she came to my house with paper and pens and asked me to help her with the illustrations.

I swear, I really tried my best. After all, I'm not a painting major(毕竟我不是学画画专业的), so of course, my painting level is not as good as a professional. Therefore, in the process of painting, she was always dissatisfied, so I made many revisions(让我反复修改了很多次). To be honest, I was a little impatient at the end of the drawing, but looking at my little niece's face, I still couldn't get mad at her. In the meantime, I had to cook lunch for the two of us, and she specifically said she wanted to eat a certain dish. So, I went back and forth(来来回回) between the kitchen and the living room, feeling overwhelmed(感到分身乏术). During dinner, she accidentally spilled vegetables on a painting that I had finally finished, and I was really angry. Luckily, we got the job done in the end, but I was so exhausted.
answers.summary: 最近一次很忙的经历是我帮我的侄女做手工作业。上周我侄女要完成一个手抄报，她请我给她帮忙。她带上纸和笔来到我家，让我帮她画插图。但是过程中她总是不满意，让我修改了很多次，其间我还要为我们俩做午饭，我往返于厨房和客厅，感到分身乏术。所幸最终我们还是完成了任务，但我真是累死了。

answers.title: 喜欢跑步，想参加马拉松
answers.content:
I love exercising very much, and running is one of my favorite ways to exercise. I had a serious illness when I was in middle school, and ever since, I haven't been in good health . Later, after I went to college, many people around me would get up in the morning or go to the playground to run after dinner. Gradually, I also developed the habit of(养成了…的习惯) running. Now, I run three kilometers in the morning on weekdays before going to work/school. Since last year, my mom has also joined my "running team", so sometimes my mom will go for a morning run with me.

I feel like running has really boosted my immunity(提高了我的免疫力). I said that I wasn't very well after middle school due to illness, but since I started running, I feel my body is starting to get better little by little. Especially since last year, I haven't even had a cold, I certainly give the credit to running(这个功劳归功于跑步). Now that running has been integrated into(融入…) my life, I want to prove my ability through some competitions. I plan to join the marathon that our city runs(举办) every year this October. As usual, this marathon is 20 kilometers, just along the river in the city and through the park to the end. I used to see runners participating in this race often on TV, but I never participated myself. But now I have a lot of confidence in my body and stamina(耐力). I don't expect myself to take first place(的第一名), but I want to see if I can meet more people who like to run through the competition, so as to make some new friends with common hobbies.
answers.summary: 跑步是我锻炼身体的方式之一，我工作日的早上都会跑三公里再去上班/上学，有时候我妈妈会和我一起。我觉得跑步真的提高了我的免疫力，因为我最近一年都没有感冒。我计划今年10月参加我们市每年都会举办的马拉松比赛，我想看看能不能通过比赛认识更多同好，交一些新朋友。

answers.title: 教育局长
answers.content:
A rule I don't like is one regarding physical education introduced by(被…提出) the director of our city's education bureau(教育局). / I think a person who has contributed to society is the director of our city's education bureau, who brought about the reform of school sports(提出来了关于学校体育改革的事).

The city where I live is a model national education city, which means the city's education system has been widely recognized(得到广泛认可) across China. But to be honest, this recognition only regards the level of academic test scores(这个认可都在学习考试成绩的层面上). Regarding the physical ability of students, the education bureau did not pay special attention to it until the arrival of the new director. The director's surname is Zhang, and he was transferred here from another city about ten years ago. I don't know him personally, but I saw him when he came to visit our school. The first thing Director Zhang did after taking office(上任) was to stipulate(规定) that all junior high schools and high schools in the city must take physical education classes twice a week, and for PE classes to be included in the final exam. To be honest, I hated this rule at first, because firstly, I don't like sports very much. I am a relatively quiet person, and I prefer to stay in the classroom studying and reading books than exercising. Secondly, I thought PE class was just a waste of time, especially for students who were about to take high school or college entrance examinations(中考或高考). There were a lot of students who didn't like this rule, but of course we were all forced to(被迫) abide by(遵守) it.

But now that several years have passed, I am surprised to find that the physical ability of our students is significantly higher than that of students elsewhere. In fact, even several students from my school were admitted to pilot training school(考上了飞行员) after the college entrance examination last year, and we all know how demanding the physical fitness test to become a pilot is(我们都知道飞行员考试对考试身体素质的要求有多高)! So, despite how I initially felt, I now think Director Zhang's rule is really great, and he has made a great contribution to our city.
answers.summary: 我们市教育局长非常重视体育，他规定我们每周必须上两节体育课，我很讨厌这个规定，但是多年以后发现，我们那一届学生的身体平均素质显著高于其他年级，我感觉他对我们学生身体素质的提高有很大贡献

answers.title: 爱上人工职能
answers.content:
I once organized an event called "Let's Debate" in my junior year. This event was open to all professors and students so we decided to hold it in the largest conference room in the whole uni. I received a huge amount of help from debate teammates in organizing this event. For example, they helped me to print posters, organize promotional activities, and gather suitable debate topics. On the night of the event I was a bit surprised when almost 100 people turned up. In fact, it turned out to be one of the most successful unofficial events(非官方活动) in our university’s history.

At the event, I think there was a very interesting topic. We were debating the viewpoint: ‘Would it be possible to genuinely be in love with a robot or program that is powered by AI?(爱上人工智能算不算爱情)". I chose to support this view, which means that I thought falling in love with a manifestation of artificial intelligence was actually true love. About half of the professors and students present also backed me up(支持我). My friends chose to oppose this view, as they thought that artificial intelligence was not human, so it could not be considered true love. The other half of professors and students supported them. Our entire discussion was very interesting. Because the whole discussion was casual and everyone was given the opportunity to pick up the microphone and speak, many people contributed some interesting and novel points新颖的观点). For example, a freshman student said that he fell in love with a Japanese singer, and that the singer was the famous Hatsune Miku, but from the singer's image to the voice, everything is artificially synthesized(从歌手的形象到声音全部都是人工合成的). He thought this was love, but someone immediately objected to that, saying she was not even aware of his existence, so how could she reciprocate his feelings? The whole discussion was very interesting and almost everyone participated. I really enjoyed the whole activity.

So this is the event I happened to organize. / So this is the interesting discussion I had with my friends.
answers.summary: 我组织了某个快乐活动（what、where、who、feel），活动中和我的朋友发生了一次有趣的谈话（what、what、why 、feel）。

answers.title: 我在社交媒体上常常刷到的人也是我感兴趣的名人
answers.content:
I am learning German, so I often watch some German movies and listen to German songs. I especially like a rapper from Frankfurt whose name is Vega. He may not be famous in China, and in fact, he's probably not very famous outside of Germany, but that doesn't stop him being my favorite celebrity(并不妨碍他成为我最喜欢的名人).

I know him through my boyfriend who is German and who actually grew up in Frankfurt. I first became aware of the singer when I was introduced to some of his songs, and of course I followed his Instagram. The rapper often posts details about his life on Instagram, and makes fans aware of newly released songs. He also posts some album covers and the stories behind the albums he has recorded. Before Vega was famous, he worked in various bars and clubs, and spent most of his spare time writing songs and composing music. This hard work paid off(功夫不负有心人), as he is now a rising star in the German rap world(德语饶舌界的一枚新星). My boyfriend also likes him very much and has been to several of his concerts. The most unexpected thing is that Vega actually went to his house once! It actually happened because my boyfriend lives with his brother. Three years ago, when we were travelling in New Zealand, only his brother was at home. His brother is a fan of the local football team Eintracht Frankfurt and Vega supports them too. One evening, they met while drinking in a bar, and my boyfriend's younger brother invited Vega to our house, but I didn't expect him to say yes! My boyfriend's brother told him I was a huge fan, and he gave me a jumper as a gift and sang along to some of the albums that he had in the home! What a great surprise when I came back! Although I didn't see him in person, sitting on the sofa he sat on still felt like a dream come true(梦想成真).
answers.summary: 我在社交媒体上常常刷到的人（who，how，what，why）也是我感兴趣的名人（who，how ，what，why）

answers.title: 在印象深刻的课程上学习有趣歌曲
answers.content:
My university offers a number of interesting elective modules, such as song appreciation, costume matching, cooking and so on. I decided to take a course called "Teaching You to be a Singer" last semester. Since taking this elective course(选修课), I feel like a new door has been opened in my life(人生简直打开了一个新的大门).

In class, the professor of the music department introduced us to many interesting songs. At the end of the first class of term, the stylish teacher asked the whole class to take a vote on the song we would learn(得票最高的歌) in the second class. Among all the good ones, the one that impressed me the most was a Cantonese song called "Wedding Invitation Street". The singer of this song is Xie Anqi, and it was released in 2008. In January 2009, the song won 16 awards in Hong Kong, including at the 31st Top Ten Chinese Golden Melody Awards(31届十大中文金曲奖). However, although this song has won so many awards, it is not very popular in the mainland. I think the main reason is that Xie Anqi is a singer from Hong Kong so, of course, the song is sung in Cantonese, and in the mainland, songs in Cantonese have still not caught on(粤语歌在内地的流传度普遍来说都不算特别高). Before hearing this song, I never listened to Cantonese songs, so this was the first one I heard. The song tells a story about the demolition(拆除) of old streets in Hong Kong, but the whole song is very peaceful. Xie Anqi's angelic voice(天使般的声音) left a deep and lasting impression. Whenever I think of this song, it brings a feeling of peacefulness and serenity.(非常豁达，宁静的听觉感受).

I’m reminded of the second class of this course when we learned this song under the guidance of(在…的指导下) the professor. To be honest, this was my first time learning Cantonese and trying to sing songs in Cantonese. Although my pronunciation was still not standard, the learning process was very enjoyable and I was very impressed.
answers.summary: 我在上学期选修了《教你成为歌唱达人》这么课程，课上会教授许多有趣的歌曲，其中我印象最深刻的就是《喜帖街》，这首歌并不算非常流行，因为我之前很少听粤语歌，这首粤语歌讲述了一个关于香港拆迁旧街道的故事，给我带来一种非常豁达，宁静的听觉感受。课上我们在老师的带领下学习了这首歌的粤语版本，这是我第一次学习粤语，令我印象深刻。
