That “thing” that I forgot was my parents’ wedding anniversary! And it was their 25th wedding anniversary to boot! I wanted to surprise my parents on their anniversary, but I completely forgot to prepare! In fact(事实上), I had this idea at the beginning of this year so I had plenty of time to prepare. I just thought about it at that time, but then thought I´d wait until the date was approaching before really beginning preparations. But unfortunately I forgot about it and realized a few days too late that their wedding anniversary had already been and gone! I felt very upset, but there was no way to make up for(补偿) it. I still bought them flowers and cakes and fortunately, my parents didn't mind. They still happily accepted my gifts, but I still feel very guilty in my heart.

Since then, I’ve started to plan ahead and arrange specific matters for everything, especially very important things. I downloaded an app dedicated to(专门) countdown reminders, and the app will send text messages to remind me when important moments are coming up. For example, the registration of some important exam. In the past, I often missed the opportunity to take tests because I missed the registration day. However, recently I haven’t missed any important things because of this app. I really enjoy the feeling that everything is under control(尽在掌握之中).
answers.summary: 我最近做了一个决定，就是提前做计划。我其实本来并不是一个喜欢做计划的人，做事像非常拖延。但是直到上周，我忘记了一件非常重要的事情，让我很愧疚。那件事情就是我忘记了我父母的结婚纪念日！我本来想在我父母25周年结婚纪念日给他们一个大大的惊喜，但是我完全忘记准备了！

topics.title: 团队一员（团队合作）/第一次用外语交流

questions.content: Describe something you enjoyed doing with a group of people Describe a friend who is a good leader Describe the time when you first talked in a foreign language

source_payload.title: 团队一员（团队合作）/第一次用外语交流

sub_questions.content:
Describe something you enjoyed doing with a group of people
Describe a friend who is a good leader
Describe the time when you first talked in a foreign language

answers.title: 团队一员/好领导/第一次用外语交流
answers.content:
I signed up(报名) for the China International Import Expo Volunteer Program held in Shanghai last year, and fortunately, I was successfully selected as one of the park guide volunteers.

My task was to guide foreign tourists to designated areas(指定的区域) according to(根据) the arrangement of our group leader. As it happens(碰巧的是), the leader of our group was a senior student I know. She is really good at leading. Under her careful arrangement, each member knew in advance(提前) about the venue they were responsible for(负责). At the same time, she is also a leader who pays great attention to team cohesion(团队凝聚力). Under her guidance, every member of our group became very good friends with each other. If anyone encountered any difficulties at work, we would help each other. In addition, she also prepared a booklet for us in advance, which contained some professional English vocabulary related to the venue, in case(以防万一) we suddenly got stuck(卡壳了) when communicating with foreign friends.

That volunteer activity was also the first time I really used English to communicate with foreigners. At first I was very timid(胆怯的), and I didn't dare to(敢于) speak when I saw them. But with the encouragement of my leader and my team members, I slowly started to speak more confidently out loud. I think the booklet prepared by her was really great. Every time when I couldn’t say a certain professional word, the booklet always helped me.

That volunteer activity allowed me to make many new friends and practice my spoken English. I like this kind of activity very much, and I think I will still sign up next time when I have a chance, and maybe even sign up to become a leader and follow the leadership style of my friend!
answers.summary: 去年我报名了上海进博会志愿者项目，并顺利被选中作为园区向导志愿者之一。我的任务就是根据我们组leader的安排，在指定的区域为外籍游客指路。碰巧的是，我们组的leader是我认识的一位学姐。

topics.title: 感兴趣的科学领域/偶尔参加的有些昂贵的活动

questions.content: Describe an area of science(physics,biology,psychology,etc) that interests you Describe an activity that you attend occasionally but a little expensive

source_payload.title: 感兴趣的科学领域/偶尔参加的有些昂贵的活动

sub_questions.content:
Describe an area of science(physics,biology,psychology,etc) that interests you
Describe an activity that you attend occasionally but a little expensive

answers.title: 感兴趣的科学领域/偶尔参加的有些昂贵的活动
answers.content:
I am a VR fan. VR is the abbreviation(缩写) of Virtual Reality, so I am very interested in all the technology and activities to do with VR. I think VR technology is one of the greatest technologies of the 21st century until now.

Through VR, we can experience an exotic(异域的) atmosphere anywhere in the world, not only with pictures, but also some real physical sensations. The ideal VR environment can make it difficult for users to distinguish between(区分A和B) true and false, so that users can devote themselves to(沉浸在) the three-dimensional virtual environment created by the computer. Everything in this environment looks real, sounds real, moves in a real way, and even smells and tastes real, just like in the real world. The user can directly grab the virtual object in the simulated(仿造的) environment with his hand. At this time, the hand feels like it’s holding something, and can even feel the weight of the object, and the grasped object in the monitor can immediately move with the movement of the hand. All these make me feel just like it’s some kind of magic.

But VR technology is not universal yet, so many VR exhibitions or events are very expensive. As a student, I will only occasionally participate in(参与) some VR exhibitions and activities. Fortunately, even though they are quite expensive, I’ve never been let down by a VR experience yet.

I believe that my enthusiasm for VR will continue. At the same time, I will regularly participate in exhibitions to learn about the latest scientific and technological developments. I believe that one day, VR technology will become very popular and will be integrated into(融入) our lives. By that time, I hope that related exhibitions and events will be less expensive.
answers.summary: 我是一个VR迷，所以我对一切关于VR的科学技术和活动都非常感兴趣。我认为VR技术是21世纪最伟大的科学技术之一。通过VR，我们可以在世界的任何地方感受到异域风情，甚至不仅仅是有画面，还会有一些真实的物理体验。但是VR技术现在并不普遍，所以许多VR展览或者活动的价格都非常昂贵。作为一个学生，我会偶尔参加一些VR展览和活动，尽管它们都比较昂贵，但是从来没有一次是让我失望的。

topics.title: 让你笑的电影/有活力的人

questions.content: Describe a movie that made you laugh Describe a person who is full of energy

source_payload.title: 让你笑的电影/有活力的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe a movie that made you laugh
Describe a person who is full of energy

answers.title: 让你笑的电影/有活力的人
answers.content:
One of my favorite actors is Shen Teng who is a member of Happy Twist Troupe. He is very popular in China now, and many people like him. He has shot many comedy movies and appeared in many shows. In short(总的来说), he is a very energetic and well-known person.

The first time I heard of him was because of a movie in 2005 called "Xialuo is particularly annoyed". This movie mainly tells the story of Xialuo, who is actually performed by Shen Teng, who unexpectedly returns to his youth after making a big fuss(大闹) at his crush’s(暗恋的人) wedding and finally realizes about life and finds true love. The wedding of Qiuya was being held, and Xialuo had a crush on Qiuya when they were students. He starts to feel jealous when he looks at his old classmates who have successful careers around him. Using the excuse of drunkenness(借着酒意) to make a fuss at the wedding, he even makes his wife Ma Dongmei furious(狂怒的). But he falls asleep on a toilet and in his dream, he returns to the high school campus, and pursues his beloved girl. He also makes his disappointed mother smile again, and even becomes an omnipotent(无所不能的) pop music superstar. But in the end, he finds that everyone around him is just using him, and only Ma Dongmei truly cherishes him.

This movie is very funny and warm. In fact, I didn't know the actor Shen Teng at the time, but because everyone recommended this movie to me, that’s why I went to watch it on a Saturday. Throughout the movie, I literally(说真的) laughed dozens of times. After watching it, I started to get to know the actor Shen Teng and watched many of his films. To be honest, he is a very dedicated(敬业的) comedian. He is very energetic both in movies and in various shows, and he never disappoints the audience.
answers.summary: 我最喜欢的喜欢的演员之一是沈腾，他是开心麻花舞台剧团的成员之一。他拍摄过许多喜剧电影，也上了很多综艺，是个非常有活力的人。我第一次知道他是因为一部电影，《夏洛特烦恼》。这部电影非常搞笑，并且不失温馨。当时我还不知道沈腾这个演员，只是因为大家都推荐去看这部电影，所以我找了一个周六来放松自己。整场电影，literally，我笑了要几十次。在看完电影之后，我开始了解沈腾这个演员，看了许多他的作品。他可以说是一个非常敬业的喜剧人，无论是在电影中还是在各种综艺节目中都非常有活力，从不让观众失望。

topics.title: 有趣的家乡传统/小时候教我技能的人

questions.content: Describe an interesting tradition in your country Describe a person who taught you who taught you a skill when you were a child

source_payload.title: 有趣的家乡传统/小时候教我技能的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe an interesting tradition in your country
 Describe a person who taught you who taught you a skill when you were a child

answers.title: 有趣的家乡传统/小时候教我技能的人
answers.content:
I remember that when I was in elementary school, our school offered many interesting extracurricular courses(课外班)，such as making crafts, writing poems, playing basketball and so on. And the school allowed us to freely choose our favorite extracurricular courses. The class time was every Friday afternoon. I was particularly fond of(喜爱) making handicrafts, so the teacher recommended me to choose the course of window-flower-cutting.

Window-flowers are one of the ancient Han traditional folk arts(民间艺术) in China, with a very long history. I remember that when I was young, during Chinese New Year, no matter in the north or south, almost every family would put window-flowers on the windows. The window flowers are red, and the pictures usually have the meaning of a blessing(祝福的含义). They are very beautiful when they are pasted on the windows against(在…的衬托下) the snow in winter. And cutting window flowers is really interesting. At that time, the vice principal of our elementary school who taught us how to cut window flowers was in her sixties. She looked friendly and educated with glasses. She tutored every member of the class patiently and explained many stories about the tradition of window flowers for us. Even now(直到现在), I am still impressed with(对…印象深刻) the window- flower-cutting course.

Now I’m about to go abroad to study a postgraduate course, and I’ve always had an idea to open a small traditional Chinese handmade workshop abroad. I want to bring some traditional Chinese culture and customs to the world. But because I have only one year abroad, I think I might not actually rent a store. Instead, I will gather some Chinese classmates in my spare time to make some small crafts and sell them at a market as a short-term part-time job. The price will not be very expensive, and we will also introduce Chinese culture to everyone.
answers.summary: 在我读小学的时候，我们学校开设了许多有趣的课外课程。同学们可以自由选择，上课的时间是在每周五下午。我当时特别喜欢做手工，所以老师推荐我选择了剪窗花的课程。窗花是中国古老的汉族传统民间艺术之一，历史悠久，每到过春节的时候，无论南方北方，许多家庭都会在窗户上贴窗花，非常漂亮。而剪窗花则更加有趣。当时教我们剪窗花的是我们小学的副校长，她当时已经六十几岁了。

topics.title: 歌词诗句/获奖经历/喜欢的照片

questions.content: Describe a prize you have ever won Describe a line(or a few words) that you remember from a poem or song Describe a photo of you that you like

source_payload.title: 歌词诗句/获奖经历/喜欢的照片

sub_questions.content:
Describe a prize you have ever won
Describe a line(or a few words) that you remember from a poem or song
Describe a photo of you that you like

answers.title: 歌词诗句/获得的奖励/喜欢的照片
answers.content:
On my study desk sits a picture of me holding a book of Selected Poems, which was the reward from an English Poem Reading contest back in college. It meant a lot to me to win that prize, because reading that moving poem and earning a reward for doing so was really a memorable experience. Beyond this, the book itself is great, it’s so full of well written poems that I still have it now.

When I first entered college, I attended the English Poems Reading Contest and made it to the finals. All of the finalists had to draw the poems from a huge box. The one I got was The Road Not Taken by Robert Frost. To be honest, as famous as that poem is(尽管那个诗很有名), I’d never read it before. I fell in love with it instantly, though. The language was just so beautiful and it grabbed my soul. When I read the line ‘Two roads diverged in a wood, and I -I took the one less travelled by and that has made all the difference’, This sentence really resonated with me(这句话引起了我的共鸣)!

You see, I’m always the odd one out among my friends and family(我在我的家人朋友眼中不合群). They think that I’m not a practical person, and that I have my head in the clouds(不接地气). I guess it’s true, as many of them pursue stable professions, like being a teacher or a civil servant. So they are guaranteed to get regular, stable income. I, on the other hand, dream of being a writer of drama. You should hear what they say to me, (你真应该听听他们怎么说我)‘Really? But how will you make a living then?’ Funny, huh? I feel like the line I quoted from the poem was written especially for me. I have taken the road that’s less travelled, and for the first time, I knew that I was not alone on this less travelled road, and that has made a difference to how I see things. Now, I guess you can understand why I chose to talk about this picture/this reward/this poem.
answers.summary: 在我的书桌上有一张照片，照片中的我拿着一本精选英语诗集，在照片的背面我写了一句““Two roads diverged in a wood, and I—I took the one less traveled by,and that has made all the difference.”。 这是我最喜欢的一张照片，这句诗句也指引着我不断追求自己的梦想，而这本诗集，无论去哪里我都会随身携带。这张照片拍摄于我大一参加英语诗朗诵比赛获得二等奖，并拿到了这本诗集作为奖励。

topics.title: 小孩子在公共场合不好的行为/有不喜欢的音乐的经历

questions.content: Describe a misbehavior of children in the public Describe an event you experienced in which you didn’t like the music played

source_payload.title: 小孩子在公共场合不好的行为/有不喜欢的音乐的经历

sub_questions.content:
Describe a misbehavior of children in the public
Describe an event you experienced in which you didn’t like the music played

answers.title: 小孩子在公共场合不好的行为/有不喜欢的音乐的经历
answers.content:
I remember, I think it was approximately a year ago, during final exams week(期末考试周), I spent time in the school library reviewing old exam papers every day, in the hope of getting a good result. As we all know, libraries are very quiet public places. Everyone knows to keep quiet in them and not disturb others. Even on the walls and desks of the library "Keep quiet" stickers are posted everywhere. In fact(事实上), everyone was well behaved, and no students bothered others by speaking loudly.

But one day, the library manager on duty(值班) had brought her child with her. Maybe the child was sick and couldn't go to kindergarten. She let her child sit in her seat, but she left him on his own. At the beginning, the child didn't make any sound. He was writing and drawing on the table. But not long after, he played with his mother's mobile phone, and completely ignoring the students studying around him, began to play music and turned the volume to the loudest.

I can still remember that he played Jay Chou's song. In fact, I like Jay Chou, but this occasion was really inappropriate(不合适的), which greatly affected the study of myself and the other students. It's a library, a public place! It is really bad for children to behave like this, and it affected every student who was studying. To all of our surprise, his mother didn't even stop him when she came back, which made me feel very angry. I had no concentration left to study at all, as my mind became completely occupied by(被…占据) that song. I really hated this experience. It affected my study and wasted my time.
answers.summary: 有一次期末考试周，我天天都泡在图书馆复习考试，希望可以拿到一个好成绩。图书馆是个非常安静的公共场合，大家都知道要保持安静，不打扰到别人。但是有一次，当天值班的图书管理老师突然把她的孩子带来了，并且她就让她的孩子坐她的座位，自己离开了。一开始，他并没有发出什么声音，但突然他玩起了妈妈的手机，并且完全不管周围人，开始放起了音乐。我还能记得，他放的是周杰伦的双截棍。

topics.title: 最近联系的老朋友/乐于助人的人/喜欢的一家人

questions.content: Describe an old friend you got in contact again Describe a person who like to help others Describe a family that you like

source_payload.title: 最近联系的老朋友/乐于助人的人/喜欢的一家人

sub_questions.content:
Describe an old friend you got in contact again
Describe a person who like to help others
Describe a family that you like

answers.title: 最近联系的老朋友/乐于助人的人/喜欢的一家人
answers.content:
Seven years ago, during the summer vacation of my first year of high school, my school launched(开展) an exchange program(交换生项目) with some foreign schools. Since I’ve always planned to study abroad, I wanted to experience the study life overseas in advance(提前) to see if I really liked it. After obtaining the consent(取得同意) of my parents, I signed up for a study tour to a partner school in New Zealand.

We went to the largest city in New Zealand, Auckland, and moved into a homestay under the supervision of(在…的安排下) our school teachers and local teachers. I was assigned to(分配到) the home of an old lady who was in her fifties, and spent a month of happiness with her family. The lady’s name is Caroline. She never married, so she lives with her sister, her sister's husband and their three children, oh, and a cat named Jack.

The whole family were very friendly and helpful. No matter what difficulties I encountered(遇到), they would ask me if I needed help. In just one month, they helped me to integrate into(融入到) local life, and they also took me to visit local attractions(旅游景点) on weekends with them. I like them very much. But after I returned to China, I rarely contacted them because of my busy schedule. I recently graduated with a bachelor’s degree and decided to go to New Zealand for postgraduate studies. So I sent them an email telling them of my current situation and the news that I am going to study as a postgraduate in New Zealand. They were very happy. We got in touch again and we’re looking forward to(期待) seeing each other again in New Zealand in the near future.
answers.summary:
在我高一的暑假，我报名了学校到新西兰友好学校进行游学的活动。我们当时住的是Homestay，我被分配到了一位五十几岁的婆婆的家中，并和她们一家一起度过了一个月的快乐时光。婆婆名叫凯洛琳，她与她的妹妹，以及她妹妹的丈夫和三个孩子，以及一只猫咪，杰克，住在一起。她自己并没有结婚。她们一家人都非常友好并且乐于助人，无论我遇到什么困难，她们都会主动来询问我是否需要帮助。
（国家可以换）

topics.title: 改变计划/错误信息/想去的新公共场所

source_payload.title: 改变计划/错误信息/想去的新公共场所

answers.title: 自己做瑜伽有副作用后去瑜伽馆找老师练习
answers.content:
Well, this is an interesting topic. It reminds me of(使我想起…) Spring festival last year, when I put on a lot of weight, so I made up my mind (下定决心) to get fit (健身；保持健康). But actually, at the time, I had no idea how to achieve this.

So, I turned to my friend Lucy for help, coz she’s crazy about(热衷于) keeping fit. She suggested that I should learn to do yoga. It would be helpful for keeping my body in shape (保持体型). Then I searched for some Yoga teaching videos online, and just kept doing it for several months.

However, during the process, my neck hurt very often. I wanted to figure out(弄清楚) what’s wrong with it, so I searched for that video again. But it was already deleted. Suddenly, I realized that I had been doing it the wrong way!

Later, my friend got to know of my problem and said there was a newly opened gym nearby, which had all kinds of fitness facilities(健身设备), including a swimming pool. Plus, she also said, the exterior shape(外部造型) was stunning(令人惊叹的) and it seemed like a huge glass ball. That sounded so cool. So, I thought to myself(我心里想), maybe it’s time to opt for(选择) a professional Yoga teacher in the gym, sign up for a class(报班) and really work out my problem(解决问题).

As for how I felt about the whole thing, well, I learned a lesson from it. When I’m doing something I’m not familiar with, asking for advice from a professional is definitely the best choice. It may cost me a lot, but my health comes first. I believe, with the guidance of a Yoga teacher, I will manage to lose weight and get into the habit of(养成…的习惯) doing yoga on a regular basis(有规律地).

I’ll certainly go and check the gym in person(亲自).
answers.summary: 去年过年时我从网上差了很多资料看了很多攻略想要减肥，我的朋友建议我做瑜伽，我在网上看了很多资料，然后跟这一起做了几个月，做了很久后我发现我的脖子一直疼，上网上搜发现那篇文章已经删除了，我又请教身边的专业瑜伽朋友他们告诉我我的动作有问题，我才发现网上的教程是错的，后来我的朋友告诉我她家附近新开了一个新的健身房，里面设施很齐全，有一个游泳池建筑物的形状像一个巨大的玻璃球，有一些老师来教课程，所以决定花一些钱报个瑜伽班，虽然贵一点但是我的身体健康最重要的，我感觉很兴奋已经迫不及待去了。

topics.title: 参加的聚会/手工礼物

questions.content: Describe a party that you joined Describe a present you received which was made by hand

source_payload.title: 参加的聚会/手工礼物

sub_questions.content:
Describe a party that you joined
Describe a present you received which was made by hand

answers.title: 参加的聚会/手工礼物
answers.content:
I’m gonna talk about a birthday party I held last year. I decided to invite a bunch of friends(几个朋友) for a quiet get together on the occasion of my 20th Birthday. However, they had other ideas, they gave me a big surprise! My friends played a trick on me to get my key so they had access to my house while I was out. While I was away they sneaked into the house and set up an unforgettable scene. By the time I got back, I was totally blown away(惊呆了) by their efforts! I found the house decorated with colorful balloons and ribbons. My friends even managed to hang 20 balloons on the ceiling with the number 20 on each one of them. I was literally astonished by what they had done for me!

I am particularly into cupcakes so they bought 20 cupcakes to match the main birthday cake. In the Chinese zodiac my birth animal(生肖) is a mouse. So in the bakery, they drew a lovely mouse being playful. I would say I’ve never seen a better drawing of a mouse than that! Then the cake had cherries, blue berries and strawberries on it as well. All to my liking.

Although I received many gifts that day, these handmade cupcakes touched me the most. In fact I was so moved that I welled up with tears of joy. As I blew out the candles I made a wish that my friendship with these wonderful people would last forever.

Then the real fun started as we had a food fight with the cream from the cake. This party was unforgettable and exceeded all my expectations.
answers.summary:
我20岁生日的时候给自己举办了一场生日派对，因为整数生日很重要，我邀请了很多朋友到我家里聚餐，我的朋友们帮我用气球和彩带布置得很漂亮。
我也收到了很多生日礼物，其中最让我感动的是手工cupcake。他们在上面画了我的生肖-老鼠。当时我们一起去公园里玩，她站在花丛中给我拍照，也按下快门拍下了我开心的样子。我觉得非常开心。首先是因为我非常喜欢这个杯子，看到这个照片的时候笑了很久，也和她说了很多我们之间的共同回忆；另一个原因是因为我现在和她不在一个城市，很少见面，但是我在用这个杯子的时候就感觉她在我身边。

topics.title: 想去的远行/买来不常用的东西/童年游戏

questions.content: Describe a place you plan to travel to that is far away from your home Describe an item you bought but do not often use Describe a game that you played in your childhood

source_payload.title: 想去的远行/买来不常用的东西/童年游戏

sub_questions.content:
Describe a place you plan to travel to that is far away from your home
Describe an item you bought but do not often use
Describe a game that you played in your childhood

answers.title: 想去的远行/买来不常用的东西/童年游戏
answers.content:
I would like to talk about one of my long-held aspirations(一直以来的) since childhood, which has driven me even to learn a very challenging skill.

Ever since my childhood, I have desired that one day, I could be able to take a steamship and travel to the Maldives, and enjoy the ocean and beaches which have intrigued me enormously. During my childhood, it was a regular entertainment for me(这对我来说是一项经常性的娱乐活动) to play with sand on the beach with my fellow neighbors and friends on weekends, and I found it extremely interesting and joyous to build houses using the sand, as I was able to devise my own castles and chambers with imagination.

Although these creations of mine were often ruined(摧毁) by the sea waves, I feel I have benefited from them as I established longstanding companionships(同伴关系) with my friends.

Growing into an adult, my love towards oceans has led me to learn diving on Hainan island during the university holiday. To my satisfaction(令我感到满足的是), I found diving a very challenging, yet very entertaining sport, and I cannot tell you how much I love it and enjoy it. With that newfound love, I purchased a series of equipment, hoping I could go diving on a regular basis. However, as I began to be busily occupied in my daily work, I rarely travelled and so the equipment was not put to use.

Because of these experiences, I have been fascinated by the Maldives and swimming in the ocean, as I hope to swim freely in the ocean on the Maldives.
answers.summary:
我想去乘轮船去马尔代夫旅行，我从小到大都和大海和沙滩有不解之缘。

小时候，周末常在沙滩边和小伙伴们一起堆城堡，可以按照自己的设想随意的添砖加瓦变更造型，可惜常被浪头冲走。这个游戏也增强了我和小伙伴之间的友谊。

长大后，我在大学寒假去海南岛边学习了潜水，我觉得潜水是一项非常挑战自我的运动，我很享受潜水，于是我就买了配套的潜水装备，希望能经常下水，但因为上班太忙，缺少出游的机会一直没怎么用过

因此我一直期盼着能去海边游泳，马尔代夫的海又格外的美，所以就想去湛蓝的马尔代夫大海里自由地游泳。

topics.title: 没见过但想了解的人/有趣的老人

questions.content: Describe someone you have never seen but would like to know more about Describe an interesting old person

source_payload.title: 没见过但想了解的人/有趣的老人

sub_questions.content:
Describe someone you have never seen but would like to know more about
Describe an interesting old person

answers.title: 没见过但想了解的人/有趣的老人
answers.content:
Speaking of an individual of such kind, I am reminded of the well-known comedian (喜剧演员) Mr. Bean, a British gentleman who has been on screen(在银幕上) in numerous comedies and movies.

It was from his famous television series Mr. Bean that I got to know him. As an elder man of sixty-three years old, he has been embracing humor and creating joy for his audience for many years. Often referred to as(被称作) a master of comedy and creator of humor, it seems to me that his humorous acting derives from(来源于) his unique and humorous inner-self, as all his acting and stories were adopted from real life. Therefore, when watching these works by him, I feel a sense of genuine happiness and enjoyment, as his humor is the kind that connects our lives and sometimes, we can even find our own reflections(身影) in his stories. In general, I think Mr. Bean is a man of humor, happiness and joy, and I feel very eager to know more about him, and his characteristics. For instance, as a faithful fan, I am interested in how he managed to produce so many episodes of different humorous television series, and how he was capable of creating his movies using his real-life experience.

And when it comes to what I have done with this gentleman, unfortunately, I haven’t ever seen him in person, not to mention doing anything together. This doesn’t bother me anyway, because as a follower and fan, I always stay tuned to his latest news, and watch his recent works whenever released.
answers.summary: 我想更多的了解憨豆先生，我是在看《憨豆先生》这部作品时知道的这位喜剧大师。憨豆先生如今已经63岁了，是著名的喜剧大师，风趣的表面下住着一个风趣的灵魂，而且他的幽默都源于生活十分接地气，所以我觉得这个老人很有趣并想更多的了解这个老人，我很想知道他是如何挖掘生活的快乐。我并未和他见过面，自然也没和他干过什么，但他的每一部电影我都会第一时间认真观看

topics.title: 想写的书/祖父母工作

questions.content: Describe a book you want to write Describe one of your grandparent’s jobs

source_payload.title: 想写的书/祖父母工作

sub_questions.content:
Describe a book you want to write
Describe one of your grandparent’s jobs

answers.title: 想写的书/祖父母工作
answers.content:
Well, for this part, I would say that I want to write a biography(人物传记) about my grandfather, who went through a series of historical events such as the War of Resistance against Japan(抗日战争), the reform and opening up (改革开放), and so on. Besides, my grandfather is equipped with(具有) abundant work experience. Starting his work as a miner then transferring his job to a soldier, he was appointed by the state(被国家指派) to become a civil servant at last. My grandfather then worked as a civil servant(公务员) for 30 years.

The idea of writing a biography for my grandfather popped (冒出，突然出现) into my mind when I was in high school. Not as easy as others might believe, since this book would span the lifetime (跨越生命长度) of my grandfather, I have made up my mind and have already set about writing(开始从事) it.

This is due to the reason that I am also eager to work as a civil servant, one who loves the Party and serves the people with loyalty(忠心的). Besides, it is really a good choice to become a civil servant under today’s great employment pressure(巨大的就业压力) with the supply of a stable income and relatively stress-free work, let alone(更不用说) the welfare this job provides in the long run.
answers.summary: well我想写一本关于我祖父的传记，我祖父经历了抗日战争、改革开放等一系列历史事件，工作和生活经历十分丰富，从最开始的矿工转变成士兵，再到后来被国家任命成为公务员，他做公务员做了三十年之久，我也想成为一名公务员，爱党敬业，为人民服务，无私奉献（其实是因为收入稳定，工作轻松）

topics.title: 没有空的时候/改变计划

questions.content: Describe an occasion when you didn’t have enough time for something Describe a time that you had to change your mind or plan

source_payload.title: 没有空的时候/改变计划

sub_questions.content:
Describe an occasion when you didn’t have enough time for something
Describe a time that you had to change your mind or plan

answers.title: 没有空的时候/改变计划
answers.content:
Well, for this part, I’m going to talk about a time I had dinner with my friend.

Last Saturday, my friend and I planned to go to a newly-opened restaurant which was becoming a big hit (成为大热门) on the SNS due to the recommendation of some Internet celebrities (网红) . It was said that people normally needed to queue up(排队) for at least 2-3 hours to have dinner there. What’s more, the restaurant didn’t provide table reservation service.

Well, unfortunately, things were not as smooth as they seemed to be(事情不如你所愿). A few hours before our date, I received a phone call from my boss saying that he needed me to come back to the office right now for some emergency cases, which meant, I would have no time to wait and line up. So, I called my friend immediately and told her the situation I was facing. Due to my sense of guilt (愧疚感), I insisted on not leaving my friend waiting in the line alone (把…丢下一个人) although she suggested that she could wait until I finished my work. Consequently, we changed our schedule and headed to (前往) a restaurant we normally go to, which was not that popular. Although it was a pity(有些遗憾) that we couldn’t try the trendy restaurant, what really matters for dinner is chatting and spending quality time with each other.
answers.summary: 上周六我本来约好了和朋友一起去一家新开的网红饭店吃饭，据说要排2-3小时队才能吃到，结果那一天我突然被老板/导师打电话说有事情需要我赶紧解决（讨论论文，工作上的急事要立马处理），这样的话我就没时间去排队取号等吃饭了，于是我打电话和朋友说了情况，我们晚些时候换了一家平时常去的人流量不大的饭店吃饭，尽管没吃到网红食物有点遗憾，但能和朋友在一起聊天总是开心的，我们可以下次再吃

topics.title: 第一次户外运动/空闲时光

questions.content: Describe an outdoor sport you played for the first time Describe a time you enjoyed your free time

source_payload.title: 第一次户外运动/空闲时光

sub_questions.content:
Describe an outdoor sport you played for the first time
Describe a time you enjoyed your free time

answers.title: 第一次户外运动/空闲时光
answers.content:
Well, for this part, I’m going to talk about my last experience of playing golf.

During some free time (在我空闲之时) last month, it was perhaps a spur-of-the-moment decision (一时兴起) to invite my friend to hang out(闲晃) nearby. There happened to be a golf course going on trial operation(试运营) , just a stone’s throw away from (在附近) her house. What’s more, since it was just launched, the price was reasonable and attractive. As a result, we made up our minds to play.

To tell the truth, that was my first time playing golf. But it didn’t matter at all, instead, I really enjoyed my time. To quickly get the gist of the sport, we asked for a coach. The coach was patient and careful enough to explain things from stance to grip to takeaway to downswing, everything(从站位、握杆到上挥杆、下挥杆整个过程的重来，所有一切), among which I learnt that grip, posture and pivot(握杆、站姿和转身) were the things that combined to create a beautiful-looking golf swing that would help you play better.

According to what I have experienced, I realized that golf is not only a graceful and elegant sport, but it is also a delicate game since your posture, hip movement and grip (身体的转动、预备动作、握杆) can all generate different connections (产生微妙关系) between balls and club faces. From then on, I decided to play golf once a month for self-cultivation.
answers.summary: 上个月周末我很闲，就约了朋友出去玩，正好她家附近开了一家新的高尔夫球场，开业价格很便宜，于是我们去打了高尔夫。我是第一次打高尔夫，我们请了教练，教练仔细地和我们讲解了站姿，握杆的姿势和打球的姿势，我了解到高尔夫是一种非常优雅的活动，并决心以后有空每个月都来打一次高尔夫修身养性

topics.title: 有趣的动物/改变计划/喜欢的杂志2

questions.content: Describe an interesting animal Describe a time that you had to change your mind/plan Describe a magazine you enjoy reading

source_payload.title: 有趣的动物/改变计划/喜欢的杂志2

sub_questions.content:
Describe an interesting animal
Describe a time that you had to change your mind/plan
Describe a magazine you enjoy reading

answers.title: 侧重改变计划
answers.content:
I’d like to talk about a time when I changed my mind to go to a Safari park, instead of a normal Zoo. So I’ve always been interested in wild animals.

I have been subscribing to the magazine called Nature since I was a high school student(我从高中起就开始订阅《博物》杂志). This magazine is about interesting stories from all over the world. In each month’s publication, there are pages about some wild animals. I’m often fascinated by how diverse the animal species are! That really broadened my horizon, and also raised my curiosity about the wild tigers. I wanted to see how they hunt in the wild.

So last year, after the school final exam, my parents and I arranged a trip to the city Zoo, where there is a large variety of animal species. But then I saw an ad for a Safari park in the Nature magazine, I realized that I could actually take that time to visit wild animals in a Safari park out in the country! The change of plan turned out worthwhile.

Unlike the Zoo, where animals are locked in cages and look dull, that Safari park was huge, clean, broad and quiet. Animals were running in the field, chasing their prey(追捕它们的猎物). For the first time, I saw tigers chase after a deer. They both ran as fast as lightning. It was thrilling to watch!
I totally enjoyed my trip there.

Well, I’m glad that I changed my mind at the last minute. If I hadn’t, I may still be stuck with the magazine description and trying hard in my head to picture what it’s like to see wild animals chasing in the field. (如果我当时没有改变主意的话，我可能现在还停留在杂志上的描述，而对动物们的真实生活一无所知) So yeah, the change of plans can sometimes turn out a surprise!(临时改变主意也许会有意想不到的惊喜).
answers.summary:
我从小就很喜欢看一本叫博物杂志的书，因为它会介绍有趣的动物以及动物世界的奇闻轶事，这让我拓展了眼界。后来有次考完期末考试我准备去动物园看动物
本来和爸妈说的是去普通动物园，后来改成了去野生动物园，因为普通动物园的老虎被关在笼子里，失去了森林之王的风采。而在野生动物园里，我亲眼见到了老虎捕猎动物，场面十分刺激，这让我对动物习性有了更深的理解，十分庆幸自己改变了行程

topics.title: 想参加的比赛/有趣的工作

questions.content: Describe a competition you would like to take part in Describe an interesting job that you want to have in the future

source_payload.title: 想参加的比赛/有趣的工作

sub_questions.content:
Describe a competition you would like to
 take part in
Describe an interesting job that you want to have in the future

answers.title: 想参加的比赛/有趣的工作
answers.content:
Recently, the challenge I want to participate in is the business analysis contest organized by my university. I first found out about this event when I was a freshman just enrolled in college; the business analysis contest was advertised by several seniors. They told us the judges were all great people in the industry and the prize was also quite generous(丰厚).

Their words did have some influence on me and on the very night I went back to the dormitory I started to look for relevant info online. I was quite interested in this business analysis contest because I wanted to do business analysis work in the future. Business analysis is of great importance and influence in the field of enterprise future development strategy. What’s more, the analysis of data is also very interesting and attractive to me. But in order to work on business analysis, it is necessary for me to have good business insight and analytical skills.

In addition to improving my grades and participating in student work, winning a prize in the contest can also help me to find a job I like.

Therefore, I prepared for the competition by watching some theoretical knowledge of marketing, financial analysis as well as gathering knowledge from other fields. I also consulted with(咨询) many seniors(大四) who once participated in this contest. I learned a lot from them. After thorough preparation of about two years, I won the second prize in the business analysis contest when I was a junior(大三) student. Hard work finally paid off(有付出有回报).
answers.summary: 我想参加学校组织的商业分析挑战赛，我是通过学姐宣传得知的，我想参加是因为未来我想做商业分析方向的工作，这一工作对企业未来战略发展有重要影响，同时分析数据也十分有趣，但这也需要我具备良好的商业嗅觉和分析能力。另外，除了提高成绩，参与学生工作外，通过大赛获奖也可以让我更好地找到心仪的工作。因此我会准备看一些市场营销、财务分析等方面的理论知识来为该比赛做准备

topics.title: 童年好友/手工礼物/丢东西

questions.content: Describe something important that you lost Describe a childhood friend of yours Describe something you made that you gave to other people

source_payload.title: 童年好友/手工礼物/丢东西

sub_questions.content:
Describe something important that you lost
Describe a childhood friend of yours
Describe something you made that you gave to other people

answers.title: 童年好友/手工礼物/丢东西
answers.content:
I had a very good friend from my childhood, who was my neighbor Yao Yao. As long as I could remember anything, she was always there beside me. We went to the same kinder garden and primary school. We often played together, did homework in my house or hers after school every day, and sometimes we did art projects in our spare time. When we finished with the handiwork, we usually gave it to each other as gifts.

I could still remember when I was in third grade in primary school, I spent a whole week folding paper starts(纸星星). And I bought a very beautiful glass bottle is the shape of a star to hold the paper stars in. The bottle was about 20 centimeters high and wide. When she saw the handmade gift, she liked it very much. The glass glittered(闪烁发光) under the sunlight and the paper stars looked so pretty. When I found out she liked it, I gave her the whole bottle of paper stars. This was what I made for her as her birthday gift. She was surprised and was quite happy about receiving the lovely gift. Then about one week later, she came to my house and gave me an oil painting with me and her on it. She told me she had spent the whole weekend and last three days to complete the outline and apply the color. The picture made me very touched, and I did like the painting very much. I preserve this picture well and hang it by the desk in my bedroom. However, when we all moved to a new house because of demolition(拆迁), this picture was lost. I couldn’t find it when we moved to the new house and I didn’t see it when I went back to the old house. I even didn’t know whether it was lost in the house or was left in the moving truck. I tried to contact the moving company looking for it, but they didn't find it. Yaoyao was the best friend from my childhood, but I lost the gift she gave me. I was depressed (沮丧) for quite a while.
answers.summary: 我童年有一个特别好的朋友，是我的邻居瑶瑶。从我有记忆开始，我们就经常一起玩，有时一起做手工，后来我们互送礼物，我送了她整整一瓶手工叠的纸星星，瓶子也是星星的形状，大概有二十厘米高，她也回赠了我自己画的油画，她花了整整三天才完成勾勒和上色，这让我十分感动，并把画好好保存，但后来因为拆迁我搬家了，这幅画也丢了，不知道是丢在房子里还是搬家公司车上，丢了以后我试图联系搬家公司找过但没有找到，瑶瑶是我童年最好的朋友，但她送的东西丢了，这让我沮丧了好一阵

topics.title: 想去的远行/网站/网上搜信息

questions.content: Describe a place you plan to travel to that is far away from your home Describe a website you like to visit Describe a time that you looked for information on the Internet

source_payload.title: 想去的远行/网站/网上搜信息

sub_questions.content:
Describe a place you plan to travel to that is 
far away from your home 
Describe a website you like to visit
Describe a time that you looked for information on the Internet

answers.title: 想去的远行/网站/网上搜索信息
answers.content:
When I have some spare time, I often search for travel information and visit a travel website called Ctrip(携程). This website is one of China’s largest travel and tour platforms and was recommended to me by my friends last year.

On the site, visitors share travel tips from around the world and covers every aspect of travel, including accommodation, travel, food and more. The netizens also share where they have gone, how they review the place they went to and give some tips to avoid the problems they met when they travelled.

I've always wanted to go to Hawaii for a vacation, and after watching a lot of tips shared by the netizens who have been to Hawaii, I decided to fly there during the summer vacation.
One of the most important reasons why I long to go to Hawaii is that Hawaii is really a paradise for divers. I am a great fan of extreme sports and diving is simply my favorite. I can go to Hawaii with my friends who love diving(潜水).
On Ctrip, we can book(预订) the dive and hire equipment to get ready for the trip in advance(提前).

I believe that after thorough preparation(充分准备) which took nearly half a year, such as reading many travel journals and writing down many traveling tips, it's going to be a great trip and I believe I could have great fun with my friends while diving.
answers.summary: 我空的时候常常搜寻旅游信息，浏览一个叫做“马蜂窝”的旅行网站，这个网站是去年朋友推荐给我的。在这个网站上，网友们会分享世界各地的旅游攻略，十分齐全有用，包含了住宿、旅行、美食等各种内容。我一直很想去夏威夷度假，看了很多夏威夷的攻略后，我准备在夏天的时候飞去那里。夏威夷是潜水爱好者的天堂，我可以和我热爱潜水的朋友们一起去。在马蜂窝上我们可以预约潜水的时间和租借设备，把旅行前的准备都做好。这一定会是一次很棒的旅行。

topics.title: 帮助别人/近期发生的开心的事

questions.content: Describe a happy experience you had before Describe an occasion when you helped a person

source_payload.title: 帮助别人/近期发生的开心的事

sub_questions.content:
Describe a happy experience you had before
Describe an occasion when you helped 
a person

answers.title: 帮助别人/近期发生的开心的事
answers.content:
That was a weekend. My friend and I were returning home from the shopping mall. We were rushing towards the subway station as there was heavy rainfall. Then we saw a man taking shelter from the rain (躲雨) at the entrance with bags in his hand. With no umbrella or raincoat, he was soaked through. He had one phone in his hand. He seemed very anxious and tried to stop people to ask for help. At first (一开始), I thought of simply ignoring him as it was raining heavily. But my conscience didn’t allow me and we decided to help. So we went to him and inquired about the situation. He told us that he was a deliverer as I expected, but he got an incomplete address and he couldn’t reach the customer. He was so worried that he couldn’t get to the place in time especially with the rain. We checked the address and suddenly an idea clicked in my head (出现了一个想法), my cousin‘s brother has been living nearby for a long time and he must know the nearby neighbour. so I called him and checked with him. Luckily, he was able to guess the housing estate and told us how to get there quickly.

It took maybe five minutes. What I did was barely make a phone call. But just for this simple gesture (举手之劳), he thanked me for it like 10 times. Seeing him leave, that one single moment, made me feel really proud of myself.
answers.summary: 最近有个周末，我和朋友晚上在商场逛街，突然外面下起暴雨，我们撑着伞走回家。路上遇到一个正在送外卖的外卖员，他手上拿着一份外卖，没有撑伞，全身都湿透了，在原地站了很久。我和朋友走过去询问，原来他找不到顾客写的地址，迷路了。我和朋友撑伞，把他送到附近的商场避雨。并且用手机地图查询了外卖客人的地址，告诉他正确路线。因为帮助了别人，那天我过的非常开心。

topics.title: 安静的地方/帮助集中注意力的事/最喜欢的歌

questions.content: Describe a quiet place you found Describe something that can help you concentrate on work/study Describe a favorite song of yours

source_payload.title: 安静的地方/帮助集中注意力的事/最喜欢的歌

sub_questions.content:
Describe a quiet place you found
Describe something that can help you concentrate on work/study
Describe a favorite song of yours

answers.title: 安静的地方/帮助集中注意力的事/最喜欢的歌
answers.content:
When I need to focus on work or study, I always go to a cafe near my home. The cafe is located at the end of an alley (巷子) where few people pass by. As for the surroundings, there are lots of green plants which cover the walls. Inside of the café, the seats are placed in a scattered(分散的) way. Each customer can have their own private space. If they don’t want to see others, they could draw the curtain beside the table. I do like it. Every customer and member of staff in the café is quiet and hardly makes any noise.

I discovered this place by accident when I was preparing for an exam during my second year at the university. Since then, I would come here to study or work for half a day every week. The cafe often plays quiet music and some of the songs they played really calm me down. One song they play regularly(定期的) is one of my favorite songs. The first time I heard the song was when I bought a reference book(参考书) in a bookstore near my university. It has no lyrics(歌词), only calming tunes.

The light and clear music make me feel relaxed and calm. In such an atmosphere, I could concentrate on my study and job without being interfered with by others.
Every time I go here, I can quickly focus on my study with the soft music played. So, I really like the background song and I really like the cafe.
answers.summary: 在我需要集中注意力工作或学习的时候，我都会到家附近的一家咖啡馆。这家咖啡馆很隐蔽，布置有很多绿植，座位分隔的比较开，大家都自觉的保持安静。我在中学备考的时候无意中发现了这里，后来基本每周都会来这里学习或工作半天。这家咖啡馆经常播放轻音乐《安静》。我第一次听到这首歌是在书店，他没有歌词，只有轻快的曲调。轻快明朗的乐调让我身心轻松愉悦，慢慢沉静下来，可以专心做事。每次来到这里，听到这首歌，我都能很快进入专注的状态。所以我非常喜欢这首歌曲，也很喜欢这间咖啡厅

topics.title: 只看过想要尝试的运动/朋友做过自己没做过的事

questions.content: Describe a sport that you have watched （on TV）and want to try Describe something interesting that your friend has done but you haven’t

source_payload.title: 只看过想要尝试的运动/朋友做过自己没做过的事

sub_questions.content:
Describe a sport that you have watched （on TV）and want to try
Describe something interesting that your friend has done but you haven’t

answers.title: 只看过想要尝试的运动/朋友做过自己没做过的事
answers.content:
When I was fifteen years old, I once hung out(结伴出游) with my friends. We were heading to the public park where we could practice skateboarding(滑板). Honestly speaking(老实说), that was literally(事实上) the first time I knew what skateboarding was and I had to admit that it was really amazing.

My friend Alice was obviously a skilled rider since she could manipulate(操控) her skateboard successfully. Later I became interested in this particular sport too but unfortunately there was not enough space in the public gardens for us to practice. Also, I felt unsafe if I practiced alone, so I wrote an appeal letter(诉求信) to the relevant government officials with the hope that more sport space should be provided to satisfy citizens' growing needs of doing exercise. Luckily, this summer when I came back to my hometown, I was excited to see that in many public parks, there were special sections specially designed for those skateboarding lovers, and what's better, every Saturday, there were several professional coaches guiding sports lovers to do exercises without hurting themselves.

Suffice to say, I wouldn't have been so curious about this sport if I hadn’t played with Alice that afternoon. Now, I am determined to introduce skateboarding to more people so together with other skateboarding fans we set up an institution(建立机构) named "Skateboarding Alliance" (滑板联盟) and we organize activities once or twice a week. I'm also happy to see that our government has emphasized public health more than before, for it has also provided other sports facilities in public places to guarantee that more people can participate in sports within walking distance(步行距离之内).
answers.summary: 我15岁的时候，和朋友去公园玩，朋友带了一块滑板来练习，这是我第一次看到滑板。她滑的非常熟练，速度也很快，看起来很刺激。滑板是一项很酷的运动，我也一直很想尝试这项，但是我的城市没有专业的滑板场地，担心自己练习不安全。希望家乡可以在公园增设专业的滑板场地，这样滑板爱好者们就可以周末来这里练习、比赛。

topics.title: 数学课学的有用技巧/健谈的人

questions.content: Describe a person you know who is talkative Describe some useful skills you learned in a math class from your primary/high school

source_payload.title: 数学课学的有用技巧/健谈的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe a person you know who is talkative
Describe some useful skills you learned in a 
math class from your primary/high school

answers.title: 数学课学的有用技巧/健谈的人
answers.content:
My math teacher in high school is very kind and she is also very talkative(健谈). She not only taught us a lot of math knowledge but also taught us many lessons about life. We all like her very much and appreciate (感激) her a lot for sharing her personal experience with us.

After class, she often chatted with us. Sometimes, we talked about some topics we were interested in, like the sports event to be held next week or the popular soap operas and movies we all watched in the spare time. And we also talk about something related to math, such as practical applications (应用) of mathematical thinking. She kept on telling us that math could not only be used in the academic test, it could also help a lot in real life if we are equipped with math thinking. It is because of her that I became interested in mathematics, which I always thought of as boring and tough. Let me share one of the examples she gave us about how useful math was. She taught us classification, one of the most common mathematical skills, was of great use to everyone. For example, if I want to lose weight(减肥), I could achieve this goal by absorbing fewer calories and spending more energy. She always helped us. I really respect and appreciate my math teacher.
answers.summary: 我的数学老师都非常亲切，不仅仅教会我许多知识。课后还经常跟我们聊天，会和我们聊一些我们感兴趣的话题，也会跟我们讲一些数学思维的实际应用。我也因为他而对数学产生了兴趣。尤其对分类讨论这种常用的数学技能。比方说我要减肥，我会从吸收和消耗两个方面来达到减肥目的。我平时经常我很尊敬并感激我的数学老师

topics.title: 有趣的动物/改变计划/喜欢的杂志

questions.content: Describe an interesting animal Describe a magazine you enjoy reading Describe a time that you had to change your mind/plan

source_payload.title: 有趣的动物/改变计划/喜欢的杂志

sub_questions.content:
Describe an interesting animal 
Describe a magazine you enjoy reading
Describe a time that you had to change your mind/plan

answers.title: 侧重动物话题
answers.content:
Well, I quite enjoy reading animal magazines, especially the one about the wild tigers inhabiting the northeast of China.(尤其是东北虎，定居在中国东北部的老虎) You see, unlike political and entertainment magazines where you only read about human relationships, in the animal magazines, I get to see a bigger picture of our mysterious and magnificent earth! (我更能看到地球的神秘和宏伟) There’s a huge diversity of species living on this planet that makes our living space colorful and interesting!

Out of all the species, I’ve always wished to see the wild tigers. Then a couple of months ago, my roommate suggested that we go to Japan for a short visit. You know, the time right after final exams is the best time to travel. I initially thought Japan was a good idea(我原本非常赞成去日本), but the day before that trip, I changed my mind. I decided to go to the Zoo instead to visit those beautiful tigers which are facing extinction(那些正面临灭绝的老虎). I may never see them again if I don’t see them soon.

And that change of mind was absolutely worthwhile(我那次改变注意改得太值了). They are so graceful with bright and smooth fur. The yellow stripe pattern on their backs looks like an oil painting. I was captivated by their exotic looks. Also, I happened to witness them chasing after their prey. Even living in the zoo, I guess the restraint was not enough to limit their wild nature. They were fast racers and called for resolute actions in hunting.

What I saw in the zoo confirmed what I read in the magazine about these tigers. I wish we could do something effective to protect these beautiful animals, so we’ll have more company on this planet.
answers.summary:
我从小就很喜欢看一本叫博物杂志的书，因为它会介绍有趣的动物以及动物世界的奇闻轶事，这让我拓展了眼界。后来有次考完期末考试我准备去动物园看动物
分别用第一段：我一直对东北虎充满好奇，这种老虎生活在东北，已濒临灭绝，有美丽的花纹，像一只优雅高贵的大猫，我在动物园亲眼看到它们追逐打闹捕猎动物，感到十分有趣

topics.title: 参加的聚会/特殊场合穿的衣服

questions.content: Describe a time that you wore a type of clothes for a special occasion Describe a party that you joined

source_payload.title: 参加的聚会/特殊场合穿的衣服

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time that you wore a type of
 clothes for a special occasion
Describe a party that you joined

answers.title: 参加的聚会/特殊场合穿的衣服
answers.content:
I’d like to talk about when I went to a picnic with my friends from high school. It was meant to be a reunion that we would review our high school days together, you know, because of study and work, we barely had time to even catch up on the phone, let alone seeing one another. So we decided to all dress up in high school uniforms to attend this party.

Unfortunately, I couldn’t find my high school uniform. I had to order something online that looked similar to it. But guess what? The real clothes looked childishly naive! And I had no time to return it, so I just put it on hoping people wouldn’t notice it. But obviously, how would they let me get away with it, right?(怎么会逃过这帮人的法眼呢？) They had so much fun looking at me in that weird uniform. Well, I guess the good thing was that I made people laugh.

Anyway, after the laughing and greeting, we got on with the food business. There were about 20 of us. The boys set up the barbecue cooker. And other people took out the food they brought, the grassland was covered in vegetables, seafood and bread. I was at a loss(我有点不知所措), to be honest, I never cooked before. I thought I should just dump the food into the fire and wait a while to take it out. Luckily, I didn’t say anything because I soon realized that if I had, I’d definitely have got laughed at again!(真庆幸我当时没说出来，要是说了，肯定又是一顿嘲笑).

I just stood there watching how others dip their food in sauce then carefully put them on the BBQ stove and kept turning them while cooking.

Wow, that was the first DIY meal I had in my life! I totally loved it! And we had so much fun catching up with one another! I don’t mind attending more parties like that!
answers.summary: 一次中学同学聚会，大家约定好穿校园风格的衣服，打扮成中学生的样子赴约。当时的衣服我已经找不到了，只好在网上临时买了一套。我们约在学校附近的公园，租了一套烧烤设备，在草坪上露天烧烤。大家各自带了烧烤食材，有蔬菜、肉和海鲜。这饭后我们重回学校看看，同学们都说我穿这身衣服，看起来就像在读生一样。这是我第一次自己动手烧烤、也是毕业后第一次和同学聚在一起，是一次难忘的时光。

topics.title: 第一部手机/街市购物

questions.content: Describe the time when you received your first cell phone Describe a time that you were shopping in a street market.

source_payload.title: 第一部手机/街市购物

sub_questions.content:
Describe the time when you received your first cell phone
Describe a time that you were shopping in a street market.

answers.title: 第一部手机/街市购物
answers.content:
I’m gonna talk about when I got my first cellphone from an Apple flagship store in my hometown. It’s about four years ago, I just graduated from high school and was getting ready to go to another city for college. In order to celebrate this big event in my life, my father decided to reward me with an Iphone. Well, back then in China, Iphone was regarded as a godly existence(神一般的存在), you know, all that legendary talks about Steve Jobs.

And indeed the talks weren’t all airy.(传说还真不是虚的) The service in the flagship store was awesome! We spent a whole afternoon there, and the staff was with us the whole time, patiently showing me how each function worked. Never for one moment did she lose patience! When she learned that I was going away for university, she gave me phone case for free plus a cute sticker. The bigger surprise was at the check-out, we were told that I could get a discount if I show my student card! I was over the moon about it!(简直把我高兴坏了) So was my father, well, that saved him a few hundred, you know.

The shopping experience was totally pleasant, and the phone was a baby!(这个手机好的不得了) Back then, Iphone 4 was the newest phone in the market at that time and it’s got the best camera. Perfect for my photography hobby. I also used it for entertainment, like, to play music, and to watch movies. The sound quality was impressive too! So yeah, I was absolutely satisfied with it!
answers.summary: 在我高中毕业那年，在家乡的一条商业街，爸妈带我购物并为我买了第一部手机。当时智能手机在中国刚刚普及，我买的第一部手机是一部白色苹果4。我们到苹果旗舰店挑选手机，店员给了我们非常周到的服务，耐心的教我苹果手机的每一个功能如何使用，并且赠送了我手机壳和贴纸，当时苹果还有学生优惠。购买过程非常愉快，我非常喜欢这部手机，用它我可以听歌、看电影、做学习笔记，给生活带来很多便利。

topics.title: 向家人借东西/有故障的设备

questions.content: Describe a time you borrowed something from friends or family Describe a time that a piece of equipment of yours was broken

source_payload.title: 向家人借东西/有故障的设备

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time you borrowed something 
from friends or family 
Describe a time that a piece of equipment of yours was broken

answers.title: 向家人借东西/有故障的设备
answers.content:
Our city usually has a very long rainy period, called the plum rain season. And the weather is rather muggy(闷热而潮湿) when the rainy season begins. I don’t like this period because sometimes the high ambient temperature and damp weather(高温潮湿天气) have detrimental influence(不利的影响) on our daily life. For example, our clothes are not able to be completely dry and things easily get mildewed(发霉) in the rainy season.

Last year, the rainy season came as usual and the clothes were all very wet after a series of wet days. Unfortunately, my dryer was broken. It stopped making heat. And I failed to fix it myself. Therefore, I had no choice but to borrow a dryer from my neighbor- Lady Lucas. She was a very good kind of woman, helpful, warm, chatty and friendly, a valuable neighbor to me. She greeted me warmly and then invited me to her house. We had a pleasant chat over a cup of tea. The talk was full of cordial (热情的) and friendly atmosphere from beginning to end. Thanks to Lady Lucas, I dried my clothes which had been wet for a week.

Later, I invited a qualified worker to repair my own dryer. I am extremely grateful to my neighbor-Lady Lucas. I would have no dry cloth to wear but for her. I think I should invite her to dinner to show my gratitude someday.
answers.summary: 去年梅雨季阴雨连绵，衣服潮的很，我们家的烘干机又坏了，无法制热，自己修没成功，于是只好向邻居朋友借用他们的烘干机，把我一个礼拜没干的衣服烘干了，后来我请了师傅来修终于修好了，我很感激我的邻居朋友

topics.title: 喜欢的建筑/童年游戏

questions.content: Describe a building you like Describe a game that you played in your childhood

source_payload.title: 喜欢的建筑/童年游戏

sub_questions.content:
Describe a building you like
Describe a game that you played in your childhood

answers.title: 喜欢的建筑/童年游戏
answers.content:
I love the pavilion behind the Children's Park Square next to my house. It resembles(相似，像) the old Pavilion which was used as resting places for travelers.

As its name suggests(正如其名称所示), It's supported by four wooden pillars and the top of it is covered with glazed tiles. The pavilion is architecturally complex(建筑结构复杂). Our city has a wealth of(许多) pavilions, but I think this one is the most intricately carved(精雕细刻). Besides, aesthetically it’s perhaps one of the most dramatic(从美学角度看，它是最引人注目的).

However, the significance of this invention- the pavilion goes beyond its utilitarian application(这亭子的意义远不止其实际的应用). Actually, it is a place of gathering, of leisure, and relaxation. Usually, there are lots of doves. Many tourists were attracted by them and photographed these doves in our pavilion. When I was a little kid, I enjoyed going there with my little friends. We were enthusiastic about(热衷于) playing the game -gyroscope. It was an outdoor activity most kids fond of at that time. The rule was that longer the gyroscope rotated, the better one performed. Actually, it took a lot of skills and patience. Although this activity has already gone out of our focus(淡出视野), I thought it was extremely interesting.
answers.summary: 我很喜欢我家旁边儿童公园广场后面的亭子，它是有点像古时候用于休息的那种亭子，有四根木质柱子支撑，房顶上还有塔尖铺满了琉璃瓦，平时嗨会有很多鸽子在那里逗留。我小时候很喜欢和小伙伴去那里玩耍，我们会玩转陀螺，陀螺转的越久越厉害，这当中需要许多技巧，我那时觉得非常有意思

topics.title: 在别人帮助下做的重要决定/家族企业

questions.content: Describe an important decision you made with the help of other people Describe a family business you know

source_payload.title: 在别人帮助下做的重要决定/家族企业

sub_questions.content:
Describe an important decision you made with the help of other people
Describe a family business you know

answers.title: 在别人帮助下做的重要决定/家族企业
answers.content:
When studying at university, the professor told us we should try to seize every opportunity to apply what we have learned in real life. So, I started to find some jobs/internships. After rounds of interviews (层层面试), I got two offers. One was for a government agency, and the other was to work for the largest family business in my hometown and local area. The latter one was a retail enterprise (零售企业), selling daily provisions for ordinary people, and I had known about it since childhood as my parents bought a lot of commodities there.

I found it difficult to make a choice, because I thought I could practice what I learned and accumulate experience in both options. So, I consulted (咨询) my friends of the same age. Later, after considering their opinions, I went to the family business, because they thought the work there was more challenging and I could develop and grow faster.

And so it proved that the collective wisdom (集体智慧) really worked. I got access to lots of new knowledge and skills. I learnt how to cooperate with others better, how to contribute to the team, and how to develop programs and negotiate with others. All of these are what I could not have learned in classroom.

After working for a week, I made handmade cards to all my friends. It took me half a day to fold the paper, write thank-you notes, and draw lovely pictures. I even put a pink flower in each card to show my appreciation. If it weren’t for them, it would have been quite hard for me to make such a good decision.
answers.summary: 我找工作/实习的时候有两个offer，一个是政府机关，一个是我们镇上的家族企业，我难以抉择，便向朋友和家长咨询，后来我综合考虑他们的意见后去了家族企业，从小去商场购物我便知道这个企业，它针对百姓卖各种百货，为居民提供了便利。我对这个决定十分满意，后来还送了给我建议的朋友们小手工卡片，我还在卡片里夹了粉色干花以表达最真挚的感谢

topics.title: 吓人经历/乘公共交通出行经历

questions.content: Describe an experience when you were scared Describe a trip that you went on by public transportation

source_payload.title: 吓人经历/乘公共交通出行经历

sub_questions.content:
Describe an experience when you were scared
Describe a trip that you went on by public transportation

answers.title: 吓人经历/乘公共交通出行经历
answers.content:
On weekend afternoon, my friends and I took a bus to the suburban farm to pick up organic fruits. We tried to buy a lot of organic fruits and vegetables from farmers who do not use chemicals, because our local supermarket stocks (供应) a limited range of organic fruit and vegetables.

However, our path to the suburban farm was not easy. I was sitting in the middle of the bus. As the driver drove out of the city, there were very few people on the bus. There were only a few strong tattooed men. They looked at us from time to time, which made us very scared. I guessed that they were going to steal or rob because I peered to(偷瞄到) see they were noticing us. After all, outer suburbs have a high incidence of (高发生率) robbery, crime, etc.

Thinking they were going to do something bad, I was so frightened that I hurried to the driver's side to start chatting with him. A few minutes later, those tattooed men got out of the bus in ahead. And I felt ease(放心) until they got off the bus. Actually, all of us should be more careful especially when we are away from home. Constant vigilance(警惕) is necessary in order to avoid accidents. Once we find someone around us is suspicious, we must take some reasonable actions to do self-defense.
answers.summary: 周末下午我和朋友坐公交车去郊区农庄采摘水果，我坐在车中间，快开出市区的时候车上人非常少，只剩几个长得强壮的男人，感觉他们时不时看下我们，这让我十分害怕，以为他们要偷东西或者抢劫，吓得我赶紧跑到司机身边开始搭讪聊天，后来那几个人提前下了车，我才放下心来

answers.title: 给钱作为礼物/漂亮物品/收到想要的物品/喜欢的节目
answers.content:
During the Lunar New Year celebration, my favorite activity is watching the Spring Festival Gala with my family. The Gala showcases various programs related to traditional Chinese culture, making it a delightful experience. Interestingly, during this celebration, the elders in the family would give the younger ones like me a generous red envelope as a gift.

You know, the red envelope is not a typical envelope with red color, our envelopes are usually so well-designed that everyone would find it beautiful on the first sight. We would use golden glitters to outline ancient animals like dragon, phoenix or animal of the year to decorate it.

This tradition serves as a reward and recognition for our good behavior and hard work in the past year, while also encouraging us to strive for even better in the coming year. I truly cherish the Lunar New Year festival as it allows us to gather together, enjoy the performances, and savor delicious festive treats. The bond created through these moments with my family fills my heart with joy and warmth, making it a celebration that I eagerly anticipate every year.
answers.summary:
庆祝春节的活动，我们在看我们最喜欢的春晚，因为春晚里面有各种各样的节目，长辈给了我们小辈一个大大的红包作为礼物，作为我们在去年表现良好，好好学习的奖励和夸赞，也祝愿我们明年能更加努力。

topics.title: 环保人士/有趣的演讲

questions.content: Describe a person who helps to protect the environment Describe an interesting talk or lecture

source_payload.title: 环保人士/有趣的演讲

sub_questions.content:
Describe a person who helps to protect 
the environment 
Describe an interesting talk or lecture

answers.title: 环保人士/有趣的演讲
answers.content:
I always care about environmental protection as it not only concerns people living in the world now, but also is related to the happiness of our descendants(子孙后代). Therefore, when my friend told me the Environment Bureau were to hold a lecture themed on environmental protection and they invite a professional environmentalist(环保主义者). Therefore, on last weekend, I went to the city library to listen to the lecture.

The speaker has been recycling garbage for nearly two decades, and he has accumulated much experience. He was once a cleaner, responsible for sweeping the floor in a famous scenic spot. He said he could collect over one ton of garbage a day during the peak tourist season(旅游旺季). In work, through his personal practice, he gradually found out ways to sort the garbage into recyclable and inrecyclable. According to him, the biggest difficulty is that residents have weak awareness of environmental protection. They just litter trash around or put them all in the same rubbish bin instead of throwing them in different bins. When he retired, he tried his best in promoting garbage recycling(垃圾回收). The topic may seem a bit boring, but the speech was not. He used vivid and humorous language, and gave us many examples. For instance, when explaining how developed countries performed garbage classification, he mentioned that France has forced residents to hand in 2 kg trash per month for sorted collection. I admire him very much.
answers.summary:
我参加了市图书馆举办的环保讲座，主讲人是一位从事垃圾回收20年的前清洁工。他分享了垃圾分类的实践经验，并以法国每月强制回收2公斤分类垃圾等生动例子，让环保话题变得有趣而发人深省。
Descendants - 子孙后代
Environmentalist - 环保专家
Peak tourist season - 旅游高峰期
Recyclable - 可回收的
Mandatory - 强制性的
Sorted collection - 分类回收
Activist - 环保活动家
Overlooked - 被忽视的

topics.title: 给你真正需要的东西/吃药

questions.content: Describe something given to you that you really need Describe a time that you had some medicine

source_payload.title: 给你真正需要的东西/吃药

sub_questions.content:
Describe something given to you that you really need 
Describe a time that you had some medicine

answers.title: 给你需要的东西/吃药
answers.content:
I’ d like to talk about one of my experiences that I went to zoo with my friends.

Once I went to a famous zoo with my friends, the zoo situated in the rural area where doesn’t have much public facilities(公共设施). The zoo was quite large and there were many wild animals lived in. Visitors can feed them from outside of fence made of iron. The view was quite fascinating(迷人的) as well. We had a good time there. In the evening we had an amazing dinner in the restaurant nearby the zoo. It was delicious but unfortunately I ate too much that I started to feel ill in my stomach. What’s worse, I didn’t bring any medicine with me. I was sick and frustrated as it was going to be long way home. Suddenly one of my friends remembered that her mother prepared some medicine for him in case(以防) we needed. She found them in his back bag. After I took the medicines, I felt much better and then we went back home safely.

I was grateful that my friend helped me when I felt hopeless. I think that we should always care for other people and look after each other. A friend is sometimes your closest people besides your family. He may appear at anytime when you are stuck(陷入困境) by life. Also, we should always remember the hand that he gave to you and always be appreciated and use your power to support him.
answers.summary: 有一次我和同学去郊外动物园游玩，吃坏了东西，拉了好几次肚子，但我没有一颗治拉肚子的药，还好我的朋友随身带了腹泻药，把他给了我，感激之余十分庆幸，也觉得以后出门也得准备一些常用药以备不时之需

topics.title: 独自空闲时的活动/长期学习的技能

questions.content: Describe an activity that you would do when you are alone in your free time Describe a skill that took you a long time to learn

Describe a skill that took you a long time to learn

answers.title: 独自空闲时的活动/长期学习的技能
answers.content:
The activity that I would do when I am alone is practicing my oral English. Every morning when I wake up, I will go find a quiet place to read the text book. The front door of library and the balcony of dormitory are both good places to practice my oral English. By enhancing(提高) the oral speaking skills, one must to be persistent(坚持). I get up early almost every day in order to read loudly the articles without bothering(打扰) other students, and sometimes I will also repeat phrase by phrase when I am listening to the radio. After finishing my morning reading, I feel fresh and full of energy. It is like a good beginning of the new day.

The reason that I practice my oral English is that I am a student of a language university, however my English wasn’t good enough. What’s more, I was unconfident when I had just entered in the university as all my roommates were excellent in English. I haven’t had enough courage to speak English in the class, which made me extremely frustrated(沮丧). Also, nowadays the English has become one of the basic qualifications of entering a good enterprise.
Besides I am fond of English culture and literature, I am always looking forward to study in London. I have once been to there, the streets were clean and the architecture was magnificent too. I fell in love with this city but I stayed there only for several days. So I decided to study in London one day.
answers.summary:
我一个人时常常练习英语口语，口语表达是一个需要长期练习的技能，每天早晨醒来，我会去空旷的地方练习英语口语，图书馆大门前，阳台上都是练习口语的好地方。我几乎每天早上都会拿着英语教材或者英语app里的文章，早晨在空旷的地方大声朗读几遍。
因为我之前的口语不是很好，所以我想通过自己的长期坚持和努力来改善。而且我觉得这对我的职业生涯也大有裨益

topics.title: 青少年/令人发笑的电影或电视剧

questions.content: Describe a teenager that you know Describe a film or TV program that made you laugh

source_payload.title: 青少年/令人发笑的电影或电视剧

sub_questions.content:
Describe a teenager that you know
Describe a film or TV program that made you laugh

answers.title: 青少年/令人发笑的电影或电视剧
answers.content:
I’d like to describe a teenager who I learnt about on a reality show called <The transformation>, which I saw with my mom every Friday night.

The main idea of this program is to invite some teenagers who are not celebrities(名人) but all born in rich families to join in a half-month long life in the countryside. It is quite educative(有教育意义的) for especially those young kids born and lived in the city, having no experience of such hard life. Through this documentary, I’ve met a teenager in a group of family who is called QIAN Duoduo. He was quite different from other youngsters in the show. He was capable of(有能力做某事) doing household chores(家务事) as well as bargaining(砍价) when shopping. He adapted quickly to living in the country. But he liked also playing video games as his contemporaries. On the contrary, his father was the one who couldn’t live in the countryside and made a lot of funny accidents during the show. I still remember one extract I saw which made me laugh. It was about a task that he had to complete, to kill a chicken. He was too scared that he threw the chicken away and jumped suddenly. It was more like a clown than a farmer.

Actually nowadays there are many rich families that spoiled their children, resulting in that they don’t have the basic knowledge of how to make living by themselves. I think that this kind of reality show is sending a message of these parents that to make their children become independent(独立的).
answers.summary: 我上周六和妈妈一起看了综艺节目《变形记》，这是一档素人真人秀节目，记录的是几组城市的富裕家庭来到农村体验生活的经历，通过该节目，我认识了其中一组家庭的青少年钱多多，这名青少年和大多数富二代不同，会做家务，会砍价，很适应当地生活，不过也像大多数孩子一样喜欢打游戏。节目里，反而是爸爸无法适应乡村生活而闹出了很多笑话，比如杀鸡害怕的跳来跳去，十分有趣，相比之下多多就十分懂事了

topics.title: 投诉/糟糕服务/好法律

questions.content: Describe a complaint that you made where you were satisfied with the result Describe an occasion when you received bad service Describe a good law in your country

source_payload.title: 投诉/糟糕服务/好法律

sub_questions.content:
Describe a complaint that you made where you were satisfied with the result
Describe an occasion when you received bad service
Describe a good law in your country

answers.title: 投诉/糟糕服务/好法律
answers.content:
This topic has reminded me of a recent experience I had of safeguarding my legal rights in a supermarket, and I am glad to talk about it.

Around one month ago, I purchased a cup of yoghurt in a local supermarket. However, it appeared that it was out of date and undrinkable, which infuriated(激怒) me, as I felt cheated and disrespected. Finding out that the product was of bad quality, I went to the supermarket again, attempting to report the issue to the manager and complain(投诉). Much to my surprise, the employee at the counter was unfriendly and even impatient, as she didn’t even acknowledge that the yoghurt was a product of the supermarket. This made me extremely angry, and as a person familiar with law enforcement, I told them I will report it to the 12315 hotline if the problem were not properly dealt with. As I had speculated, after I made such an announcement, their attitudes reversed(转变) all of a sudden, they became very patient and helpful, and offered to solve my problem.

From this experience I had a month ago, I grew grateful for the law of Consumers’ Rights Protection, which guarantees(保障) consumers’ legal and reasonable rights. Thanks to its enforcement, I was able to protect my rights and solve the problem. The law is popularized during the annual consumers’ day every year, which also familiarized me with the law. In my opinion, I deem it a strong and great regulation, protecting our rights from being infringed (侵犯).
answers.summary:
一个月前我一个人在超市里买了酸奶，是过期的，我和服务台人员投诉了这件事情，一开始他们态度很差，并不承认这是他们卖的
后来我说我要打12315热线反映，他们这才根据《消费者权益保护法》妥善解决了此事，每年315国家都会大力宣传此法，因而我了解它，它让商家不敢随意欺骗祸害消费者，十分感谢这部法律，让我维权成功

questions.content: Describe an interesting part of your country Describe an important plant in your country Describe a beautiful city that you know

answers.title: 有趣的地方/重要的植物/美丽的城市
answers.content:
An ji is a beautiful city and the scenery in An ji could always take my breath away(令我惊叹). Bamboos are the specialties in Anji. they grow luxuriantly(繁荣生长) here, and make this place a sea of bamboo. Bamboos have long straight stems. They don’t have any branches, and just grow lots of deep and wide roots. There is a saying that bamboo is the fastest-growing plant on Earth! They have the color of emerald green(翠绿), and thus it may be difficult to tell bamboos from sugarcane. Bamboos are extremely important for local people. Not only can bamboos purify the air and reduce noises, they can also be made into various commodities, including tubes, combs, buckets, floor, houses, pictures, sheds，from soup to nuts(应有尽有).

I knew this place when I planed for my trip in summer holidays. I was attracted by the world of green at once. There are plenty of streams hidden among the lush forests of bamboo and hard woods or next to a winding pathway. Tourists can set a boat drifting(漂流) in these streams, playing with water and enjoying the breeze, which is a great enjoyment. The water is so clear that you can see to the bottom. Local people in Anji are simple and sincere, and in this place, doors are unbolted at night(夜不闭户). I love this land, and I hope that one day I can come back and live in Anji.
answers.summary: 浙江安吉是一个美丽的城市，该地的竹子非常有名，茂盛生长的竹子形成了美丽的竹海，竹子很长，绿色，长得有点像甘蔗。竹子在当地非常重要，它不仅能净化空气，还能做成日用品，比如竹筒，刻版画，竹梳子，竹水桶，竹地板，竹棚，竹屋……我有次寻找旅游目的地时知道了它。当地还有小溪，可供游人漂流，嬉戏戏水，十分有趣。有山有水有竹林

answers.title: 有趣想见的人/喜剧演员/没见过但想见的人
answers.content:
The person I would like to know more/introduce/meet is Wang Baoqiang, who is a household name(家喻户晓的名字) in China. He is a comic, and has participated in a reality show, Takes A Real Man, and by watching this show I come to know him. Wang used to be a simple farmer living in rural areas, but later he was discovered by a famous director to be a comedian. He has starred in several successful films, and my favourite one is named Lost in Thailand, which is filled with slapstick humor. (闹剧).

Wang is now an A-lister(一线演员), but he has changed. He always maintains a humble stance(保持谦逊) and still leads his life in a frugal way(生活俭朴), though he is wealthy and rolling in it(腰缠万贯). Wang acts in a highly individual way that could always make people roar with laughter. It’s his qualities of perseverance and exceptional ability(出众的实力) that make him become well-known throughout the country.

He could always talk with a sense of humor in interviews, which makes me curious about him. He often talks about his past. He used to work as a construction worker, farmer and extra actor. At that time, Wang rolled around in the mud of life (摸爬滚打) but he kept his hope for a better tomorrow. I wonder his secret of keeping optimistic and improving acting skills. If possible, I sincerely hope that one day I can perform a in comedy with Wang Baoqiang.
answers.summary: 著名的喜剧演员王宝强，参加了一档电视节目《真正男子汉》，从这档节目我认识了他。王宝强在出名之前是一位淳朴的农民，后来成了一名喜剧演员。之后我去看了他的电影作品——泰囧，他的喜剧风格非常独特，总是能让人开怀大笑。他坚毅的品质和出众的表演实力让他闻名全国。在采访中，他也十分诙谐幽默，这让我对他充满了好奇，我想知道他保持快乐和磨练演技的秘诀。我希望自己将来有机会能和他一起演一小段喜剧。

answers.title: 学习的地方/最近读的书/二外
answers.content:
The last book that I read was a Language teaching book called “Family Album France”. My friend recommended it to me. This book focuses on teaching people French in a different way. It’s not like a traditional Language learning book. it uses few cartoon dialogues (卡通对话) and comical stories (漫画故事) to teach French expressions(法语表达).

I grab my book to study every weekend, the place where I study is very nice and quiet. It’s actually a educational institution(教育机构) where tutors provide classes to teach French grammar. I have French classes during the weekends and during the weekdays I study by myself in the classroom. I enjoy spending time there not only because it’s close to my home, but also because of the quiet environment. They have single study room for each student, which means nobody is gonna bother when you are studying.

My tutor treats me like friends. I remember he would always help me with my Grammar because it was my weakest part. After the guidance of him, I felt that I’m able to use expressions that native speakers use in a more natural way(用更加地道的方式). I think the both book and my tutor are great because they has changed the boring way of learning language.

French just gives me the impression of being a kind of language that sounds really elegant(法语给我的印象是一种优雅的语言), you know, I feel really good about (十分喜爱) the tune, and the grammar as well. In my mind, French is very different from Chinese because it uses simpler grammar but expresses the meaning accurately.
answers.summary: 我最近在学法语，所以一直在看《走遍法国》，这是一本关于法语学习的教科书。我周末会在家附近的辅导机构跟着老师学习，平时也会在那里一个人自习，因为那里十分安静。我觉得法语是十分优美的语言，简明干练，语义清晰，而这本教科书则让我掌握了初步的法语知识，还配有小故事插图，十分有趣
