answers.title: 森林公园
answers.content:
I'd like to describe a place I visited where I had the chance to see wild animals. It was a forest park located just outside my city. I went there last spring, seeking a break from the hustle and bustle of urban life. The park is known for its diverse wildlife and lush, green landscapes.

During my visit, I was fortunate to spot various wild birds. The park is home to species like woodpeckers, robins, and even the occasional hawk. I spent hours walking along the trails, quietly observing and photographing these beautiful creatures in their natural habitat. The experience was both exhilarating and calming, as the tranquility of the forest and the sight of the animals in their element were truly captivating.

The forest park is a special place for me because it offers a rare chance to connect with nature and see wildlife up close. I feel a deep sense of peace and appreciation whenever I visit. The photos I took of the wild birds are precious to me, capturing moments of natural beauty and serenity.

In addition, I got a special photo in this park: it's a vibrant red cardinal perched on a tree branch. This photo is special because it perfectly captures the essence of the park and the joy I felt during my visit. I plan to keep this photo for a long time to remind me of this peaceful escape and the amazing wildlife I encountered.
answers.summary: 我去了城外的一个森林公园，该公园以其多样的野生动物和郁郁葱葱的绿色景观而闻名。我还拍到了蜡嘴鸟的照片。

topics.title: 想去但没时间做的事/户外运动

questions.content: Describe a situation when you don't have enough time Describe an outdoor sport you played for the first time

source_payload.title: 想去但没时间做的事/户外运动

sub_questions.content:
Describe a situation when you don't have enough time
Describe an outdoor sport you played for the first time

answers.title: 想去但没时间做的事/户外运动
answers.content:
Um… That was my winter vacation last year, I suppose, and the whole family of mine decided to go on a trip together. Our agent suggested a skiing trip for us, and I was like all for it, coz I’ve never ever tried that before in my life.

So we went up north, and in the ski resort, after like three thousand falls, I finally got the hang of it, well, to some very limited extent(极为有限地). Although I hired a professional coach, and he really was good, the first time was still quite challenging to me. Basically I just understood how to start and how to brake – or perhaps more like(其实可能更像是) how to fall and stop. But anyway I was having so much fun. At this moment, unfortunately, our guide was calling it off, coz we were supposed to get to the next spot according to our itinerary(旅行日程). You see, there were like thirty or so people in our group, and some of them had already changed and been waiting. So I had to put an end to my first skiing experience right there.

Well, I’m a self-proclaimed sporty person, but that actually means that I’m just into sports, not that I’m terribly good at them. But I’d very much like to try. And this first time, although brutally interrupted(被残忍中断), was a marvellous time. I think I’ll try again this winter vacation, and this time I’ll probably go with my friends, without signing up for any route in the travel company - I just wanna do it all day.
answers.summary: 有一年我们全家跟的旅行团去滑雪，这是我因为第一次滑雪非常兴奋，在经历无数跌倒失败以后，我刚刚学会xxx的技巧，正准备大展身手，导游要催着我们赶去下一个景点了~我只能恋恋不舍地停下来，结束了我的第一次短暂的滑雪。

topics.title: 游戏节目/不用学习或工作的一天

questions.content: Describe a game show or a quiz program you watched on TV or online Describe a free day when you did not need to study or work

source_payload.title: 游戏节目/不用学习或工作的一天

sub_questions.content:
Describe a game show or a quiz program you watched on TV or online
Describe a free day when you did not need to study or work

answers.title: 游戏节目/独自空闲的活动
answers.content:
In my spare time, I like to stay at home and watch TV series or variety shows. On weekends, I usually lie in my cozy bed and watch the shows while eating snacks. It’s really relaxing. It’s like giving my brain a day off. I don’t need to think about work or study. All I need to do is lie there and relax.

I would like to share my favorite show with you. It’s called“Keep Running”. It is a Chinese variety show broadcast on Zhejiang TV. It’s a spin-off (衍生品) from the popular original South Korean variety show “Running Man” by SBS. The host team consists of famous actors, actresses, and gagmen. My favorite actor is Chen. He’s in this show. Every member has done really well. In the show, several guests are divided into different groups for several rounds of competition. Some of the games are really hilarious. The most important reason why I like this show is that it conveys (传递) positive values. The winner receives a prize for public welfare, such as cooling supplies for sanitation workers or donations for children in poor areas. They have shown their personalities and the spirit of never giving up (永不放弃的精神). Also, they are not afraid of challenges and the audience cheers for them(为……欢呼) during their performance.
answers.summary: 我空的时候就喜欢一个人躺在家/宿舍里追追剧看看综艺什么的，一般都是周末的时候瘫在床上一边吃零食一边看，很放松自我。我可以和你分享一个我喜欢的综艺节目，叫做跑男。在这个节目里，几位嘉宾分成不同小组进行几轮环节的比拼，最后角逐出胜负，里面会有很多笑点。不过我喜欢他最重要的原因还是节目所传达的价值观，赢的一方可以获得公益奖品，比如为环卫工人置办夏日福利，给贫困山区小孩捐款等

topics.title: 公园/糟糕的服务

questions.content: Describe a park or garden you like visiting Describe an occasion when you received bad service

source_payload.title: 公园/糟糕的服务

sub_questions.content:
Describe a park or garden you like visiting
Describe an occasion when you received bad service

answers.title: 公园/糟糕的服务
answers.content:
Well, I think that was about two weeks ago, during the Dragon Boat Festival. I just bought a new DSLR (数码单反), you know, one of those really cool and fancy cameras, so I invited my best friend Lucy, and planned to go to a nearby botanic park to take some photos. You see, the park has always been our traditional place of rendezvous (见面地点) since we were very young, as the scenery is marvellous with all the rare peonies and jasmines. And if you show your student ID, the entry will only cost you five rmb – and if you’re young or old enough you can even get in for free.

Park：.
The park is a wonderland, like, the plants are not simply grown on the ground, instead, they are shaped into all kinds of intriguing figures, like Iron Man or Micky Mouse. Officially, they are named topiaries (植物造型), but I call them ‘Green Statues’. I wonder if they are also going to make Hulk, because, you know, he’s green (冷笑话). So, you see, it’s quite easy to get great pictures, as you can sort of ‘interact’ with the figures. We also took some photos of the flowers, like the rare breeds of peonies and jasmines I mentioned just now. Although the ticket price is already really cheap, the park provides a free guide service on top. I guess it's sort of government-funded, so if you want to learn about plants, this is absolutely a great opportunity.

Bad service:.
You see, everything was supposed to be perfect. The thing was, when we turned up at the entrance, the member of staff in the ticket office had a long face(脸色阴沉) for some reason. And I have to say, she has an attitude problem. You know, I don’t actually need a warm smile or anything like that, but she was acting like she didn’t see us. After about the third time I reminded her of what I was doing there, so she finally looked up, but only slightly, apparently unwillingly. I then passed her our student IDs and cash and she literally THREW the IDs back at me, and said we have to buy adult tickets. To be honest, I was more appalled than angry (与其说生气，其实震惊的成分更多一些), so I warned her I’d make a complaint to the management, which I think worked. She then reluctantly fulfilled her duty and gave us the student tickets.
answers.summary: 前几天端午节假期的时候，我拿着新买的单反和发小一起去了我家附近的植物园，想去拍照。我们从小就经常来这里，因为景色很美丽，而且拿学生证的话门票只要五块钱。结果到了售票处，那个工作人员的态度非常不好，没有任何理由就拒绝我们买学生票。最后我们提出要打电话投诉，她才非常不情愿地让我们买了票。

topics.title: 特殊场合吃食/健康生活方式

questions.content: Describe a type of food people eat during a special event Describe a healthy lifestyle you know

source_payload.title: 特殊场合吃食/健康生活方式

sub_questions.content:
Describe a type of food people eat during a special event
Describe a healthy lifestyle you know

answers.title: 特殊场合吃食/健康生活方式
answers.content:
Well, speaking about this topic, I would like to introduce to you a traditional Chinese festival called the Double Ninth Festival. What we have learnt from childhood is that on the ninth day of the ninth month, we are supposed to climb high and gaze far (登高望远), as well as have a special dessert called double-ninth cake, which is a kind of sweet-waxy (甜糯) food made of steamed glutinous rice(蒸过的糯米). Every year when the Double-ninth day approaches, there are always long queues waiting in front of the dessert stores. What really matters is not the taste of those cakes, but instead, that these special traditions embody the blessings of health and longevity(祝福健康长寿) for the elders in the family.

In reality, climbing itself is a healthy activity. People climb great heights(登高) not only to enjoy the distant views(眺望远景), but also to acquire a kind of inner peace. In order to make the climb, most people, especially the elderly, start to climb(向上爬) at 6:00 a. m. In my experiences, each time we have climbed the mountain, we are dripping with sweat(酣畅淋漓) and unappreciative of the surroundings, but that feeling of conquering the mountain(征服大山) is something you hold in your mind forever. That’s why it is said that you climb the mountain to find a balance between restlessness and exhaustion(在焦躁不安和筋疲力尽之间找一个平衡).
answers.summary: 说到这个，我想先介绍个中国的传统节日重阳节，从小我们就知道重阳节要登高望远并吃重阳糕，重阳糕由糯米蒸成，十分甜糯。这些习俗包含了对家中老人健康长寿的祝福。事实上，登高本身就是个健康的生活方式，一般大家，尤其老年人会晨起6点爬山登高，锻炼身体，放松身心，呼吸山内新鲜空气。

topics.title: 好消息/网上搜信息/俊男靓女

questions.content: Describe a piece of good news that you heard from the TV or the Internet Describe a time that you looked for information from the Internet Describe a beautiful woman or a handsome man that you have seen

source_payload.title: 好消息/网上搜信息/俊男靓女

sub_questions.content:
Describe a piece of good news that you heard from the TV or the Internet
Describe a time that you looked for information from the Internet 
Describe a beautiful woman or a handsome man that you have seen

answers.title: 好消息/网上搜信息/俊男靓女
answers.content:
Well, for this part, I would like to introduce my idol, Liying Zhao.

I started to know of her in a TV series called Legend of Lu Zhen that I watched in my middle school. She owns a round face with sweet smiles, and expressive brown eyes that literally spark(明亮闪耀的).

Liying has a good taste for dresses. At the same time, her bodily proportions are quite flattering(身材比例好) although she's only 164 cm tall. Besides, as an actress, she is a girl with a slim build and fine face(天使脸蛋魔鬼身材). She always manages to change her style by taking advantage of(利用) her good figure, which makes her trendy (使..焕然一新) and attractive all the time.

Last month, when I was searching for her latest schedule announcement on Weibo, which is a popular app and basically the Chinese version of twitter, I found that she had just announced her marriage.

I received this news with both surprise and excitement(又惊又喜). Pleased as I was(倒装) profoundly(由衷地) that my idol had finally found her soulmate and true love in life, I still felt a little bit reluctant (心底里的不情愿) from the bottom of my heart to accept the fact that she would now have her own family and belong to another man in this world.
answers.summary:
我想给你介绍我很喜欢的偶像赵丽颖，我是从中学时看一部叫陆贞传奇的电视剧知道她的，她脸圆圆的，笑容很甜，眼睛很亮，非常好看。

上个月我照常刷寻找爱豆最新日程通告的时候突然看到爱豆公布了结婚的喜讯，爱豆能够找到自己的意中人我由衷的感到高兴，同时又有一种嫁女儿的不舍得的感觉

topics.title: 喜欢到不喜欢的人/熊孩子

questions.content: 不喜欢到喜欢的人/熊孩子 Describe a person you disliked at first but ended up being friends with Describe a time when you saw children behave badly in public

source_payload.title: 喜欢到不喜欢的人/熊孩子

sub_questions.content:
不喜欢到喜欢的人/熊孩子
Describe a person you disliked at first but ended up being friends with
Describe a time when you saw children behave badly in public

answers.title: 不喜欢到喜欢的人/熊孩子/希望一起工作/学习的人
answers.content:
A few months ago, I was at a small café(咖啡馆), enjoying a quiet afternoon with a book. Suddenly, a little boy, around 5 years old, started running around, knocking over chairs and loudly demanding(吵闹着要) ice cream from his mother. His face was smeared with(沾满) chocolate, and his energy seemed endless. The other customers, including me, were clearly annoyed(恼火)—some sighed, while others gave disapproving looks(不赞成的眼神). His mother looked exhausted(精疲力尽), trying to calm him down, but he kept shouting and even bumped into a waiter carrying drinks.

At first, I thought he was just a spoiled, unruly(被宠坏的、不守规矩的) kid. But then, something unexpected happened. When his little sister dropped her stuffed toy, he immediately stopped his tantrum(发脾气), picked it up, and gently handed it back to her, saying, "Don’t cry, I got it!" His whole demeanor(态度) changed—his loudness turned into soft murmurs(小声嘀咕) as he comforted her. Seeing that, my irritation(烦躁) melted away.

Later, I even overheard him apologizing(道歉) to the waiter in a tiny voice. It made me realize that kids aren’t just "bad"—sometimes, they’re just overwhelmed(情绪失控) or still learning how to behave. That little troublemaker(捣蛋鬼) turned out to have a sweet heart underneath all the chaos(混乱). Now, whenever I remember that moment, I smile. It taught me not to judge too quickly(过早下定论).
answers.summary:
在咖啡馆目睹一个5岁男孩吵闹捣乱，起初以为他被宠坏了。但当他温柔帮妹妹捡玩具并道歉时，才明白孩子并非"顽劣"，只是情绪失控或正在学习规矩。这个"小捣蛋鬼"的暖心举动让我消气，也教会我不要过早评判他人。
Demanding – 吵闹要求的
Smeared – 沾满
Disapproving – 不赞成的
Unruly – 不守规矩的
Tantrum – 发脾气
Demeanor – 态度
Irritation – 烦躁
Overwhelmed – 情绪失控的
Troublemaker – 捣蛋鬼

topics.title: 历史时期/高智商的人/儿时榜样

questions.content: Describe a historical period you would like to know about Describe an intelligent person that you know Describe a person you wanted to be similar to when you were growing up

source_payload.title: 历史时期/高智商的人/儿时榜样

sub_questions.content:
Describe a historical period you would like to know about
Describe an intelligent person that you know
Describe a person you wanted to be similar to when you were growing up

answers.title: 历史时期/高智商的人/儿时榜样
answers.content:
Well, speaking of history, I am intrigued with (对…感到好奇) the Qianlong period in Chinese history. On the one hand, there’s many TV series which are declared to be composed (被撰写) according to this period of history. I have learnt a lot from them but have no idea whether they are relatively well-founded (有事实依据的) or just fake stories. On the other hand, I’m passionate about having a general idea of Kangxi and Qianlong’s “times of prosperity(康乾盛世)”.

As far as I know, Ji Xiaolan and He Shen played significant and irreplaceable roles in royal courts (朝廷的支柱). Having a look at a TV show named The Bronze Teeth in my childhood, I considered Ji a brilliant person since he was smart and had a good sense of humor. What’s more, being involved in the revision of the “imperial collection of four(四库全书)”, he enjoyed a high reputation (享有很高的名誉) due to his literary achievement.

At an early age, I have dreamed of becoming a person like him. To be more specific (详细来说), I hope to become a person who is well-versed in the learning of both ancient and modern times(学贯古今) as well as a person who is able to have critical analysis towards the reality behind the phenomenon, thus making a contribution to society.
answers.summary:
我对乾隆时期的历史很好奇，一来关于清朝的电视剧很多，我从电视上了解了很多但不知真假，二来我也想了解康乾盛世的盛景

我知道乾隆时期，纪晓岚和和珅是朝廷的两大支柱，我小时候看铁齿铜牙纪晓岚这部电视剧，觉得纪晓岚十分聪明，在文学上成就很高，修订了四库全书，并且为人很幽默。

我小时候就也想成为他那样聪明的人，也更希望有朝一日能成为一个学贯古今的人，能够对现实世界的现象进行批判性的分析，做一个贡献社会的人

topics.title: 以前不喜欢现在喜欢的科目/教晚辈新东西/对学习/工作有帮助的事

questions.content: Describe a subject that you used to dislike but now are interested in Describe an occasion when you taught someone younger something new Describe something you do to help your study or work

source_payload.title: 以前不喜欢现在喜欢的科目/教晚辈新东西/对学习/工作有帮助的事

sub_questions.content:
Describe a subject that you used to dislike but now are interested in
Describe an occasion when you taught someone younger something new
Describe something you do to help your study or work

answers.title: 以前不喜欢现在喜欢的科目/教晚辈新东西/对学习/工作有帮助的事
answers.content:
Well, for this part, I’m going to talk about how l taught my cousin to first learn English.

Last summer vacation, I was entrusted by (受嘱托) my aunt to coach my cousin and to give him a preview of(预习) the English course for next semester. My cousin is a boy who has no interest in English and therefore gets poor grades. To tell the truth, neither did I(倒装否定) have enthusiasm for English before. Worse still, I considered it of no use (无用的) and had trouble reciting words. But later on, I learned how to recite them whenever and wherever possible (无论何时何地) by taking advantage of vocabulary cards, which provided a great benefit to me.

First, they keep all the words out-of-order (乱序). Second, for every word on the card, methods are provided to remember it in shorthand. Last but not least, they relieved me of (使我拜托) the difficulties of reciting words.

Thanks to this method, I gradually have had a larger vocabulary, and therefore have found my passion for English. I have realized that English, as a tool, is able to help me broaden my horizons and have a better command of international and domestic information.

I taught the same method to my cousin last summer vacation as well. He was not quite willing to learn at first. However, under my supervision(在我的监督下), he persevered and managed to memorize new words. I was really satisfied and achieved a sense of accomplishment with my methods of learning being recognized.
answers.summary:
去年暑假受姨妈所托，我教了我表弟预习新学期的英语知识，他不喜欢英语所以英语成绩很不好
我以前也很不喜欢英语，觉得背单词很麻烦，但后来我学会了利用单词卡片来随时随地背单词。单词卡片好处很多，第一单词乱序，第二每个单词卡片都有速记单词的很有趣的方法，第三方便随身携带，它帮助我克服了背单词的障碍
在学会快乐背单词以后，我慢慢喜欢上了英语，觉得英语能帮助我开拓眼界，更好地了解国内外新闻
我去年暑假也教了我表弟相同的方法，他一开始不太情愿但使用这个方法几天后，坚持了下来，掌握了新单词，我觉得掌握正确的学习方法很重要

topics.title: 公共设施/捡到遗失物

questions.content: Describe a newly built public facility that has influenced your city Describe something you found

source_payload.title: 公共设施/捡到遗失物

sub_questions.content:
Describe a newly built public facility that has influenced your city
Describe something you found

answers.title: 公共设施/捡到遗失物
answers.content:
Last year, there was a newly-opened Imax-equipped(有Imax影厅的) theater in the city center. Normally those cinemas with Imax screens are located in the suburbs. As a result, it is no surprise that many people choose to watch 3D movies there so no wonder(难怪) this theater has become a hit(成为热门). It is said that tickets for some popular movies playing there become difficult to get (一票难求) even just a few days before. To be honest, an Imax theater downtown contributes to(对…有好处) enriching people’s lives and provides more choices for people’s leisure-time activities.

For me, I’m wild about(热衷于) watching movies as well. Once upon a time, I found a pair of 3D glasses which were lost by the person sitting beside me. Intending to(打算) return them back to the staff, I picked them up. While at the exit, I noticed that the person who had lost them was intercepted (被拦截) and asked for compensation. Seeing this situation, I walked forward, explained to the staff, and returned both mine and his 3D spectacles back. The guy was so grateful to me that he said he was so lucky to have warm-hearted people like me picking them up. If someone had stolen them, he would have been (确凿的) fined.

To tell the truth, although I just lifted my finger (举手之劳), I acquired a sense of achievement for receiving other’s appreciation.
answers.summary: 去年市中心新开了imax电影院，以前的imax电影院建的都离市中心很远，因此新电影院开了以后，很多人会去那里看电影，很方便，丰富了大家的文娱生活。我也常常去看电影，有一次看3D电影还捡到了旁边的人落下的3D眼镜，我出去前先上了个厕所，结果在出口的时候看到丢眼镜的人被工作人员拦着索赔，我把两副眼镜都给了工作人员，那个人很感激我，说自己走得匆忙再回去找发现没有了，还好是我这样的好心人帮了他，要是被别人偷拿回去自己就要赔偿钱

topics.title: 买来不常用的东西/保健方式/改变计划

questions.content: Describe an item you bought but do not use often Describe something you do to keep healthy Describe a time when you had to change your mind/plan

source_payload.title: 买来不常用的东西/保健方式/改变计划

sub_questions.content:
Describe an item you bought but do not use often 
Describe something you do to keep healthy
Describe a time when you had to change your mind/plan

answers.title: 买来不常用的东西/保健方式/改变计划
answers.content:
I try to do different exercises to stay in shape (保持体形). Yoga has become the workout regime of choice for tons of people. Last year, I also wanted to become one of them so I purchased a yoga mat. My plan was to practice yoga at home by following online tutorial videos. Soon after, I moved to a smaller apartment and the mat was a little big for my room to spread out. What’s more, I found there are different types of yoga and different postures. And as a beginner, it’s difficult to get something out of yoga practise if the pose is not correct. Since then, the mat has been rolled up in the corner of the room, mostly acting as a reminder (作为提醒) of my old interest.

Fast forward to now (快进到现在) and recently I changed my exercise plan. My new plan is swimming. I was introduced to a swimming instructor by a friend at my gym. I started with the beginner course at the weekends. The instructor gave me instruction on the different strokes and breathing techniques. Recently, I’ve been practicing my front-crawl. It’s great because there is an indoor swimming pool near my place and it’s heated so I can go anytime of the year.

I quite like this new sport because it keeps me fit and healthy. I feel I have better upper-body strength. In addition, I’ve always had a slight fascination with water. When swimming in the water, I don’t feel stressed and I can kick back and relax(放松休息).
answers.summary:
我去年本来想练瑜伽减肥的，就在淘宝上买了瑜伽垫，结果后来发现租的房间没有足够的地方放瑜伽垫而且自己一个人练姿势未必标准，就放弃了瑜伽，瑜伽垫也就束之高阁了
我后来就转而去游泳，我现在就经常周末去游泳馆游泳，游泳的时候会有教练指导我呼吸的频率、动作等，我感到十分满意。因为游泳让我放松身心的同时，也让我在专业指导下锻炼了身体，我很满意

topics.title: 参加的聚会/理想的房子

questions.content: Describe a party that you attended Describe your ideal house

source_payload.title: 参加的聚会/理想的房子

sub_questions.content:
Describe a party that you attended
Describe your ideal house

answers.title: 参加的聚会/理想的房子
answers.content:
Well, for this part, it reminds me of the time I spent with my friend holding a New Year party last year.

To welcome the coming of the New Year, we rented a villa in the suburbs last year. With great solemnity (表示隆重), we each brought food ingredients and made hot pots and barbeques together. What’s more, we decorated the house with balloons and colored ribbons. Afterwards, I mean, with the backdrop of (在…的背景下) balloons, confetti, and cherished music, we counted down together for the coming of the new year.

Although time flies, I still treasure that time as an indelible (难忘的) memory not only because of the first-time experience but also due to the big house we stayed in which was what I dreamed of.

Speaking of (提及) an ideal house, I hope that one day I’m able to own a seaside villa with a balcony that overlooks the sea one day in the future. For the appearance, I hope it’s a kind of minimalist style(极简风) with open French windows (落地窗) and abundant sunshine. But when it comes to the interior, I have a soft spot for (偏爱) a Scandinavian style(北欧风) design，which indicates the freedom and warmth of the owner. With a house like that, I would love to invite all of my friends to visit, holding parties, chatting and watching movies, or just idling(打发时间的), which would be really promising and splendid (美好而令人憧憬的).
answers.summary: 跨年聚会的时候我和朋友们去了郊区的别墅开跨年派对。大家各自带了食材，大家一起做饭一起吃。我们一起倒计时等待零点的到来，是一次难忘的时光。我希望以后我也能拥有一幢海边别墅，装大大的落地窗，一眼望出去全是蓝色的海洋，到时候我就可以邀请朋友们都来我家做客，开派对，一起度过难忘的时光

topics.title: 祖父母工作/有趣的老人

questions.content: Describe one of your grandparents’ jobs Describe an interesting old person

source_payload.title: 祖父母工作/有趣的老人

sub_questions.content:
Describe one of your grandparents’ jobs
Describe an interesting old person

answers.title: 祖父母工作/有趣的老人
answers.content:
A lot of characteristics can make someone interesting. My grandfather is an interesting man. He is generous and considerate, besides, he has knowledge about electronic-related topics from machines to phones, clocks and everything. This, I believe is derived from (来源于) his past working experience. My grandfather was an engineer in a large factory all his life. He played a key role(发挥关键作用) in the repairs and maintenance of the equipment and machinery in the factory. Even at home, he always dives into electronic products and loses track of time(忘了时间).

A rather funny thing happened when I was little. One time I got an electronic watch as a birthday gift. It was quite fancy at the time. My grandfather was so curious to tear it apart to see its internal structure. Of course I said no. However, my watch broke down after a couple of months. I was upset yet my grandfather was happy to take the watch and start taking it apart like a kid. He was so funny sometimes. I can always have interesting conversations with him and learn about components of almost every electronic product.

Even though I will never be an engineer, I really respect my grandfather for his work ethic and commitment. There is much to be learnt(要学习的很多) from his approach to work.
answers.summary: 我的祖父是个很有趣的人，他很喜欢拆各种电子设备研究里面的构造。这也跟他的工作有关，技校毕业后他就在工厂担任工程师，每天检查各设备的运转情况并对设备进行日常维护，他干了一辈子，也是他唯一的工作。有一次我买了块20块钱的新奇的电子手表，他就很想研究一下里面的构造，硬是想把我新买的手表拆了，我拒绝了了，结果一个月后手表坏了，他就兴高采烈地给我拆手表去了。因为爷爷十分喜欢研究小玩意的内部构造，有时候甚至会卖个萌哄我们给他拆了研究，所以我觉得很有趣。不过我之后应该不会做和他一样的工作，因为我不喜欢工科。

topics.title: 喜欢穿的衣服/广告

questions.content: Describe a piece of clothing you enjoy wearing Describe an advertisement you remember well

sub_questions.content:
Describe a piece of clothing you enjoy wearing
Describe an advertisement you remember well

answers.title: 喜欢穿的衣服/广告
answers.content:
Now, there is this ad that I’d really like to tell you about. It was a coca-cola commercial(广告), where many stars took their parts and made this impressive work. I believe that I saw this on the television recently, which is a bit odd, to be honest, coz I don’t watch a lot of TV these days, the internet being so convenient(独立主格). I was just keeping my granny company.

Well, the content of the ad was quite simple. Like among those stars was a favourite singer of mine, who was wearing a super-cool T-shirt, you know, like a metallic grey(金属灰) one, with the pattern of a masked ninja(蒙面忍者) on it. The scene was set in a hot and damp summer afternoon. The protagonists all looked sort of drowsy at first, then they had some coke, and in no time they became energetic. Throwing the cans in the bin, they started to show off their skateboard tricks and stuff like that. It was like, so attractive.

And afterwards, the T-shirt just lingered in my mind(挥之不去，难以忘怀). I was so eager to get one myself. So I just went online, and without too much effort, I got it on Taobao. When I saw it, I felt like it was even better-looking than it had been in the TV commercial. I basically wear it every day now, as long as the temperature permits. I just hope I won’t wear it out too soon. The ad surely worked on me, well… not in promoting the fizz(碳酸饮料), but the T-shirt.
answers.summary: 有一个可口可乐的广告是我非常喜欢的明星拍摄的，他在广告中穿了一件很好看的T恤，喝完可乐开始秀滑板技巧，非常的酷炫。看完广告之后我就去买了一件同款，只要气温允许我基本每天都想穿上它出门。

topics.title: 听到陌生人打电话/让你笑的小孩

questions.content: Describe a time that you heard a stranger talking on the phone in the public place/ Describe a time a child made you laugh

source_payload.title: 听到陌生人打电话/让你笑的小孩

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time that you heard a stranger talking on the phone in the public place/
Describe a time a child made you laugh

answers.title: 公共场合听陌生人打电话/让你笑的小孩
answers.content:
Well… Like, yesterday I was taking the lift, you know, back from the underground parking place, and I met this boy in the lift, a neighbour of mine, who was having a conversation with his dad on the phone. You see, it’s quite difficult not to(很难不去) overhear his talking since we were in that really small cabin. He was with his grandparent, and looked really excited, judging from his tone and body language.

Anyway, the boy was mainly telling his old man that he had been to the natural history museum. It was indeed funny, to be honest, coz the boy was basically showing off his encounter(偶遇) with the dinosaur fossils(恐龙化石), like, you know, those gigantic skeletons(巨大的骨架). And he said he had been astonished when he saw them, like the size of a house. And he literally asked his dad how many archaeologists it would have taken to eat it up. Well, the kid obviously had no idea about what a fossil is. He assumed it was something like a fishbone that you have to finish up eating the flesh(肉) first and then put the skeleton there for display. Ha-ha, what a thought!

I believe his dad was laughing no less harder than me, for the boy’s innocence and cuteness. I mean, one day he will grow experienced enough to understand this point, and perhaps laugh about this himself. But until then, isn’t it great to have some creative thinking like this? It’s hilarious, yes, but also really brave and innovative.
answers.summary: 我在小区里乘电梯的时候听到一个小男孩跟他爸爸炫耀今天去了自然博物馆。小孩子幼稚的话语让我忍俊不禁。特别好笑。他说第一次看见巨大的恐龙骨架后惊呆了，他问爸爸，需要多少个考古学家才能把它吃得这么干净呀。

topics.title: 交通工具故障/水上运动

questions.content: Describe an experience when a vehicle you took broke down Describe a water sport you would like to try in the future

source_payload.title: 交通工具故障/水上运动

sub_questions.content:
Describe an experience when a vehicle you took broke down
Describe a water sport you would like to try in the future

answers.title: 交通工具故障/水上运动
answers.content:
One weekend, my friends and I went to a park to have some fun. There’s a big lake there, so we decided to go boating. We chose a wooden boat and brought many snacks. It felt really relaxing being on the boat and enjoying ourselves. We were having a good time when suddenly, one of my friends Jack found that a plank of the boat was loose. Water started coming in the boat. At the time, we were right in the middle of the lake. I was totally freaked out (吓坏了) because I don’t know how to swim. In a hurry, we called the lifeboats on the shore for help. By the time they got there, our shoes were all wet. Although I had my life jacket on, I thought that I would panic less if I knew how to swim.

Bearing that lesson in mind, I decided to learn. In the future, I plan to go to a natatorium to learn swimming with a coach. Although it’s difficult for me to control my breathing when I swim, I want to spare no effort to (努力) learn this survival skill. Moreover, swimming is a total-body workout. It targets everything from sculpting your back (背部塑形) to toning your arms (瘦手臂). Instead of buying lots of different pieces of exercise equipment to work specific muscles(锻炼某个肌肉), we just need to jump in the pool, and tone our whole body in a few laps.
answers.summary: 有一次周末出去和朋友们去公园玩划船，结果到湖中心的时候船的一块木板有点松动开始有一点点进水，我们很慌张赶紧叫岸上的救生船帮忙，等救生船到的时候我们的鞋子已经湿光了，尽管穿了救生衣，这件事情给我的教训是一定要学会游泳，未来我打算去游泳馆找教练正规学习游泳，尽管屏气换气很难，但我也要努力学会，掌握一项求生技能

topics.title: 浪费时间/让你真正思考的电影

questions.content: Describe an occasion when you wasted your time Describe a film that made you think a lot

source_payload.title: 浪费时间/让你真正思考的电影

sub_questions.content:
Describe an occasion when you wasted your time
Describe a film that made you think a lot

answers.title: 看《上海堡垒》
answers.content:
Due to the impact of COVID-19, cinemas around me have still kept closed even after the Spring Festival. Staying alone at home, I’ve vegged out (懒散地打发时间) in front of my computer. While searching movies, a much-heralded (被广为谈论的) science fiction movie, Shanghai Fortress, piqued my interest. It was adapted from (改编自) a fiction written by Jiang Nan with the same name. I had high expectations (高期待) because it had an all-star cast (全明星演员阵容) with Shu Qi, Lu Han and Godfrey Tsao, and its plot (情节) was a bit similar to World Invasion: Battle Los Angeles (洛杉矶之战). The plot revolves around a college student, Jiang Yang, who follows his commander into the fortress in Shanghai and works with the Greyhawk squad to resist alien aggression (抵抗侵略).

However, it turned out to be a swizz (令人失望的东西) despite the star performers and level of animatronics (特效水平). It was such a lousy film (烂片) and really dragged me down and was literally (简直) a waste of time. For me, a good movie should be thought-provoking (发人深省的) and immerse you into a fascinating world. Movies of this standard are never a waste of time. I would really like to support the development of our country’s sci-fi movies, which have been a weakness in our movie industry for a long time. This can possibly be attributed to the lack of good storytellers, which greatly hamstrings the development of sci-fi movies in my country.
answers.summary: 今年春节过后电影院没开，一个人在家，想起前段时间一部热议的科幻电影《上海堡垒》，于是去找了资源。该片讲述了未来世界外星黑暗势力突袭地球，江洋追随女指挥官林澜进入上海堡垒成为一名指挥员，与灰鹰小队一起迎战外星侵略者的故事。说实话这部电影让我很失望，不论是情节推动、人物形象还是科幻特效方面都让我觉得有失水准。看完后觉得在浪费时间。对我来说看一部好的电影不是浪费时间，反而会觉得时间不够用。这样一部电影也引发了我的思考，科幻片一直是我国电影的一个弱项，我本应支持中国科幻片，但也着实为它的发展所担忧。

topics.title: 实用技能/想获得的奖

questions.content: Describe a practical skill you learned Describe a prize you want to win

source_payload.title: 实用技能/想获得的奖

sub_questions.content:
Describe a practical skill you learned
Describe a prize you want to win

answers.title: 实用技能/想获得的奖
answers.content:
After I entered university, I learned how to make speeches through online courses and watching seniors. In my opinion, public speaking is very important. It’s a necessary skill. It’s not just standing on a podium behind a lectern and speaking into a microphone to an audience. It includes speaking at meetings, with potential clients (潜在客户), colleagues, and customers. You need to express yourself effectively. In the future, I hope to win a prize in an English Speaking Competition for university students.

The competition was told to us by our English teacher. I think it would be a great challenge for me. But at the same time, I would also learn a lot when I prepare for the competition. Firstly, your listening, reading and writing skills will be improved. Preparing effective speeches involves (包括) considering your audience which means listening carefully and sensitively to what they're saying. You'll also hone (磨炼) your reading through research, and your writing through wanting to communicate effectively. Secondly, when you are making a speech, you can also enjoy the pleasure of sharing, motivating, inspiring or helping people to help themselves (你也可以享受分享、激励、启发或帮助他人自助的乐趣).

In order to win this prize, I have to improve my speaking skills on the one hand and my spoken English on the other. Winning the prize would be a recognition of my ability for public speaking and my spoken English, so I really want to have a try.
answers.summary: 我进大学后通过网上课程学习，观摩学长学姐演讲等方式学会了演讲，我学演讲是因为觉得人需要有良好的面向公众说话的口才，我觉得演讲是非常必须的技能未来我也希望能获得大学生英语演讲比赛的大奖，这个赛事是英语老师告诉我们的，为了获得这个奖，我一方面要加强演讲技能，一方面也要加强口语。赢得这个奖是对我演讲和英语口语能力的双重肯定，所以我很想要这个奖

topics.title: 做志愿者/让人放松的地方/喜欢的公共建筑

questions.content: Describe a volunteering experience you have had Describe a place that can be good to relax Describe an impressive public building that you enjoyed visiting

source_payload.title: 做志愿者/让人放松的地方/喜欢的公共建筑

sub_questions.content:
Describe a volunteering experience you have had
Describe a place that can be good to relax
Describe an impressive public building that you enjoyed visiting

answers.title: 图书馆志愿者
answers.content:
Last summer vacation, I became a volunteer in a library near my house. Back then, my major task was to assist sorting out books. Somehow, it’s the place where I love to stay at my leisure (我闲暇时候), possibly because it immerses (使沉浸) me in a totally relaxed atmosphere. The same goes for working there. Seemingly, I could feel the flow of time. Every workday, a sense of achievement enchanted (使愉悦) me, even if what I did was just small fry (小事情).

Wandering around this listed building (列入文物保护范围的历史建筑), it really brought me back to the Tsing dynasty. Its astonishing ceiling was made of scented rosewood (黄花梨木) with a carving of local showplace (当地风景名胜). In order to better protect the inside period pieces (古董), plenty of display cases were furnished in corresponding places and daily visitors have been only allowed to enter by online appointment since 2016. Luckily, the latest renewal held by local government did not destroy any of its unique and quaint atmosphere. A glassed-in porch (玻璃结构的门廊) at the ground floor modernized this building and prevented heavy rain from penetrating its basement.

At that time, its old-world charm (古色古香的魅力) deeply impressed me. As a witness of hundreds of years, this building brought me a strength of tranquility. Accordingly, I could easily fully concentrate on what I needed to do. I really wish I could stay in this wonderful building for the rest of my life.
answers.summary: 去年暑假去家附近的图书馆做志愿者，主要任务是帮助整理图书，课余时间特别喜欢去这个图书馆学习，那里是能让我放松的地方，并且当自己能够以绵薄之力为图书馆做一些小事的时候，内心感到非常充实。这个图书馆的外观是我喜欢的建筑类型，它是由历史建筑所改造的，所以内部也留下了历史的痕迹，在里面学习能够让我的内心非常平静，也更加专注。

topics.title: 给建议/利用网络解决问题

questions.content: Describe a time when you gave advice to others Describe a time when you solved a problem through the Internet

source_payload.title: 给建议/利用网络解决问题

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time when you gave advice to others
Describe a time when you solved a problem through the Internet

answers.title: 给建议/利用网络解决问题
answers.content:
Recently, my mom wanted to buy a floor mopping robot, but she didn’t know which brand to choose. Therefore, she asked me to recommend one for her. I didn’t know very much about mopping robots either, so I spent one hour browsing websites such as Taobao and Little Red Book.

I compared buyers’ evaluations (买家评价) of different types until I decided that Xiaomi would be a great choice. Xiaomi's mission is to improve and simplify our lives with cool products that do our job in the household with ease. We ordered one on Taobao, and it was delivered to our house 2 days later. It only takes a few minutes to get the robot started. No need to change water while mopping and no need to press the mop cloth closer to the floor to get rid of dirt. Using the robot is a pleasure. The Xiaomi Handled Electric Mop has a minimalist design(极简设计) which is no wonder since Xiaomi makes all their products this way. Inside the box, I found an electric mop with a grip divided into four parts, so I had to put together all the pieces to make it look like one of the manufacturer's pictures. The device is wireless so there was an adapter to charge it.

In any case (无论如何), the mop looks very useful. To get it started all you need is to fill the body with water. I’m happy that my mom does not need to mop the floor now. Xiaomi does this job.
answers.summary: 我妈妈最近想买个扫地机器人但不知道没啥牌子好就来问我，我也不太了解，就花了一小时仔仔细细搜了下小红书，淘宝评价等网站寻找买家评价，最后觉得小米很不错，于是建议我妈买小米的扫地机器人，我妈买回来以后不用自己一把老骨头扫地了打扫卫生轻松了好多我感到很开心

topics.title: 成功的冒险/汽车旅行/想再去的城市

questions.content: Describe a risk you have taken which had a positive result Describe a (long) car journey you went on Describe a city you have visited and want to go back to in the future

source_payload.title: 成功的冒险/汽车旅行/想再去的城市

sub_questions.content:
Describe a risk you have taken which had a positive result
Describe a (long) car journey you went on
Describe a city you have visited and want to go back to in the future

answers.title: 稻城自驾游
answers.content:
Last summer holiday, I planned to take a road trip (自驾游) to Daocheng county with my friend, Hussein. Originally, he came up with this idea, but he was worried about altitude sickness (高原反应) there and changed his mind. Though on my tod (独自), I decided to move forward because I am a daredevil (喜欢冒险的人) and it was said that there is no better place in our country to traverse on wheels (驾车跋涉) than Daocheng.

After booking hotels, preparing food and ensuring good condition of my vehicle, I double-checked the weather forecast in my path (沿途) and marked petrol stations on my smart phone in advance. The expressway (高速公路) to my destination became gradually steeper with rising altitude and the harsh glare of the plateau sun (高原上刺眼的阳光) dazzled (使目眩) me. I was rather tired from fully focusing on the road conditions for a long time in case of taking a wrong turning (拐错弯).

Luckily, my venture turned out to be a great result. Daocheng county is a Tibetan Autonomous Region and is located in the southwest part of Sichuan province. This adventure thrilled (使兴奋) me with various ground cover from lush green landscape (茂盛的绿色风景) to expansive grassland (辽阔的草原). The spectacular panorama (壮观的全景) of snow-covered mountains, glaciers, lakes and falls really amazed me. I was so fortunate that I hadn’t given up on this breathtaking trip. Besides, I enjoyed buttered tea (酥油茶) and barley wine (青稞酒) right there. I always tell my friends that they shouldn’t miss the unexpectedly stunning views of this county at sunrise. I really hope to travel there again by bullet train with them.
answers.summary: 去年暑假与朋友相约自驾游，目的地是稻城。去稻城是朋友的想法，结果朋友没去，我一个人坚持前往。一个人自驾游对我来说是一次冒险，有一点累，路线也有些复杂，但最终结果是好的。稻城县位于中国四川省西南边缘。那里汇集了雪山、冰川、湖泊、草原、瀑布等壮丽景观。很庆幸没有放弃这次旅行，才能看到壮丽的美景。下次我决定和朋友乘坐高铁前往，早上一定要早起欣赏晨晖中的稻城，周围会有你意想不到的美景。

topics.title: 助你实现目标的人/乐于助人的人

questions.content: Describe a person who encouraged and helped you to achieve a goal Describe a person who often helps others

source_payload.title: 助你实现目标的人/乐于助人的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe a person who encouraged and helped you to achieve a goal
Describe a person who often helps others

answers.title: 鼓励你的人/乐于助人的人
answers.content:
Alex, one of my seniors at university, is very helpful. Whenever someone asks him for help, he will do his best to help them. His motto (座右铭) in QQ is an English proverb: present roses to others with remaining fragrance in hand (送人玫瑰，手有余香), meaning that doing a little thing for others will make you warm and happy. He believes that people are meant to help and care for each other.

Alex got many good offers in the job-hunting season (求职季). Therefore, I asked him for tips in the interview. I was only expecting a few sentences, but to my surprise, Alex explained to me in detail what I should pay attention to in the interview. He told me typical job interview questions employers ask and helped me practice my answers. According to him, strong answers are those that are specific but concise, drawing on concrete examples (具体的例子) that highlight the candidate’s skills (突出候选人优势) and back up the resume (支撑简历). Moreover, he conducted a mock interview for me and helped me modify my answers. Also, he encouraged me to apply for jobs at many well-known enterprises. He suggested that I apply for several jobs at once, and get my CV in front of as many hiring managers as possible, which will maximise (最大化) my chances. He also told me that it would be better if I arrive ten minutes early to give myself a few extra minutes to visit the restroom, check my outfit, and calm my nerves. With his help, I was full of preparation. I finally got my dream offer so I am very grateful to him.
answers.summary: 我的学长Alex十分乐于助人，只要有人有问题向他求助，他都会尽己所能帮忙，他认为人与人本来就是互相帮助互相关爱的。有一次我向他寻求面试经验，他不仅向我详细介绍了面试中应注意的点，帮助我做面试模拟，自然回答面试官的问题不卑不亢，还鼓励我可以多去尝试比较好的企业，在他的鼓励之下我投了一些曾经想都不敢想的企业，因为准备的充分，最后成功拿到了offer，我很感激我的学长

topics.title: 从错误中学习/常用的手机应用/迷路

questions.content: Describe a time when you learned from a mistake you have made Describe an application(program) you usually use on your phone/computer Describe an application(program) you usually use on your phone

source_payload.title: 从错误中学习/常用的手机应用/迷路

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time when you learned from a mistake you have made
Describe an application(program) you usually use on your phone/computer
Describe an application(program) you usually use on your phone

answers.title: 用百度地图找面试地点却迷路
answers.content:
The application that I usually use on my phone is a mobile maps and GPS app published by Baidu. It is a very powerful tool, similar to Google Maps, letting you look up locations and telling you where you're going. Baidu Maps also lets you use all kinds of different views. By default (默认情况下), the app shows the traditional map view, but you can change it to satellite view. You can also check out street view. It will provide you with different routes and transportation means to go to your destination. You also can download maps for hundreds of different cities and access them even when you're offline. Baidu Maps is a comprehensive map app that's especially useful for anyone who wants to travel through China. .

Last month, I had a job interview and the company is somewhere I have never been before. Of course, I checked Baidu Maps the day before to see the route and the time needed. On the day, when I got off the subway like it instructed, I followed the map and walked for more than ten minutes. Suddenly it said I should turn around. I could hardly keep my head clear (保持头脑清醒) and not panic at that moment. It was nearly the meeting time but I seemed to be lost in this unfamiliar area. I couldn’t waste any more time on the app. I went up to a person and asked for directions. Luckily he was very nice and familiar with the roads. I followed his answer and started to run. I got to the place at 11:45 when the interview started at 11:50! There is a lesson (是一个教训) here for me that I need to plan the route in advance instead of just relying on the app, and I should also set aside more time (留时间) in case of uncertainty.
answers.summary: 上个月去面试，面试的地址不在地铁站附近，并且我没有提前去探路，我想着用百度地图app就能找到目的地了，每次去远一点的地方都用它，是非常可靠的。当天我按照百度地图乘坐地铁到达附近后，一直往它所指的方向走。走了大概十分钟，它突然提示我应该掉头。这时发现我已经迷路了，并且已经快到了预定的面试时间。我非常着急，询问路人，才发现方向反了，并且他特地为我指了路。我匆忙感谢他并跑向目的地，掐点到了面试地点。通过这件事情意识到事先应该做好路线规划的重要性，并且要预留出更多的时间去应对不确定性。

topics.title: 早起/邀请聚餐

questions.content: Describe an occasion when you got up extremely early Describe an occasion when you invited your family or friends to dinner

source_payload.title: 早起/邀请聚餐

sub_questions.content:
Describe an occasion when you got up extremely early
Describe an occasion when you invited your family or friends to dinner

answers.title: 早起/邀请聚餐
answers.content:
I remembered when I graduated and I finally rented a house on my own. After settling in, I couldn’t wait to call my friends to come to visit and have a house-warming party. They were coming at night but on that day, around 6 am, the sun came up and I woke up. I didn’t even need to drink coffee because I was so excited to welcome my friends. Since this was the first time someone visited my new home, I decided to go the extra mile(做更多努力) to personally cook for them.

I needed to buy a lot of things so I ran to the market to get decorations, snacks and of course the ingredients for dinner. I started to prepare for dinner at around 4 o’clock. To my surprise (令我惊讶的), my friends actually came early to help prepare.

We had dinner together and I was most happy about (最开心的是) them liking my cooking. My friends ordered a big chocolate cake since they know I am a little bit of a chocoholic. They even brought different kinds of gifts, including a card from all friends, a personalized cushion and noise-cancelling headphones that I had wanted for a long time. After the meal, we played some games and watched a movie.

I’m not usually a morning person (喜欢早起的人) and I hate getting up early. However, even when I woke up extremely early, I still had such a good time with my friends. I am very thankful to them for joining my housewarming party to celebrate this special occasion. It warms my heart to have so many people loving and caring for me.
answers.summary: 我大学毕业刚刚租好房子，便邀请朋友们来我家吃饭，第一次在外可以自己动手做饭我感到十分兴奋，我一早便起来准备食材，先去菜场置办了食材，再根据菜谱指示烧菜，后来我的朋友们来了以后也一起帮我打打下手，他们还带了恭贺乔迁的礼物，我感到很幸福，也很自豪，自己做了一桌菜款待朋友们

topics.title: 想了解的国外（文化）/想尝试的运动

questions.content: Describe a foreign country(culture) you want to know more about Describe a sport you would like to try in the future

source_payload.title: 想了解的国外（文化）/想尝试的运动

sub_questions.content:
Describe a foreign country(culture) you want to know more about
Describe a sport you would like to try in the future

answers.title: 英国皮艇球
answers.content:
I have always wanted to learn about foreign cultures. There is one culture I have always had a little more fascination with than any other. It is located in the northwest of continental Europe. It is the English culture. I guess it is because I have been learning its language since very little. I am interested in its long history, like the beginnings of the Industrial Revolution, as well as its popular culture. England has a strong cultural influence (很大的影响) on the rest of the world. English music, film, and literature enjoy wide audiences (有广大观众) overseas. Don’t forget its beautiful churches, museums, galleries, etc. They all fascinate and intrigue me.

If I get the opportunity(如果有机会), I would definitely like to learn about one of its sports called canoe polo. We don’t hear about it a lot here in China, but it is a very old sport there. Canoe polo has been played in Great Britain since the late 19th century, and is now played by 50 countries in all continents, mostly popular in Europe. It is the second- most popular ball sport in Europe, next to soccer. Canoe polo is played by two teams of five players, in open water or in a swimming pool. The aim is to score into a goal. It is a team sport and combines fast pace paddling and boat control with ball handling. This makes it an exciting and physically demanding (对身体要求高) sport, and is a good choice of sport to exercise your whole body.
answers.summary: 英国是我一直想去并且想了解的国家。位于欧洲大陆西北面的不列颠群岛。从其独特的音乐产业和历史，到其广受赞誉的文学和庞大的博物馆都让我非常好奇，想要去探索 。皮划艇水球作为一项正式的体育运动首先出现于英国。也是一项我想尝试的水上运动。在中国大家认为这项运动很小众，但它已经发展了超过一百年。在欧洲，皮划艇水球是仅次于足球的第二项大球运动。这项运动属于团队项目，所以趣味性非常强，但难度也高，对人的体能要求也高，特别能锻炼身体。

topics.title: 历史建筑/和朋友出去

questions.content: Describe a historical building you have been to Describe an experience when you went out with your friends and had a good time

source_payload.title: 历史建筑/和朋友出去

sub_questions.content:
Describe a historical building you have been to
Describe an experience when you went out with your friends and had a good time

answers.title: 历史建筑/和朋友出去
answers.content:
During Labor Day in May this year I went to Wuhan with some of my friends. In fact, it’s not that far from my city, so my friends and I decided to drive there for a few days. Among all the attractions we saw, my favourite was the Yellow Crane Tower. It’s located on Snake Hill in Wuhan.

Enjoying the fame of 'The First Scenery under Heaven', the Yellow Crane Tower is one of the most renowned towers along the Yangtze River. Its cultural significance led to it being made the symbol of Wuhan City.

The Yellow Crane Tower has a very long and complicated history. We learnt that it was first built during the Three Kingdoms Period. Nowadays many people know about this because, during the Tang Dynasty, many popular poems were written in praise of (歌颂) it. It was the Yellow Crane Tower poem that made it so renowned and induced people to visit.

There’s a lot to see inside the Yellow Crane Tower - its architecture, exhibitions and poems. My favourite is the top floor of the tower. On the roof, there’s an open and wide view of the Yangtze River, its bridge and the surrounding buildings in Wuhan City. Needless to say (毫无疑问), the scenery was breathtaking and my friends and I captured some fantastic images.

The way there and back was not as comfortable as taking public transport. We had to set off early in the morning and we were caught in traffic (遇上交通堵塞) on the way a lot, still, it was a really pleasant journey with my friends nonetheless (不过仍然).
answers.summary: 五一劳动节的时候我和朋友们去武汉游玩，还去了黄鹤楼，黄鹤楼有五层高，攒尖顶，层层飞檐，四望如一，我们在黄鹤楼上登高望远，可看到滚滚长江水奔腾。黄鹤楼一直以来都是诗人们抒发文思的地方，现在则成了旅游景点，我们也在黄鹤楼里观赏了历代文人的诗句，感受到了中华文化的博大精深以及时间像长江一般滚滚流逝的道理，我觉得这座古建筑

topics.title: 家人向你求助/尊敬的老人

questions.content: Describe a time when a family member asked you for help Describe an old people you know and respect

source_payload.title: 家人向你求助/尊敬的老人

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time when a family member asked you for help
Describe an old people you know and respect

answers.title: 爷爷
answers.content:
'Family' is the most precious thing for me. In my family, I admire my grandfather most. He is the key person in our family. He has been retired for a few years, but he used to be a solider and therefore he has many interesting stories of his time in the army. In my childhood (在我小时候), he was always there for me and my siblings. We could just keep talking and listening to him all day long (一整天).

I am going to share a situation when my grandfather asked me for help. He has always been interested in helping young children. One time he wanted to donate some money to a school when he heard a story about the students there on the news. However, he didn’t have much information on the school so he called me for help and asked me if I could find him the information. Of course, I was happy to help out. There was not much information available on the internet, so it took me quite some time, but I finally managed to find the Red Cross region office that supports the school. I helped him to write the address on the envelope and mailed it.
 .
He is just the kind of person that likes to do good things, and likes to help others in every possible way (千方百计). My grandfather is truly an admirable person and I am lucky to have him in my life. There are many outstanding qualities (优秀的品质) that I and others can learn from him.
answers.summary: 我尊敬并且崇拜的一位家人是我的爷爷。他曾经是一名军人，他经常和我讲一些他从前经历的事情，哪怕有些只是一些很小的事情，我也总是能听他讲一整个下午。让我印象深刻的是有一次他拿了一只装着几百元的信封让我帮忙在信封上写红十字会的地址，并且寄出去。我非常原意帮这个忙，因此我按照他说的去做。他平平常常做的小事使我感触颇深，我觉得有很多方面值得我去学习，也值得全社会的人敬佩。

topics.title: 喜欢的歌手/想见的外国名人

questions.content: Describe your favourite singer or band Describe a foreign celebrity you want to meet in person

source_payload.title: 喜欢的歌手/想见的外国名人

sub_questions.content:
Describe your favourite singer or band
Describe a foreign celebrity you want to meet in person

answers.title: 喜欢的歌手/想见的外国名人
answers.content:
Speaking of my favorite celebrity that I want to meet in person, I would definitely say Lady Gaga. Lady Gaga is a very popular pop artist of the millennium age, my generation. She is an American singer, songwriter, and actress.

She is known for her unconventionality. Just recently, she pulled off the greatest entrance at the Met Gala. I feel she has a very strong individualistic personality. She stays true (忠于) to her personality and continues to insist on doing things and making music and movies that she likes. From all her performance, I guess she is also emotionally rich (情感丰富).

I admire her for many reasons. She sings pop music but it fuses many genres like contemporary R&B, rap, and rock. Thus she has a very unique music style. She has a handful of really good songs, such as Poker Face, Born this way and Just dance, covering a diverse range of topics and ideas, distinguishing her music from others. Unlike many pop songs, her songs deliver messages and ideas that inspire many people worldwide.

Her experiences, attitude, and work have helped her find widespread success(巨大成功) for years. I can’t imagine what the life of Lady Gaga is like. I have so many questions I want to ask her and she must be an interesting subject to talk to with her background.
answers.summary: 我最喜欢的歌手是ladygaga，我十分期待有一天能见到她，她十分勇于表达自我，她的音乐风格比较多变，包括rap，流行音乐、抒情等多种因素，我第一次知道她是我的同学和我分享了她的歌，我觉得她的歌不仅风格独特还传达了年轻人的态度，因此我非常喜欢她也希望有一天能见到她

topics.title: 有领导力的朋友/感兴趣的大公司/遇到朋友时惊讶的情形

questions.content: Describe a friend who is a good leader Describe a large company that you are interested in Describe a time when you were surprised to meet a friend

source_payload.title: 有领导力的朋友/感兴趣的大公司/遇到朋友时惊讶的情形

sub_questions.content:
Describe a friend who is a good leader
Describe a large company that you are interested in
Describe a time when you were surprised to meet a friend

answers.title: 字节跳动面试遇朋友
answers.content:
Okay, let me share this with you.

As you know, I have just graduated from university but I don’t have any work experience, so recently I sent my resume(发简历) to a number of companies. Fortunately, I received an interview invitation(面试邀请) for a company called ByteDance last month. ByteDance is a large-scale Internet company with app products commonly used in daily life such as Douyin and Toutiao. You can imagine how excited I was to receive the company's interview invitation.

On the day of the interview, I was well-dressed and well-prepared, and I arrived at the company early. At the time, it was not my turn to interview, so I sat at the reception and rested. While I was looking around, I was surprised to see one of my university classmates who came for an interview too! We hadn’t seen each other for a while, and by chance we happened to be(碰巧) grouped together(被分配到一个组) for the interview.

To be honest(说实话), at university, our relationship was not particularly strong, but there had been some interactions(接触), and I was aware he had good leadership qualities (有领导力的). While at university, he served as(担任过) the Minister of the Volunteer Department and often organized teams to participate in(参与) public welfare(公共福利) activities. During our interview, his leadership was also outstanding in the panel discussion(小组讨论), which impressed the interviewer, and needless to say, he successfully passed the interview. Fortunately, I also passed! I can’t wait to start working there, and I look forward to learning more from him.
answers.summary: 上个月去字节跳动面试，字节跳动是一家大型的互联网公司，旗下有抖音、今日头条等生活中常用的APP产品，我对收到公司的面试邀请感到非常兴奋。让我感到惊讶的是我在那里碰到了我的一个大学同学，他也来面试。我们已经有一段时间没见了，恰好我们被分在了一组。在我的印象中他是一位非常有领导力的朋友，在校期间担任志愿者部部长，经常组织团队参加公益活动。他的领导力也在面试的小组讨论中展现，并且他也顺利通过了面试。

topics.title: 擅长外语的人/想法有趣的人

questions.content: Describe a person who speaks a foreign language well Describe a person who has interesting ideas or opinions

source_payload.title: 擅长外语的人/想法有趣的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe a person who speaks a foreign language well
Describe a person who has interesting ideas or opinions

answers.title: 外语流利的人/有趣想法的人
answers.content:
I’m going to talk about my teacher Mr. Shawn. I first met him on the first day of high school. He was my English teacher. Later I found out that he was really popular at school and I completely understand why that was.

Mr. Shawn is famous for(以…出名) his amazing teaching methods. Of course, he speaks English very well but more importantly, he knows how to teach the language in interesting ways. He always has interesting ideas and different activities for us in class. He made a hobby out of(培养爱好) travelling to different countries to take photographs and he always shared amazing stories, which he would use to teach us some complex concepts and ideas. He would even make up stories based on some new vocabulary, for instance, ‘a man got a fax from his company that he needed to file his taxes. He went to sell wax and finally got the money to relax’. Thanks to(幸亏) him, we never felt bored when learning new vocabulary. When teachers create such interest, students more willingly immerse themselves in the wonders of learning English.

I really respect Mr. Shawn for his interesting ideas and creative teaching methods. Now that I am a teacher myself, I know that the job of teaching is very challenging. I have learnt from him and hopefully will make my classes as interesting so that my students also want to be there.
answers.summary: 我的高中老师shawn是个想法有趣的人，高中开学第一天就认识了这个老师，他在学习英语方面有很多很多有趣的想法，比如将英文发音和中文相像的发音联系起来，比如将几个生词连起来编故事，像“接到传真fax，要交税tax，就去卖蜡wax，有钱了终于放松relax”，一下就让人记住了，十分有趣。我的老师一开始学习英语是因为兴趣，后来当了英语老师，为了教的更好，也在不停学习。

topics.title: 污染的地方/发出噪音的人或物

questions.content: Describe a place you visited that has been affected by pollution Describe someone or something that made a lot of noise

source_payload.title: 污染的地方/发出噪音的人或物

sub_questions.content:
Describe a place you visited that has been affected by pollution
Describe someone or something that made a lot of noise

answers.title: 噪声污染
answers.content:
As we all know, environmental noise pollution refers to(指的是) the phenomenon(现象) where generated(产生的) environmental noise exceeds(超过) the national environmental emission standards(排放标准) and interferes with(干扰) the normal life of others. Environmental noise pollution is energy pollution.

This type of pollution is actually very common in life, and many people are deeply troubled by it(深受其害). Let me share such a case with you.

A few months ago, the apartment above mine was sold, and the new neighbor who was about to(即将) move in needed to renovate(翻新) the place. Therefore, from morning to night, there was noise from above which was very unpleasant and annoying(刺耳的). The most annoying thing was that sometimes they renovated even on weekends, giving people no time to rest. At the time, I was about to have my final exam, and such noise made me unable to concentrate on(注意力集中于) my studies. So I went upstairs and tried to negotiate(商议) with the decorators, but it turned out to be useless. I also tried to inform the property management company of the inconvenience but again this proved unsuccessful. I felt very angry, but I couldn’t do anything. I could only choose to go to the nearby library to study.

I really hope people pay more attention to(关注) the impact of their actions on others. This kind of environmental noise pollution has become ubiquitous(普遍存在的) in life, and its harm to people is huge. According to statistics, noise reduces labor productivity by 10% to 50%. As the noise increases, the error rate rises. It is clear to see that noise distracts(分散) people's attention and reduces work efficiency(降低工作效率).
answers.summary: 环境噪声污染是指所产生的环境噪声超过国家规定的环境噪声排放标准，并干扰他人正常生活的现象。环境噪声污染是一种能量污染。由于楼上即将搬来新的邻居，从早上到晚上一直有装修的噪音，非常刺耳，让人感到烦躁。而我正值期末考试，这样的噪音让我在家里无法集中精力复习，因此我到楼上试图与装修人员交涉，但最后无果，我感到非常生气，只能选择去附近的图书馆复习。

topics.title: 纪念品/旅游

questions.content: Describe something special you took home from a tourist attraction Describe an unusual experience of travelling

source_payload.title: 纪念品/旅游

sub_questions.content:
Describe something special you took home from a tourist attraction
Describe an unusual experience of travelling

answers.title: 纪念品/旅游
answers.content:
Ever since I was a little child I have always wanted to visit Yunnan because I have had many recommendations about how amazing the scenery is. I finally got the chance to go there with my friend Jane this summer vacation.

We did lots of homework before we went there and we didn’t spend a lot of time in famous tourist cities like Lijiang, Dali or Kunming. Instead, we spent the longest time in a small town near Dali and stayed nearly a week at a local residence. The town was mostly mountains but it’s famous for(以…出名) its amazing rice terraces. The owner introduced us to a mountain location and we spent a few days watching the sunrise over the rice paddies, which was apparently the most spectacular view.

And with the help of a local guide, we also got the chance to explore the curious world of Yunnan mushrooms. Many people actually come to the forests in search of wild mushrooms. They are so different in appearance, with some like ears, some like umbrellas, and some like insects. There are a lot of varieties that I haven’t even heard of before. You have to be extra careful with what to pick as some are actually poisonous. The house owner taught us which from which and I brought two bags of different mushrooms I picked home. I also bought a few packets of dried mushrooms as gifts for my family. They really liked them since they were very special.

It was a really memorable trip because we’d been planning it for some time as I was desperate to (渴望) have a different experience out of city life. Travelling on our own, not with a package tour, definitely brought lots of hassle but it was a pleasant journey nonetheless (不过仍然). We were very lucky to meet many kind people and get such an unusual experience of travelling. All in all (总而言之), it was an unforgettable trip and I’d recommend it to all my friends.
answers.summary: 我有一次暑假和我的朋友jame两个人自己去云南玩，我们没有去大家都会去的丽江、大理、昆明等有名的城市，而是去了大山里面，我们在大山里看梯田看日出，感到十分开心。我们还发现大山里有很多当地特有的菌菇，十分鲜美，长得什么样子都有，不过大体上像小伞、像小耳朵，十分鲜美，于是我临走前买了两袋晒干的菌菇回去，我以前从来没有见过这样的菌菇，因此感到很特殊，这次不跟团纯自由行的旅程也让我觉得十分不一般。

topics.title: 穿最好的衫/享受的晚餐/很开心认识的人

questions.content: Describe an occasion you wore the best clothes Describe a dinner that you really enjoyed Describe a person who you are happy to know

source_payload.title: 穿最好的衫/享受的晚餐/很开心认识的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe an occasion you wore the best clothes
Describe a dinner that you really enjoyed
Describe a person who you are happy to know

answers.title: 年会晚宴穿小礼服认识一位新朋友
answers.content:
Last year, my company's annual meeting was held in a large hotel. The HR department told us in advance(提前) that the company required us to wear formal clothes, so I chose a simple white dress. It was actually the first time I wore such a formal dress. This little dress is sleeveless(无袖的) and has a cutout(镂空) design on the chest, which I think is very unique, while the skirt goes down to about the knee(到膝盖的位置). I wore high heels which matched well with the skirt, and I also deliberately(特意) paired this beautiful skirt with a beautiful brooch.

Seeing my colleagues getting together to celebrate the year's hard work, I blended into(融入) this relaxed atmosphere, eating delicious food, drinking wine while chatting with colleagues around me. In short, I was very happy that day.

Because my company is large and is a multinational company(跨国公司), there are actually many colleagues that I don’t know or am unfamiliar with. Fortunately, when chatting with colleagues, I met a girl from another department, which has no business dealings (没有业务往来) with my department, so I hadn’t met her before. However, she looked very cute, and while chatting with her, I also realized that she is a very independent (独立的) woman. She came to the big city from a small town all by herself, without knowing anyone, and now she is the head of the department. I was deeply touched by(被深深地触动) her story of her struggle alone in a big city. At the same time, I also enjoyed this dinner very much, and thanks to this dinner, I was very happy to be able to meet such a good colleague who opened her heart and talked to me.
answers.summary: 去年公司年会在一家大型饭店内举办，公司要求穿礼服，因此我穿着一个款式简单的白色小礼服，也是我第一次穿这么正式的礼服。看到同事们都聚在一起庆祝一年工作圆满收官，我也融入了这轻松的氛围，一边吃着中式菜一边聊天，那天的晚餐我吃的很开心。与同事聊天的时候认识了一位同公司的女生，她是另一个部门的，她长得很可爱，和她聊天的过程中也认识到她是一位非常独立的女性，她在大城市独自奋斗的故事让我感触很深。很开心能够认识这样一位能够敞开心扉得与我交谈的朋友。

topics.title: 家乡的改变/帮助他人的经历

questions.content: Describe a change that can improve your local area Describe a time when you helped a person

source_payload.title: 家乡的改变/帮助他人的经历

sub_questions.content:
Describe a change that can improve your local area 
Describe a time when you helped a person

answers.title: 帮助老年人开快递柜，希望社区普及使用方法
answers.content:
If I have a chance to change the status quo(现状) of my hometown, I will popularize(普及) the usage of express lockers for the elderly.

I once went to an express locker to pick up a package when there was an old man in front of me. He had a puzzled(迷惑的) face. After standing in front of the locker for five minutes, he still had no idea how to unlock it and take out the package. I stepped forward(走上前) to help, entered the pickup code, and finally took it out. The old man was so pleased. He told me that he usually asks his neighbors to help him with express deliveries. As his neighbor was away, he was by himself(靠自己) this time.

Young people working away buy stuff online for their elders back home. The act itself is worth encouraging, but they fail to educate the elderly on how to use the lockers. Due to the popularity of express lockers, most of the express companies have dropped the service of home deliveries(送货上门) in ignorance of(无视) the elderly’s needs. For the elderly, express lockers are just as difficult to operate as a new electronic product.

It is hoped that the community can take responsibility to help them. I hope that while society is growing leaps and bounds(飞速地), we won’t leave old people in need. Of course, it also takes time and determination.
answers.summary: 如果让我讲一个能提升我家乡的变化我可能会希望对老年人普及快递柜的使用方法。我记得有一次我去菜鸟快递柜拿包裹，前面排着一位老年人，他看着屏幕和短信却不知道如何取包裹。我上前询问是否需要帮忙，并且帮助他输入了取件码，成功取到包裹，能帮助到他我感到非常开心。但我也发现现在许多快递并不会送上门，对于老年人来说快递柜就像是一个新的电子产品很难操作。希望社区可以组织普及快递柜使用方法的活动，帮助他们解决问题。当然这也需要时间和精力解决。我认为如果能有这样的活动，那就太好不过了。

topics.title: 新闻中出现并想见的人/有趣的动物/不想做的工作

questions.content: Describe a person in the news who you want to meet Describe an interesting animal you saw Describe a job you would not like to do in the future

source_payload.title: 新闻中出现并想见的人/有趣的动物/不想做的工作

sub_questions.content:
Describe a person in the news who you want to meet
Describe an interesting animal you saw
Describe a job you would not like to do in the future

answers.title: 很想见肖战和他的猫
answers.content:
Xiao Zhan has been the star of(炙手可热的人) entertainment news recently. Last summer, the TV series "Chen Qing Ling", in which he acted the leading role, made him famous overnight(一夜成名), amidst endless rapture(如痴如醉的) from girls. Fans now go wherever he goes and the streets are packed(拥挤的) before his arrival. But what many people don't know is that Xiao Zhan is not only an actor, but also a singer. Back in 2016, he made his debut(首秀) in a talent show. In recent years, he has been very low-key(低调的) and barely known to people. Now is the golden age for him. I’ve always believed that both ordinary people and stars must learn to bide their time.

Xiao Zhan has a cute Munchkin cat called Nuts. There are many fun shots of his cat in his videos, which are very interesting. I’m also a fan of him, and I really hope to see him in person(亲自), listen to him singing, and play with his cat. But I know that stars are so engaged in their daily work that they rarely have the opportunity to meet their fans.

If I were to choose a job that I wouldn’t want to do, it would be a star. Although they occupy the headlines of(占据头条) newspapers and social media every day and earn a lot of money, they often work day and night and live in the spotlight(活在聚光灯下) every day without any privacy. This job is actually not simple at all.
answers.summary: 最近在娱乐新闻中经常看到肖战，他最近因为《陈情令》爆红，他是一名歌手兼演员。他还有一只活泼可爱的曼基康猫，猫的名字非常有趣叫坚果，它经常出现在肖战的生活视频里，它非常喜欢在镜头前出现然后做一些搞怪的表情，真是太有趣了。我很想见一见亲眼肖战，听他唱歌，当然还有他的猫。但是我知道明星都很忙，哪有说见就见的道理。如果让我挑一个我未来不会做的工作，一定是明星。虽然天天能在微博上刷到他们并且他们收入非常高，但有时需要日夜颠倒，有时甚至没有隐私，并没有大家想象的简单。

topics.title: 尽力达成的目标/不用手机的场合

questions.content: Describe a goal you set that you tried your best to achieve Describe an occasion that you could not use the mobile phone

source_payload.title: 尽力达成的目标/不用手机的场合

sub_questions.content:
Describe a goal you set that you tried your best to achieve
Describe an occasion that you could not use the mobile phone

answers.title: 学习CFA和雅思需要关闭手机，并且想去新开的图书馆学习
answers.content:
Last month I set a goal, hoping to get the CFA certificate as soon as(尽快) possible through hard work. The CFA exam is a stepping stone(敲门砖) into the financial field. Whenever I have a little time, I turn on the computer, watch Coursera videos, and take notes. The time schedule before the exam is so tight(时间紧的) and time is limited, so I have to use meal times to review all my notes. Over the past three months, I haven’t made it home(回家) before 10 p. m.

As you can see, I commute between home and library routinely. As the library near my home is under renovation(正在装修中), I can only go to a library further away. There, I generally turn off my mobile phone in order not to cause any disturbance(打扰) to the readers, and to improve my concentration. Recently, I found that my library is nearing completion(即将竣工). On the site of the library is a mansion with a century-old history. It’s said that the interior of the library is in the same style as the mansion. The roof is covered with paintings, the windows are inlaid with glazed glass, and even the tables and chairs are customized(定制) according to the original. I really want to study in such an environment, for its tranquility will definitely improve my learning efficiency.

The CFA exam is approaching. After months cramming and studying intensely, I believe that I’m fully prepared (准备充足的) to achieve my goals.
answers.summary: 上个月我设立了一个目标就是努力学习并考出CFA，CFA被称为金融第一考，我只要一有闲暇时间就看网课，并做好笔记。为了不让自己被外界打扰，我在学习的时候都会把手机关机，一是图书馆需要保持安静，二是这样能提高我的专注力。最近走在回家路上，我发现家附近的图书馆很快要竣工了，它是由历史建筑改造的，听说里面也按照当年的风格布置，屋顶还有彩绘，真的很想试试这样的环境里学习，一定能使我的学习效率更高。相信我一定能达成我的目标。

topics.title: 买来一开始难用的东西/有用的新技能/困难的挑战/实用技能

questions.content: Describe something you bought that it was difficult to use at first Describe a new skill you learned that you think is useful Describe a difficult challenge you met Describe a practical skill you learned

source_payload.title: 买来一开始难用的东西/有用的新技能/困难的挑战/实用技能

sub_questions.content:
Describe something you bought that it was difficult to use at first
Describe a new skill you learned that you think is useful 
Describe a difficult challenge you met
Describe a practical skill you learned

answers.title: 挑战音乐编曲软件，学习编曲技能
answers.content:
I want to talk about a piece of music arrangement software.

I’m a big fan of music and have always wanted to learn how to do music arrangement since I was in middle school. Finally, last week I bought some music arrangement software from Taobao. It was easy to install on my computer, but since I’ve never used such software, I couldn’t combine the tracks of different instruments together. Therefore, the sound came out very messy, even on just a short piece of music.

Actually, I studied music theory for a while when I was in college, but arrangement is a new field for me and it’s still a very big challenge, because it requires not only mastering(强调专业地掌握某种技巧) composition skills, but also the harmony of all the tones. All the expertise drove me nuts(让我发疯). I didn’t want to just give up, so I studied the instructions of how to use the software, watched many videos of arrangement bloggers, and I often consulted(咨询) the arrangement experts around me. Luckily, I can now use the software to compose some very simple songs, and I’m very excited about that.

Composition skills are very useful to me because I like to express my emotions through music in my free time, and when I finish a piece of music, I always feel a sense of accomplishment(成就感). Therefore, I think I will continue studying it, and maybe someday, you will see my CD on the shelves.
answers.summary: 上个星期我从淘宝买入了一个音乐编曲软件，安装的时候很简单，但由于我从没有用过，导致我制作出来的一小段音乐的声音非常杂乱无章。虽然我有学习过一段时间的乐理，但编曲对我来说还是一个非常大的挑战，因为他不仅需要掌握作曲技巧，还需要和声、复调等一系列专业知识。我不想就这么放弃，因此我看了软件的使用方法，许多编曲博主的视频，并且经常向我身边的编曲大神请教。现在，我能够运用这个软件编一些非常简单的曲子，对于我来说编曲技能非常有用，因为我非常喜欢在闲暇的时候通过音乐来抒发自己的情绪，并且当我作完一首曲子会非常有成就感。

topics.title: 久伴的家人/教导你的人/在杂志上或网上看到的关于健康文章

questions.content: Describe one of your family member you spend the most time with Describe a person who taught you something important Describe an article on health you read on magazine or the Internet

source_payload.title: 久伴的家人/教导你的人/在杂志上或网上看到的关于健康文章

sub_questions.content:
Describe one of your family member you spend the most time with
Describe a person who taught you something important

answers.title: 和妈妈待在一起看书的时间最多，有一次看到关于心理健康的文章
answers.content:
The family member who has spent the most time with me is my mother. She’s a person who likes to read all kinds of paper books. I’ve also cultivated this good habit(养成好习惯) because my mother has often told me to read all kinds of books ever since I was a child. We can find the wisdom of life(生命的智慧) in different books. We often sit together and read quietly, and being with her makes me feel relaxed.

I once saw an article about mental health in a magazine. I know that my mother was under a lot of pressure at work, and as a student, I sometimes have a lot of academic pressure, so I decided to read the entire article and share it with her. Through the article, I learned that there are many causes of stress, including our own emotions and the external environment. All we have to do is to communicate efficiently and face reality.

After reading the article, I immediately shared it with her. She said that the content was very good, so we actually carried out the experiments(进行试验) described in the article. After realizing the real cause of our stress, we tried to relieve it by walking and talking. I think this article is very good, and I’m very grateful to my mother for helping me with stress relief. She’s an integral(不可或缺的) part of my life.
answers.summary: 和我待一起时间最长的家人是我的妈妈，她是一个非常喜欢看各类纸质书籍的人，她时常教导我看各类书籍的重要性，我们可以在不同书籍中发现生活中的智慧。我们经常坐在一起看静静地看书，和她在一起待着让我感到放松。有一次我在杂志上看到了一篇关于心理健康的文章，我知道妈妈的工作压力很大，而作为学生的我有时学业压力也很大，所以我决定看下去。通过这篇文章我了解到了我们自身的情绪以及外部的环境都会造成压力，而我们所要做的就是及时疏解，及时沟通并且正视现实。

topics.title: 成功的小型公司/团队一员/穿过的制服

questions.content: Describe a successful small company Describe a team where you were a member Describe a uniform that you have to wear in a school or company

source_payload.title: 成功的小型公司/团队一员/穿过的制服

sub_questions.content:

answers.title: 密室逃脱公司兼职
answers.content:
I want to share with you a time when I worked in an escape room last winter holiday.

Last winter vacation, I applied for a part-time job in an escape room which had just opened in my city. When I passed by the store, I saw an advertisement for part-time jobs, so I thought I could make some pocket money(零用钱) during the winter vacation.

It’s a small company with 10 employees including the boss. Luckily, I got the phone call asking me to go for an interview just a few days after I sent the application form. After the interview, I had successfully joined the team. Although it’s a company with a small number of employees, it’s very successful, because the appointments are full every day, which means there’s a lot of guests coming and playing every day.

I was mainly responsible for(负责) telling the background story and escape rules to the guests. The atmosphere of the whole team was very relaxed. Except for one point, the company had a dress code(着装规范). We needed to wear a company-made sweater, the uniform, with the company's name written on it. In fact, I didn't think it looked smart enough, but I had to wear it to promote the image of the company(提升公司形象).

I believe this small company will definitely become better, not only with its good workforce, but also because of the ingenious(别出心裁的) secret room experience.
answers.summary: 上个寒假我应聘了一家密室逃脱做兼职，正好想着寒假可以赚一些钱。这是一家小型的公司，加上老板一共才10个人，面试后我成功加入了这个工作团队。虽然是一家员工不多的公司，但是非常成功，因为每天的预约都会排满，每天要接待的客人也非常多。我主要负责为客人讲述故事背景以及逃脱规则。整个团队氛围非常轻松。除了一点，公司有着装的要求。我们需要统一穿公司定制的卫衣，上面写着公司的名字，其实我觉得这件衣服不够有活力，但是为了宣传我不得不穿上。我相信这家店一定会开得更好，不仅是有好的工作团队，更是因为有别出心裁的密室体验。

topics.title: 重要旅程延误/某人给你道歉/重要的短信

sub_questions.content:
