answers.title: 由于收到改签短信毕业旅行延误，携程客服向我道歉
answers.content:
Well, I want to give a short presentation about this topic. Last month I planned to go on a graduation tour (毕业游) with my best friend in college. We decided to travel to XI AN because it was a city which we were both interested in and we had never been to. It was probably the last chance for us to travel together because we would work in different cities after graduation.

I made a reservation for connecting tickets(联程机票) and hotels on a travel app named C-trip. Everything was fine until a week before we went. I received a text message from C-trip which said that the first trip of our flight had to be delayed, which meant that we had to rebook (改签) the air tickets. I then made a phone call to a customer service staff member at C-trip who said that he would confirm our flights in the evening, which meant we had to wait to re-book the connecting flight.

However, I didn’t receive any calls that night and I was pretty anxious about the trip. The staff member didn’t call me back until the third day. I was really angry. He apologized many times and said he could understand my feelings. He said our flight was confirmed and I could feel that he was really sincere in his apology(真诚的道歉). After all, it wasn’t his mistake.

I felt so lucky that I got the text message beforehand so that we could re-book the tickets. However, we still had to cancel the first night of our hotel booking and plan our schedule all over again.
answers.summary: 上个月我和大学最好的朋友约好去西安毕业旅行，毕业后我们很难再有这样的机会，我在携程上买了联程机票，酒店行程都订好了，但在出发的前一个星期突然收到携程旅行的短信，短信里面表示我的机票由于前半段航班时间改变需要改签。我便立即拨打给客服人员询问，他表示晚上会打电话给我确认。我当晚并没有收到电话，心里非常焦急，直到第三天客服才打来电话，携程客服表示非常理解我的心情并一直向我道歉，表示已经完成改签。我觉得他的道歉还算真诚，并且也不是他引发的问题。幸好短信来得及时，还有机会改签，只是订的当晚的酒店只能先退掉。

topics.title: 拥挤的地方/乘坐公共交通的旅行/天气阻止你做的事情

questions.content: Describe a crowded place you went to Describe an enjoyable journey by public transport Describe an occasion when weather prevented your activity

source_payload.title: 拥挤的地方/乘坐公共交通的旅行/天气阻止你做的事情

sub_questions.content:
Describe a crowded place you went to
Describe an enjoyable journey by public transport
Describe an occasion when weather prevented your activity

answers.title: 乘地铁去迪士尼人多天气热
answers.content:
Well, I’m going to talk about something I experienced that really disappointed me. It was a trip to Shanghai Disney Park with my elder brother during summer vacation last year.

My brother wanted to go somewhere special and exciting for the hot summer so we decided to go to Disneyland. I totally loved his idea because I had never been to a theme park(主题乐园) before. I still remember the very detailed plan we made the night before our trip, you know, such as the transport, entertainment, restaurants and things like that.

We made the trip on the weekend and took the subway around midday but it was absolutely packed with people(非常拥挤). When it arrived, everyone swarmed to the main gate of Disney Park. After we entered the park, our first stop was the drift on a manmade (人工的) river, but the queue was so long that we had to stand out in the sun and not in the shaded area.

It was sweltering (闷热的) that day and was about 34 degrees celsius(摄氏度). We waited for over an hour and both of us felt really uncomfortable. It seemed that we were getting sunstroke, so we decided to give up and do some indoor attractions instead where we didn’t have to wait so long.

Finally, we watched a firework show which was very enjoyable. Next time, I think I will probably go there on a weekday when most people are at work.
answers.summary: 去年暑假，哥哥提出一起去迪士尼游玩，我们在前一晚做了行程规划以及游玩项目。当天是周末，中午我们乘了地铁11号线，从地铁上开始人就非常多。大家一下地铁人群都涌向入口，我们进去后直接走向雷鸣山漂流，排队太长，以至于我们排出了能够遮蔽太阳的区域。那天温度有34度，我们顶着大太阳，硬是排了一个多小时，还是望不到头。最后我们俩实在受不了，真的感觉要中暑了，因此决定放弃排队，找了一个不用怎么排队的室内活动，最后晚上看了烟花秀回了家。烟花秀很好看，我们约定下次找一个工作日再去。

topics.title: 令人兴奋的活动/最近看过的演出

questions.content: Describe an event that you were excited about Describe a performance you recently watched

source_payload.title: 令人兴奋的活动/最近看过的演出

sub_questions.content:
Describe an event that you were excited about
Describe a performance you recently watched

answers.title: 《声入人心》巡演
answers.content:
Well, I’m going to talk about a very exciting event for me. It was actually an impressive show I saw with friends last May. It was an extremely popular show so many people wanted to watch it live.

If my memory is correct, it was on a warm weekend and my friends and I luckily snapped up(抢到) entrance tickets for a live show named “Super Voice”. It was a well-known reality show (真人秀) and it was a big thing in China last year. This show was similar to American Idol and was basically a singing contest.

We were looking forward to seeing such an amazing show because we hadn’t actually seen any live show like this before. I still remember the day as we went to the Shanghai Poly Theater. We were all pretty hyped about it and the show didn’t let us down. I mean, it was fantastic. We had the chance to see a real performance of professional musicians and opera singers. Every singer had their unique style(独特的风格) and way of singing, and I could feel that they loved music and put all their hearts into the songs. It was also the first time I saw the perfect combination of soprano(高声部) and bass(低声部).

It was quite an exciting and unforgettable experience for us to see such a great show. We had seen the show online before, but the live show itself was just much more spectacular than the videos we had seen online.
answers.summary: 去年5月份，我和我的朋友有幸抢到了《声入人心》巡演上海站的门票。我们在演出当天带着激动的心情去到上海保利大剧院，之前只在视频中听过他们的演唱，而能够有机会在现场听到高低声部的完美融合让我们感到非常兴奋。不负众望，真实地看到了那些音乐剧演员、美声音乐家，并且在现场听到了他们合作出的美妙的歌声比在视频中听到更为震撼，那是我看过最棒的演出，也是我最开心的一天。

topics.title: 健康运动/开心经历

questions.content: Describe an activity you do to keep fit. Describe the happiest day you had

source_payload.title: 健康运动/开心经历

sub_questions.content:
Describe an activity you do to keep fit.
Describe the happiest day you had

answers.title: 健康游泳减肥达成100天计划很开心
answers.content:
Well for this topic, I would like to talk about my experience of keeping fit. Half a year ago, I set up a 100-day weight-loss plan for myself, with the intention of(打算) losing 10 kg.

To implement my plan efficiently(有效实施), I registered for an annual card at the gym adjacent to(临近) me and went swimming for 1 hour every night. Except for some unexpected circumstances, I stuck to it without hindrance(不受阻碍的坚持下来). As the project proceeded, I could evidently see (明显的感知) that my physical fitness(身体素质) had been enhanced, my respiratory system(呼吸系统) was clearer (使…顺畅), and even the pain in my waist, legs and neck had been relieved.

The most exciting thing was that on the 100th day of the plan, I weighed myself and was surprised to find that I had over-achieved my task. What’s more, my posture had improved. My friends came to see me that day by coincidence(碰巧) , and they were very delighted about(替…感到高兴) my success. We had a delicious and healthy dinner together, during which I shared my experience with them.

I thought it was the happiest day I have ever had. For the first time, I could be a story-teller thanks to the time I sweated it out (挥洒汗水) in the gym. Now this experience seemed to be a milestone in my life as it drove all my plans afterwards. Whenever I set a major goal, I will feel motivated and challenged in retrospect(回想) of the process of my persistence and the joy of sharing that day.
answers.summary: 半年前我给自己制定了100天减肥计划，计划减重20斤，我办了一个家身旁健身房年卡，每天晚上去游泳1h，除了一些突发状况，我都坚持了下来。在我计划进行的过程中，我明显感受到了我的身体素质变得比以前好，呼吸系统十分顺畅，腰腿脖子疼痛的毛病也好了很多，最令人开心的是当100天结束的那一天，我称了体重，发现自己超额完成了任务，并且体态变好了，我的朋友那天刚好来看望我，他们看到我的成功也十分开心，我们约了一个好吃健康的饭店，我给他们分享了我的经历，那天觉得自己是最开心的。

topics.title: 失而复得的东西/童年玩具

questions.content: Describe something you lost and you got it back Describe a toy you liked in your childhood

source_payload.title: 失而复得的东西/童年玩具

sub_questions.content:
Describe something you lost and you got it back
Describe a toy you liked in your childhood

answers.title: 小时候的乐高飞机模型翅膀丢失后突然在旧书包里发现
answers.content:
I want to talk about the Lego that my father bought for me when I was about 5 years old. Well, it was a small aircraft model. And what made it so special is that it was the only gift that I owned as a kid. Yeah, don’t be surprised! My parents were struggling financially when they first had me. They didn’t have the spare money to afford gifts.

Anyway, I was fascinated by it(我超级喜欢它) and used to take it to school to play with my friends. We kept tearing it apart, and then putting it back together. Yeah, you know, as children, we found that repetitive motion rather interesting!

The Lego brought me so much happiness. But unfortunately, the Lego went missing(找不到了) when we moved houses a couple of years ago. I looked everywhere for it, but didn’t find a trace of it(不见踪影)! Well, I am indeed a nostalgic person . Losing a toy from childhood, to most people, may be just nothing. But to me, part of my childhood memory was disturbed because of it!

Anyway, it took me a while to get over it. But just when I thought I had lost it for good, my mother found it in a rarely used bag of mine when she was sorting my room! Oh wow, I was as happy as a clam! In one moment, all the sweet childhood memories crowded my mind(同年的美好记忆一下涌上心头). Once again, I can place it on the top shelf of my cupboard. And this time, I’m gonna be more careful with it, for sure!
answers.summary: 小时候爸爸出差给我买了一个乐高，是一个小型的飞机模型，我非常喜欢它经常带到学校和朋友们一起玩，拼了拆拆了拼，但是有一次我们搬家的时候不慎把他弄丢了，当时我找了好多地方，最终也没有找到。我以为我彻底失去它了，但上周妈妈整理房间时在我的一个不常用的书包里看到，我高兴的像个孩子，一瞬间同年关于它愉快的记忆全涌了上来。

topics.title: 花费很久准备的礼物/家乡特产

questions.content: Describe a gift that took you a lot of time to prepare Describe a popular product (food, handicraft...) made in the region you come from

sub_questions.content:
Describe a gift that took you a lot of time to prepare 
Describe a popular product (food, handicraft...) made in the region you come from

answers.title: 朋友过生日送上自己亲手绣的家乡苏绣
answers.content:
I want to talk about Suzhou embroidery which is a famous local handicraft in my hometown. If you’ve ever been to Suzhou, you have probably bumped into(碰到，遇上) the hand-made embroidery in many local shops. It is actually one of the most popular souvenirs that tourists like to bring home as gifts for their family and friends.

Because of the wide popularity of the embroidery, I decided to DIY an embroidered handkerchief for my best friend from Beijing for her last birthday. Well, my grandmother actually was one of the well-known local craft women. I used to watch her embroider when I was a child. In fact, I learnt a few techniques of making the embroidery from her. But what I learnt was only the tip of an iceberg(冰山一角), really. When I got all the materials ready, my mind just went blank!

Eventually, I had to video call my grandmother, and ask her to show me how to stitch. Well, I admit it was not a particularly enjoyable learning experience. Imagine fixing your eyes on the computer screen for three hours to sort out the stitches of different thread colors! At the end of it, you’d want to bump your head against a wall(让你简直想撞墙), I tell you.

But hard work always pays off! After about a week, I finally stitched a cute rabbit on the handkerchief! It's vivid and of strong Suzhou style! When I took it to my friend, she was as happy as a child! I felt a great sense of achievement too! In the meantime, I was proud to have learnt a hometown handicraft skill!
answers.summary: 苏绣是我家乡最有名的工艺品，我的外婆也是当地曾经著名的手艺人。如果你去过苏州旅游的话，可以在当地的许多店里看到苏绣的手工制品，来这边旅游的游客总会带上一些这样的纪念品，但是听说大多数已经是用机器缝制的了，去年我最好的朋友过生日的时候，我就为打算亲手为她缝制一个苏绣的手帕，由于在学校不能回到家，我还央求外婆视频教我针法，花了一星期的时间我终于绣了一只彩色小兔子。送给我的好朋友，她特别开心我也觉得十分有成就感，同时我还终于学会了我家乡的手艺了。

topics.title: 和他人无聊经历/骗朋友的经历

questions.content: Describe an experience that you got bored when you were with others Describe a time when you did not tell a friend the truth

source_payload.title: 和他人无聊经历/骗朋友的经历

sub_questions.content:
Describe an experience that you got bored when you were with others
Describe a time when you did not tell a friend the truth

answers.title: 陪朋友逛街很无聊但是不好意思说她试穿的衣服很显胖
answers.content:
I'd like to talk about when my friend dragged me to do shopping last weekend. She was especially cheerful, well, perhaps it’s because her part-time job boss gave her an extra bonus! But I was barely in the mood(我压根就没心情), plus it was extremely hot that day! I told her no until she offered to help me with the preparation for my final exam. Yeah，tempting suggestion(那个提议很诱惑我)! I could really use some of her help with that. So I finally agreed to come along with her.

We went into one shop after another. She tried on one dress after another. I don’t know what’s going on in her head. Clearly the dress looked like a saggy bag on her, but she still found it necessary to ask my opinion! After half an hour in the shopping center, I already started to yawn. Yeah, I yawned for the rest of our shopping trip , I was bored to death(无聊的要死).

And what’s worse, I couldn’t even give her my true opinion. It’s obvious that she needed to lose weight, because all nice clothes didn’t fit her. But what could I say? I was in a dilemma. Telling her the truth would definitely hurt her feelings, and there goes my exam preparation! But holding back my tongue(不讲真话) made me so uncomfortable.

I chose to make myself feel uncomfortable, since I already found myself in an unpleasant situation, and the shopping wasn’t about me anyway. Maybe after the final exam, I would find the right timing to let her know that she needs to work out. But not now yet. After all, it’s a rather boring shopping experience.
answers.summary: 上周末我的朋友发了工资特别开心突然非要拉上我去逛街。说实话我是一个特别宅的人，又是大热天的正午，我百般拒绝未果，他提出帮我复习期末考试的诱惑我终于同意了。她像是打了鸡血，走进了一家又一家，试了一件又一件，还不停地问我好不好看，显不显瘦，我觉得非常无聊，因为我对衣服一向是很随意的态度。同时我还很尴尬，明明穿起来想个桶，我又不想上海她的自尊，我只能随便应和，我又很纠结，也许以后我会找个机会提醒她该减肥了吧。总之这是一个非常无聊又很累的一次经历。

topics.title: 喜欢看的天空/想分享的电影

questions.content: Describe a beautiful sky you enjoyed seeing Describe a film you would like to share with your friends

source_payload.title: 喜欢看的天空/想分享的电影

sub_questions.content:
Describe a beautiful sky you enjoyed seeing
Describe a film you would like to share with your friends

answers.title: 《龙猫》电影里的天空十分唯美
answers.content:
I'm especially into Japanese anime(日本动漫), and my favourite animation is My neighbor TOTORO. You see, the story that this film tells is indeed moving and heart-gripping. However, what really attracts me is the beautiful sky scene in this film.

Anyway, this movie is about childhood innocence, friendship and the belief that magic is all around us. And magic does work its power when it’s fired by love. With such a beautiful and insightful theme, the movie producer matched the story with the aesthetic sky(唯美的天空). Well, I originally thought the sky in that movie was a special effect(特效). But it turned out every picture of the sky was man-made. The shooting team made tremendous effort to finally capture the perfect sky view. They did the sky shooting in Summer, when Japan’s sky receives tremendous light from the blue sea because of the refraction effect(折射效应). Plus, the different shapes of clouds hanging in the blue sky, echoing(回应，照应) the animation scenarios. I tell you, each scene in that movie is a piece of art! Such a perfect combination of nature and art! Watching this movie is like going on a healing journey of the soul.

Some day, I hope, I’d be lucky enough to experience that kind of sky in real life and feel that pure blue in nature. In fact, I often recommend this movie to my friends, so that they can also enjoy this pleasant sensation(惬意的感觉)!
answers.summary: 有一部我最喜欢的电影《龙猫》，我看过很多次，去年30周年重映的时候我又去电影院看了这部电影。这是一部非常唯美令人感动的电影。其中的天空是我见过最好看的天空，唯美诗意。听说电影里的天空都是很有讲究的。那是日本的夏季，日本是沿海国家，天空受海水的折射影响显得格外的蓝，更富诗意般的艺术美感，而不同的云的造型和动画场景都能很好的呼应，将自然和艺术结合的十分美好。我真的很期盼有一天可以遇到电影中的那抹天空蓝。我也经常把这部电影推荐给我的朋友看，和我一起享受这种视觉美感。

topics.title: 擅长工作的人/经常乘飞机的人

questions.content: Describe a person who often travels by plane Describe a person who is good at his or her job

source_payload.title: 擅长工作的人/经常乘飞机的人

sub_questions.content:
Describe a person who often travels by plane
Describe a person who is good at his or her job

answers.title: 实习认识到的老板擅长工作经常出差
answers.content:
I want to talk about my boss that I met during my internship at a cosmetic company. Well, he’s only in his early 30’s. Given how big his business empire is, he’s pretty young and capable(年轻有为). But apparently, that’s at the price of going on frequent business trips.

To be honest, I am amazed by his strong work abilities. Look, unlike some bosses who only stand by and expect the annual bonus, he actively engages in the business. In fact, he is in charge of the core tasks (核心业务) in the company. He analyzes the sales data and makes corresponding sales plans and marketing strategies. So the manufacturing section can follow up. Without him, the business wouldn’t be able to operate half as efficiently as it does!

And not only that, he also travels to different cities and branch offices to communicate with the local employees. He makes full use of his expertise and generously shares his personal experiences with his colleagues. According to him, to take the best advantage of the resources, the philosophy is to keep in mind that particular case is particular analysis(具体情况具体分析).

He does his job so well, yet I know that’s under the circumstance that he’s swamped every day with all sorts of office affairs! Sometimes I do wonder how he pulls it off(不知道他怎么做到的)! Well, perhaps that’s because he is good at managing his time. You know, he travels by air, eats fast food, and strictly follows his daily time schedule. To him, making profits for the company is always his priority. I’ve learnt a great deal from him, and I am lucky to have worked with him.
answers.summary: 我实习的时候认识的老板，他大概才30岁左右，但已经十分事业有成。他的工作是分析每月的销售数据并为公司和企业制定销售和生产计划，但是他还要经乘飞机去各地考察情况，他是一个很高效率的人，不仅体现在他生活中总会选择乘飞机这种快速的交通工具，吃饭也经常会选择吃简餐快餐。他把大部分的时间用在工作上，会想尽最便捷可实行的方法为企业带来利润，在实习的阶段我真的从他身上学到很多我觉得很幸运能遇到这样一位擅长工作的老板。

topics.title: 室内游戏/家庭休闲活动/一群人的快乐时光

questions.content: Describe an experience that you enjoyed an indoor game Describe a leisure activity you do with your family

source_payload.title: 室内游戏/家庭休闲活动/一群人的快乐时光

sub_questions.content:
Describe an experience that you enjoyed an indoor game
Describe a leisure activity you do with your family

answers.title: 和家人一起玩体感游戏机
answers.content:
When it comes to my favorite indoor game, Wii or (位列榜首) Nintendo is definitely on the top of my list. My parents purchased it a few years ago, and it has been my recreation at home (家庭娱乐) ever since. Since I went to college however, I could only play it once a month when I returned from campus. But every opportunity I got , I would play the games with my mother in the living room, because she was such an outgoing and athletic woman that when playing Wii, we always feel like people of the same age! Meanwhile, my father, who dislikes working out, would sit on the sofa and watch us play funny games as if he were the judge.

One of my favorite programs in Wii is the “dancing carpet”, in which players should follow the instructions on the screen, and then dance to the music(随音乐摆动). My mother was a great dancer, since she used to be a famous Latin dance teacher in the district. Not only does she sometimes remember the moves better than I do, but she takes less time than me to rest after the dancing game. I felt a little ashamed, and thus reminded myself that I need to exercise more often in the future in order to keep myself in shape(保持身材). More importantly, I love the sense of family reunion when we play the Wii games at home, because it is the most precious time that the three of us can temporarily forget all the stress and only think about each other.
answers.summary: 任天堂的Wii体感游戏机是我第一个想到的、我最喜爱的室内游戏。读大学后就每个月回家时才玩一次。不过每次我放假回家的时候，都会和我的妈妈在客厅里玩家中的，因为她是一个特别活泼好动的人，玩的时候我们仿佛是同龄人。我的爸爸不爱运动，就一般做我们的评委。

topics.title: 选工作（学习）建议/ 借东西

questions.content: Describe an advice you received on choosing your major or work Describe something useful you borrowed from others

source_payload.title: 选工作（学习）建议/ 借东西

sub_questions.content:
Describe an advice you received on choosing your major or work
Describe something useful you borrowed from others

answers.title: 向老师借报考书老师建议我报计算机专业
answers.content: Personally speaking, I have received the most useful piece of advice pertaining to(关于) choosing a major. I recall that three years ago, when my college entrance exam grades were finally released, my parents were helping me decide which university and which major to select. As a matter of fact, I did not get an ideal result in my exams because of some stupid mistakes I made. Therefore , it was quite difficult for me to get accepted into a top university, under my country’s undergraduate admission policies. I was aware that, however, finding a major that I was interested in would be of greater importance than getting into a renowned university. Then my mother and I paid a visit to my high school math teacher, who I enjoyed chatting with during my school days. She had over 20 years teaching experience , and she indeed had much to share with me in terms of choosing the right major. She not only presented me with some brochures of at least 5 subject areas , but also called several of her students to introduce me to whichever majors I was curious about. Then she suggested that computer science would be a better choice, since I was talented in tackling(解决) math problems in class, and that this major was known to have a high compensation(高报酬) after graduation. I sincerely found her advice as well as the brochures she prepared extremely helpful. And I was grateful that she would still be my mentor in life and offer me insights(提供洞见), even after my high school graduation.
answers.summary: 在高考成绩出来的那一阵子，我的成绩并不是特别的理想，所以选择一个适合自己的专业远比选择一个好的学校更加重要，所以妈妈带我拜访了我的老师，并向她借报考相关的书和资料，我的老师是一位十分有经验的报考专家因为她曾经帮助过很多学生。我借来了近三年的相关的资料，书上有具体介绍不同科目，我们又从老师那了解到不同专业的特点和发展情况，他认为我一直理科思维比较好，而现在计算机专业又是十分火热的专业，他建议我报考相关专业。直到现在我都十分感谢他庆幸我现在选择了现在的专业。

topics.title: 理想房子/公园

questions.content: Describe an ideal house Describe a park/garden you like visiting

source_payload.title: 理想房子/公园

sub_questions.content:
Describe an ideal house
Describe a park/garden you like visiting

answers.title: 想要有一个带大花园的别墅
answers.content:
Well, I’ve got a wealthy friend who has a nice house with a big garden. In his spare time , he always invites me and other friends to his house for fun.

Almost every week, we hang out in his garden, bask in the sun , drink some tea, catch up a little bit, and read books together. Basically, just enjoy the sunny afternoon. He’s also got a fountain in his garden, and there’re a lot of fish in the pool. So, feeding the fish becomes our entertainment as well. I feel so jealous of (羡慕) my friend! I hope I can own a garden house like his in the future, coz whenever I’m in his garden, I forget about everything and just enjoy the moment with my friends. It’s like a secret garden for us. It’s a good way for us to escape from reality and chill out. I can even picture my garden house in my mind right now. There’s a large garden with all kinds of flowers planted in it. Many pigeons are flying toward me. It’s such a beautiful scene ! Besides, I will certainly invite my best friends to my house. You know, just show them around , throw a party(办派对) and have a blast.(玩得开心).
answers.summary: 我有一个很有钱的朋友，他的家里有个大大的花园房子，它经常邀请我们去他家玩，几乎每周我都会去他家的花园里晒太阳喝喝茶聊天看书和她一起享受一个美好的午后，他家的花园还有喷泉，水池边样了好多的鱼，有时候我们还会喂喂鱼。我希望以后我也能拥有一幢花园别墅，有个大大的花园，种满我喜欢的花草，有很多鸽子会飞来，到时候我就还可以邀请朋友们都来我家做客，开派对，一起度过难忘的时光。

topics.title: 改变计划/错误信息

questions.content: Describe a time that you had to change your mind/plan Describe an occasion when you got incorrect information

source_payload.title: 改变计划/错误信息

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time that you had to change your mind/plan
Describe an occasion when you got incorrect information

answers.title: 自己做瑜伽有副作用后决定报班
answers.content:
Well, I would like to talk about the time when I planned to lose weight . During the Spring festival last year, I put on a lot of weight, so I made up my mind to keep fit(保持健康) .

But actually, I had no idea what to do. So, I turned to my friend Lucy for help, coz she’s crazy about keeping fit. She suggested that I should learn to do yoga. It would be helpful for keeping my body in shape(保持身材) . Then I searched for some Yoga tutorial videos online, and just kept doing it for several months. However, during the process, my neck very often hurt. I wanted to figure out (弄清楚) what’s wrong with it, so I searched for that video again. But it was already deleted.

I felt so confused, so I went to the gym and asked a professional Yoga teacher about my problem. She said my gesture and movement were not standard, and that could injure my body in the long run. Suddenly, I realized that I had been doing it the wrong way! I regretted a lot and signed up for a class immediately. As for how I felt about it, well, I learned a lesson from it. When I’m doing something I’m not familiar with, asking for advice from a professional is definitely the best choice. It may cost me a lot, but my health ranks first.

Now, I have picked up the habit of doing Yoga on a regular basis(有规律地). With the guidance of the Yoga teacher, I have managed to lose weight.
answers.summary: 去年过年时我从网上差了很多资料看了很多攻略想要减肥，我的朋友建议我做瑜伽，我在网上看了很多资料，然后跟这一起做了几个月，做了很久后我发现我的脖子一直疼，上网上搜发现那篇文章已经删除了，我又请教身边的专业瑜伽朋友他们告诉我我的动作有问题，我才发现网上的教程是错的，后来我决定花一些钱报个瑜伽班，虽然贵一点但是我的身体健康最重要的。

topics.title: 很累但是要保持清醒的经历/特殊的一天

questions.content: Describe a time you were sleepy but had to stay awake Describe a special day you remember well

source_payload.title: 很累但是要保持清醒的经历/特殊的一天

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time you were sleepy but had to stay awake 
Describe a special day you remember well

answers.title: 大一第一次参加乒乓球比赛
answers.content: It was a college tennis competition that I participated in when I was a freshman(大一). It impressed(使印象深刻) me quite a lot. Once started my college life, I became selected as part of the table tennis team of our college after rounds of tryouts(考核潜力). Since then, we hadn’t stopped training before 11 pm every day, arduously(努力地) preparing for the game, until the eve of the game. You can imagine how much it meant to us. Due to the exhausting(劳苦的) training of the previous night, we were actually very tired and sleepy. Despite(尽管) it, we still worked so hard to get us into the semi-final(半决赛). At noon, our coach bought us chocolate and energy drinks to get boosted(使振奋. We cheered over that we entered the semi-final. It was such good news to the worn-out(精疲力竭的) boys. We outlined the tactics we were going to use in the afternoon, a bid to knock out(击败) the opponents. In the final game, we won a second-place(第二位) prize. This had actually exceeded our goal. We were all very excited. This experience is also the most unforgettable day in my college life. Since then, I have learned not to give up easily, and to strengthen my confidence and overcome all difficulties.
answers.summary: 我大一时参加的一场校乒乓球比赛，令我至今难以忘记，我也从那次经历中学到了很多。可以想像这场比赛对我们来说十分重要，由于前一晚的训练我们其实十分劳累，在比赛中也是拼劲全力，在比赛打到中午的时候我们进入半决赛了，我们那时候很累了也十分的困，这是我们的教练给我们买来巧克力和能量饮料补充能量，这让我们重新鼓起勇气互相击掌助威研究战术，在下午的决赛中获一鼓作气得了第二名的好成绩。这次经历也是我大学生活中最难以忘记的一天，从那以后我学会不要轻易放弃我也更加坚定了自己的信心，战胜一切困难。

answers.title: 图书馆读者会遇到相投的人
answers.content: I often go to the school library to read books on weekends. Because the library has a wealth of(大量的) book resources, I can always find books that interested me there, and sometimes there are book club activities for us to communicate with the other readers. In the last semester with few tasks to do and a lot of spare time(很少任务很多空闲时间), so I went to the library to read novels every day. One day, right down the hall of the library, there was a reader meeting(读者会) of Liu Cixin, the most internationally renowned(著名的) Chinese writer of sci-fi(科幻的) books. There, I met Liu Chang, who later became my best friend. We had heated(热烈的) discussion over the world behind the "Three-body", and loved to chew over(仔细考虑讨论) the author's life anecdote(轶事), and sometimes we had our own fantasies(幻想) about other planets. Liu Chang told me that his childhood dream was to be an astronaut, so he would often wear Superman’s costumes(戏服), standing on the balcony(阳台). When I had grown up, I found myself having airsickness(晕机). Liu is learning astronomy now, which intrigued(令我好奇) me a lot. Since then, we have read plenty of sci-fi and attended reading clubs. It’s no wonder(不足为奇) that we are good friends.
answers.summary: 图书馆有丰富的图书资源，我总能在那里找到我喜欢的书，有时也有很多读书会的活动。我去图书馆看小说，偶遇图书馆正在举办刘慈欣老师的科幻小说读书会。也正是这个读书会让我认识到我最好的朋友刘畅，我们就一起讨论《三体》背后的世界，作者的生活轶事，甚至是我们关于天体外星球的自己一点幻想，他和我说他的小时候的梦想是做宇航员，常常穿着超人的衣服站在阳台上，最后长大后第一次坐飞机发现自己晕机，我觉得非常有趣哈哈。我觉得缘分真的很神奇让我认识到这么好的朋友。

topics.title: 多彩地方/童年学校

questions.content: Describe a place you remember well that is full of colors Describe a school you went to in your childhood

source_payload.title: 多彩地方/童年学校

sub_questions.content:
Describe a place you remember well that is full of colors
Describe a school you went to in your childhood

answers.title: 涂鸦五颜六色的兴趣培养学校
answers.content: When I was 8 years old, there was a new and nearby school for after-school class(课后辅导班). Strange as it might sound, it was the place where children attend different interest classes. Both the exterior (外面) and interior décor(内饰) were rather beautiful and exquisite(精致的), full of colorful pattern. I heard that it was designed by a famous graffiti(涂鸦) master. There is plenty of graffiti on the wall, with different themes. Different from those on the street walls, these are tailored for(为。。专业设计) kids under 12. You will find it sweet and childlike(孩子般的) instead of anything related to blood and skeletons(骨骼). Many tourists who had heard of the graffiti wall would come to visit. This school offers a lot of interest classes, not only chess and calligraphy, but also some courses in table tennis, badminton, music and dance. My mother has high hopes(高希望) for me and expected to train me into a fully developed child, so I have three different classes to attend in the summer and winter holiday, including dance, vocal music(唱歌) and fine arts. I spend almost every day of the holiday there. There, I know a lot of like-minded(思想相似的) friends, and we tried to polish(润色) our skills during the recess time(空闲时间). This is a process that has benefited me to a degree, because I really fill(填补差距) a lot of knowledge gaps. My art teacher gave me lots of guidance(指导), helping me grow up from a new art novice(新手) to an artist. I have been in contact with my art teacher until now, and have never been able to forget what she taught me.
answers.summary: 我8岁的时候，我家那边新开了一个兴趣培养学校，外面和内部都装饰的十分漂亮精致，五颜六色多姿多彩，听说是一位著名的涂鸦大师设计的。我妈妈对我寄予厚望，希望能把我培养成一个全面发展的小孩，所以帮我报了3个兴趣班，包括舞蹈，声乐和美术。我的美术老师给了我很多指导，让我一步步从一个美术新手成长起来，六年级时我获得了“美术标兵”称号，为此我开心了许多。直到现在我都和我的美术老师联系，她手把手教我的样子我至今都不能遗忘。

questions.content: Describe a picture or photograph in your home Describe an occasion when you celebrated an achievement

source_payload.title: 家中照片/庆祝成就

sub_questions.content:
Describe a picture or photograph in your home
Describe an occasion when you celebrated an achievement

answers.title: 毕业学子宴
answers.content:
In the summer about three years ago, as I was accepted (录取) by a renowned university, my family organised a celebratory feast (学子宴) for me. My close friends, classmates and respected teachers were all present. The dinner was a way of thanking them for their companionship (陪伴) and help during my studies. Also present were my parents' friends and colleagues, who came to congratulate me on (祝贺) being accepted into my desired college.

After the meal, we took a group photo together. The people in this photo are the closest people to me, and everyone has given me some help on my way to success (成功的道路上). In the lower right corner of the photo are some presents from them, such as books, pens and tennis rackets, which carried their expectations and blessings (祝福).

The photo is now on the wall of my study. My heart fills with warmth and gratitude (感激) whenever I look at it, and it can be said to be one of the most unforgettable nights of my life. I can still recall (回忆) the speech my teacher gave on the stage. At the end of his speech, he said with tearful eyes (充满泪水的) that he wished me all the best (一切顺利) in the future. Those words have empowered (使我充满力量) me and supported me through every difficult moment. There’s a voice telling me ‘Do not forget those who helped you’.
answers.summary: 三年前，高考录取通知书下来那个夏天，我的家人为我办了升学宴，我请来我的朋友和老师们，大家一起吃了晚餐，感谢他们的高中三年的陪伴。到场的还有我父母亲的朋友和同事，前来祝贺我考上了我理想的学校。在饭后，我们一起拍了一张合照，这张照片里的人都是我最亲近的人，每个人都在我的成功路上给过我或多或少的帮助。那称得上是我人生中最大的宴会了，我的老师上台说了一段话，祝福我在今后的路上一切顺利继续取得好成绩，我觉得心中满满的力量，每次看到照片或者是回忆起那天，心中便充满了斗志。

topics.title: 被骗/错误信息

source_payload.title: 被骗/错误信息

sub_questions.content:
Describe a time that someone didn’t tell you the whole truth about something
Describe an occasion when you got incorrect information

answers.title: 被骗/错误信息
answers.content:
One weekend my friend and I were in a newly-opened shopping mall and just looked round the shops. We stopped at a pop-up store and there were a number of food products including organic foods, health foods, tea and coffee. I guessed they were to promote the shop as some of the products came in a variety of(各种各样的) offers from buy one, get one free to buy one, get one 50% off.

My friend saw her favorite coffee beans on sale too. There was a banner next to the price tag which said two-for-one so we asked the saleswoman and checked that was a BOGOF promotion. She said yeah and turned to handle another customer’s enquiry. The price seemed pretty decent so my friend and I decided to take two to share among us. At the checkout counter, when we got the receipt, we were surprised by the price. We were still charged for two bags. The cashier then showed us the receipt and explained that we can only enjoy one bag off at the second time of purchase. We were obviously angry at this so we argued with her about how the information was not shown on the banner nor shared by the first assistant when we checked. We wouldn’t have bought it if we’d known so we talked to the shopping mall customer service. The lady finally helped us handle the refund.

We left the store without buying any product. We thought we were getting a real good deal(好交易好买卖) but it turned out we didn’t know the whole truth about the promotion. I think this is half our fault (部分责任), because we were so tempted with this familiar sales pitch that we didn’t check carefully. On the other hand (但是) , it reminded us of the importance of being extremely careful with those promotions.
answers.summary: 上个礼拜我和我朋友在商场里买东西，看到推销员说咖啡买一送一，我和朋友就拿了两罐，结果收银的时候才发现不是直接买一送一而是送下次购买的优惠券，销售员为了业绩没有告诉我们正确的信息，欺骗了我们，我们感到很气愤。
